stem_zh: 3. Simulate the environment 4.Analyse the results Stages 1 and 2:Elaan Co would need to identify all the major variables and for each variable,the range of possible values and their associated probabilities.Elaan Co would then need to input the constructed mathematical model into a computer to enable the next stage to be performed. Stage 3:To simulate the environment,the computer would use random number generation to change multiple variables at a time and recalculate the NPV each time.This routine would be repeated many,many times over (possibly millions). Stage 4:The end result of the simulation would be a mathematical distribution ofall envisaged possible NPV outcomes along with a likelihood/probability of occurrence. Benefits Basic sensitivity analysis can only assess the impact of one variable changing at a time whereas simulation looks at many variables (possibly all)changing at the same time.Consequently,simulation is considered to be more real-world'as it is unlikely a single variable will change in isolation. Simulation can also help Elaan Co's decision making by showing the full range of envisaged possible outcomes (stage 4).The range of outcomes would be shown in the form of a statistical distribution,enabling further mathematical analysis to be performed,such as determining the probability of a negative NPV. Given the relatively small NPV for the hotel project,compared with the investment required,a small change in some of the variables could easily result in a negative NPV.Consequently,knowing the probability of a negative NPV could be extremely useful to Elaan Co. Applied Skills,FM Financial Management(FM) Section C Gamgee Co (a)(i) New operating profit Loan notes-Share price -Interest -Interest cover -PAT -EPS -MV equity -Gearing ratio (ii) Rights issue-Interest cover -PAT -Issue price -Number of shares -EPS -New share price -MV equity -Gearing ratio (iii) Comments Recommendations (b) Problems of high gearing (c) Islamic finance 1 Islamic finance 2 Elaan Co (a) Total room-nights Room rate and revenue Restaurant revenue Variable costs Fixed costs Tax on cash flow TAD TAD benefit Working capital balance Working capital cash flow Nominal cost of capital NPV Comment (b) Real-terms approach (c) Simulation analysis March/June 2024 Sample Marking Scheme Marks Marks ·0 5·0 5·0 5·0 5·0 5·0 5·0 5·0 5 · 0 5 · 0 5 · 0 5 · 0 5 · 0 5 · 0 5 · 0 5 · 4 ·0 5·0 5··0 500 55 · 0 5 · 0 5 · · 0 5 ·0 50 5· · 0 5 0 5 0 5· 0 5 · · 4 2 2 1 1 3 5 2 2 2 2 4 工 工 工 工 0·5 0·5 0·5工 0·5 工 工 工 工 工 工 1 1 1 12 4 Answers Applied Skills,FM Financial Management(FM) Section C Galle Co (a)(i)Project cash flows Year Revenue Variable costs Fixed costs Taxable cash flow Taxation at 20% TAD benefit After-tax cash flow Working capital Net cash flow Discount factors at 13% Present value(PV) PV of future cash flows Initial investment Working capital Expected NPV September/December 2024 Sample Answers $ 731,500 (463,500) (10,000 ) 258,000 (51,600) 25,000 231,400 (2,400 ) 229,000 0·885 202,665 2 $ 2 $ 649,740 (405,790) (10,000 ) 233,950 (46,790) 18,750 205,910 (2,472) 203,438 0·783 159,292 3 $ 678,980 (417,945) (10,000) 251,035 (50,207) 14,063 214,891 (2,546) 212,345 0·693 147,155 4 $ 709,580 (430,525) (10,000 ) 269,055 (53,811) 42,187 257,431 87,418 344,849 0·613 211,392 720,504 (500,000) (80,000) 140,504 (ii) Expected NPV is positive and is therefore financially acceptable. However,the expected NPVis based upon an expected volume of 8,500 units for years 2 to 4.There is a 30%probability that volume for these years could be as low as 5,000 units which would reduce the NPV,possibly resulting in a negative NPV. Workings W1-Volume Volume for year 1=10,000 Expected volume for years 2 to 4=0·3×5,000+0·7x10,000=8,500 per year W2-Sales and variable cost Year 1 2 3 4 Selling price($/unit) 70 ·00 70 ·00 70 ·00 70 ·00 Inflated at 4 ·5%($/unit) 73 ·15 76 ·44 79 ·88 83 ·48 Volume(units/year) 10,000 8,500 8,500 8,500 Revenue($) 731,500 649,740 678,980 709,580 Variable cost($/unit) 45 ·00 45 ·00 45 ·00 45 ·00 Inflated at 3%($/unit) 46 ·35 47 ·74 49 ·17 50 ·65 Volume(units/year) 10,000 8,500 8,500 8,500 Variable cost($) 463,500 405,790 417,945 430,525 W3-TAD benefit Year1 2 3 4 Year $$$ $ $ $ $ TAD at 25% 125,000 93,750 70,313 210,937 TAD benefit at 20% 25,000 18,750 14,063 42,187 Note:Year 4 TAD=500,000-125,000-93,750-70,313=210,937 W4-Working capital (WC) Year 1 2 3 4 $ $ $ $ WC at start of year 80,000 82,400 84,872 87,418 WC at end of year (3%) 82,400 84,872 87,418 0 Cash flow (2,400) (2,472) (2,546) 87,418 Alternative calculation of after-tax cash flow 工 46Year 工 46 Taxable cash flow TAD Taxable profit Taxation at 20% Add back TAD After-tax cash flow 258,000 (125,000) 133,000 (26,600) 125,000 231,400 2 $ 233,950 (93,750) 140,200 (28,040) 93,750 205,910 3 $ 251,035 (70,313) 180,722 (36,144) 70,313 214,891 4 $ 269,055 (210,937) 58,118 (11,624) 210,937 257,431 (b)Expected values(EV)(Probability analysis) An EV is a long-un,weighted average outcome using the probability of occurrence for each outcome as the weights.An EV simplifies the appraisal by incorporating the variation in outcomes into a single figure.However,an EV does require knowledge of not only the individual outcomes but also their probability of occurrence which can make the use of EV difficult in practice unless past data can be used for prediction purposes.It also only has any meaning for repetitive events. Sensitivity analysis This is a form of'what if?analysis where the impact on a project's NPV due to a change in a key variable can be quantified.This allows key,sensitive variables to be identified for further investigation and ongoing project monitoring.Unfortunately,it does not give any indication of the likelihood of occurrence of the changes,nor does it allow for more than one variable to be changed at a time so the interdependence between variables is ignored. Simulation Simulation is a more sophisticated version of sensitivity analysis whereby it allows for more than one variable to change at a time. The analysis usually has to be performed with computer modelling techniques due to its complexity but it will ive a good indication of potential outcomes.Its main disadvantages are its complexity,it is a much more time-consuming process and probabilities are stillrequired for the variable changes. Adjusted payback Payback measures how long in years until the project has broken even in its cash flows.The longer the payback period,the more the project has a greater reliance on later,more uncertain,cash flows.Project acceptance is usually based on setting a maximum payback limit for projects.By reducing the maximum payback benchmark,the longer payback,more uncertain projects will tend to be rejected.Choice of the maximum payback is subjective,however,and no account is taken of the project's return as cash flows after payback are ignored. Risk adjusted discount rate The discount rate in an NPV calculation should be determined by the risk within the project being undertaken.For higher risk projects,the discount rate should be increased to ensure future present values are reduced sufficiently to allow for the increased return required by the finance providers.This increase could be performed arbitrarily by simply adding a return premium to the existing rate or using more sophisticated,complex techniques such as the capital asset pricing model(CAPM). Note:Only four techniques were required. Guillermo Co (a) Cost of sales =$6,000,000x(1-0·6)=$2,400,000 Credit sales =$6,000,000×0·75=$4,500,000 Credit purchases =$2,160,000×0·9=$1,944,000 Inventory holding period: Raw materials =120,000/2,160,000x360=20 days Work in progress =20,000/2,400,000×360=3 days Finished goods =80,000/2,400,000×360=12 days Receivables collection =850,000/4,500,000×360=68 days Payables payment =162,000/1,944,000×360=30 days Cash operating cycle =20+3+12+68-30=73 days (b)Improve credit control/receivables collection At 68 days,average receivables collection period is over twice the standard terms of 30 days.This would suggest very poor credit control,particularly in relation to chasing up overdue debt.It would appear that the finance department is not taking ownership/responsibility for this and leaving it to the account managers who are probably (and perhaps understandably)more interested in increasing sales rather than chasing up old ones.Credit control should be brought within the finance department's responsibilities and overdue accounts suspended until up to date. Improve process efficiency On average,the product is taking three days to manufacture according to the work in progress calculation which would suggest the production process is running at only 67%efficiency (the product should take two days to manufacture).The production process should be looked at to determine if there is a bottleneck in the process which needs addressing or othereficiency improvements which could be made.This would have other knock-on benefits such as being able to reduce the level of finished goods held as demand could be more readily met from production. Raw material inventory holding Raw material holding is 20 days which given the three-day production period (see above)would suggest that Guillermo Co's holding of raw may be considered high.If so,then raw material holding should be reduced,perhaps even considering if just-in-time purchasing of raw material should be adopted. Trade payables payment Average credit terms with its trade suppliers is 35 days and yet Guillermo Co is paying its suppliers after 30 days on average.Paying earlier than term is detrimental to its cash cycle and even though it likes to maintain a good supplier relationship,this could still be achieved by paying on 35 days and consequently improving the cash cycle by five days. Note:Only three ways were required. (c) Daily variance =$15,000²=$225,000,000 per day Daily interest rate =9%/360=0·025%per day Transaction cost =$55 per transaction Spread=3x[(0·75x$55x$225,000,000)/O·00025]1/3=$100,079 Target cash balance(return point)=$40,000+1/3x$100,079=$73,360 (d) Holding cash in a bank account does not usually generate high returns and too high a cash balance is therefore undesirable but there are three key motives/reasons for holding cash. Transactions motive Cash should be kept in order to meet day-to-day expenses.Suppliers,for example,will require payment in cash in accordance with the agreed terms and failure to do so could result in trade accounts being withdrawn causing business disruption.Inability to be able to pay employees'wages and salaries would also result in severe disruption for the business due to industrial action such as a walkout of the employees. Precautionary motive Unexpected costs could occur which require cash outlay.For example,an unexpected fine or claim against the business.Inability to setle such items would negatively impact the business in many ways,including reputational damage or even forced closure in extreme circumstances. Investment/speculative motive Unexpected opportunities can arise which,while requiring cash outlay,could bring financial return.Holding an amount of cash for such events could enable a business to take advantage of such opportunities,such as acquiring an undervalued company. 1. Which of the following is an advantage of implementing just-in-time inventory management? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.Quality control costs willbe eliminated B.Monthly finance costs incurred in holding inventory will be kept constant C.The frequency ofraw materials deliveries is reduced D.The amount of obsolete inventory will be minimized 答案：D
explanation_zh: 本题考查just-in-time(JIT)库存管理的优点。JIT管理的逻辑是在需要的时候，按照需 要的量生产所需的产品，因此： A 选项错误，JIT 整个环节紧凑快速，对于质检部门的效率和准确性有着更高的要求，质量 控制成本不能被削减； B 选项错误，JIT 下原材料只有在有生产需求的时候才会被购买，产品只有在客户有需求的 时候才会被生产，企业持有的每月平均存货量较低并且不稳定，因此持货产生的财务成本是 不稳定的； C 选项错误，JIT 下原材料只有在有生产需求的时候才会被购买，因此是根据客户需求分多 次小批量采购，而非集中大批量采购，相较于传统库存管理，原材料运输频率更高； D 选项正确，JIT 下产品只有在客户有需求的时候才会被生产，生产完成后会尽快运送至客 户，因此过时产品的持有量会大大降低。 知识点标签： Working capital management -Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash-Relevant techniques in managing inventory:EOQ&JIT. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 2. Which TWO of the following activities are carried out by a financial intermediary? 分值：2 题目类型：多选 A.Transforming interest rates B.Transforming foreign exchange C.Transforming maturity D.Transforming risk 答案：CD
explanation_zh: 本题考察金融中介的职能。 金融中介是在资金提供方和资金需求方之间起媒介和桥梁作用的机构。借款方更需要长期资 金而出借方倾向于短期出借，存在双方需求到期日不匹配的问题，金融中介通过汇集大量借 款方和出借方，可以达到大量的动态资金汇集，从而同时满足双方的到期日需求，因此C 选项正确。同时，金融中介通过汇集大量借款方和出借方，可以达到风险分散的作用，D 选 项正确。 A 选项转换利率和B 选项转换汇率不是金融机构的职能。 知识点标签：Financial management environment-The nature and role of financial markets and institutions-Role of financial intermediaries. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 3. Frost Co is planning a 1 for 4 rights issue with an issue price at a 10%discount to the current share price.The EPS is currently $0.50 and the shares of Frost Co are trading on a price/earnings ratio of 20 times.The market capitalisation of the company is $50m. What is the theoretical ex rights price per share (to two decimal places)? 分值：2 题目类型：填空 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 答案：9.80
explanation_zh: 本题考察配股后每股理论价格的计算，公式为： TERP=(number of old shares*original price +number of new shares offered*issue price)/ (number of old shares+number of new shares offered) 本题original price 需要借助EPS 和 price/earnings ratio的条件进行计算。 original price =current EPS*price/earnings ratio=$0.50*20=$10 1 for 4 rights issue指的是4只现有股票对应增发1只新股，并且新股的价格以现在价格计10% 的折扣，因此 theoretical ex rights price per share计算为： TERP=[4*$10+1*$10*(1-10%)]/(4+1)=9.80 知识点标签： Business finance -Sources of,and raising,business finance -Methods of raising equity finance. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 4. Indicate,by clicking on the relevant boxes,whether the following statements are true or false in relation to business valuation. 分值：2 题目类型：判断 The earnings yield method and the dividend growth model should give similarvalues for a company TRUE FALSE Market capitalisation represents the maximum value for a company TRUE FALSE The price/eamings ratio is the reciprocal of the eamings yield TRUE FALSE The price/eanings ratio should be increased ifthe company being valued is riskier than the valuing company TRUE FALSE 答案：False;False;True;False
explanation_zh: 描述 一 错误，earning yield 的方法是借助每股收益和每股价格的关系来进行估值， dividend growth model是假设股息是股东未来会获得的唯一现金流，通过未来现金流折现进 行估值，两种估值方法逻辑不同，取值不同，难以得到相似结论； 描述二错误，market capitalisation 市值是指公司股票的市价乘以发行股票的数量，而非企业 的最高价值； 描述三正确，price/earning ratio公式为price per share/EPS,earning yield 公式为EPS/price per share, 互为倒数； 描述四错误，如果企业风险更高，股票在市场上价格会下降，因此 price/earning ratio 会下降。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Models for the valuation of shares -Price/earnings ratio method,Earnings yield method,Dividend valuation model and the dividend growth model. 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 5. Select the correct term to complete the below sentence. Small and medium-sized entities(SME)have restricted access to capital markets.The difference between the finance required to operate an SME and the amount obtained is known as the 分值：2 题目类型：单选 Funding gap. Select... Forecasted gap Maturity gap Funding gap Asset gap 答案：Funding gap
explanation_zh: 本题考查中小型企业(SME)融资中的相关概念。题目描述 SME 运营所需要的资金以 及 SME 融到/获取到的资金之间的差异，对应概念为 Funding gap。 知识点标签：Business finance-Finance for small and medium sized entities(SMEs)-The nature of the financing problem for small businesses in terms of the funding gap. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 6. Max Co is a large multinational company which expects to have a $10m cash deficit in one month's time.The deficit is expected to last no more than two months. Which of the following instruments should Max Co issue? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.Commercial B.Interest rate paper futures C.Corporate loan notes D.Treasury bills 答案：A
explanation_zh: 本题考查金融工具的选择。Max Co是一个大型跨国公司，现有一个$10m 的短期资金 需求，时间为一个月至两个月之间，Commercial paper 商业汇票是企业常用的应对短期资金 需求的金融工具，不长于270天，A 选项符合题意。B 选项利率期货不由公司发行，用于进 行利率风险管理；C 选项公司借款票据是长期融资；D 选项国库券由政府发行。 知识点标签： Financial management environment -The nature and role of money market - Interest-bearing instruments,Derivative products. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 7. In relation to capital markets,which of the following statements is true? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.The return from investing in larger companies has been shown to be greater than the average return from all companies B. Weak form efficiency arises when investors tend not to make rational investment decisionsA C.Allocative efficiency means that transaction costs are kept to a minimum D.Research has shown that,overtime,share prices appear to follow a random walk 答案：D
explanation_zh: A 选项错误，根据 CAPM 理论，一个企业回报/亏损的波动是否比市场平均值更加剧 烈取决于该企业的β值； B 选项错误，有效市场假设投资者是理性的，弱有效隶属于有效市场假设，只是股票价格只 反应所有的历史信息，因此投资者仍然做出理性的决策； C 选项错误，最小化交易成本对应的概念为Operational efficiency (交易有效); D 选项正确，研究发现股票价格在长期是随机游走的。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis (EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares-Efficient market hypothesis. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 8. The following data is available: Country Y currency Dollar Country X currency Peso Country Y interest rate 1%per year Country X interest rate 3%per year Country Xexpected inflation rate 2%per year Spot exchange rate in Country Y 1.60 peso per$1 What is the current six-month forward exchange rate in Country Y(to two decimal places)? 分值：2 题目类型：填空 答案：1.62 peso per $1
explanation_zh: 本题考查应用Interest Rate Parity Theory (利率平价理论)计算远期汇率。 本题已知Y 国现货市场汇率为1.60 peso per $1,以及X 国和Y 国的年利率，求Y 国 6 个 月 的远期汇率。根据公式 Fo=So*(1+ie/1+ib) 注意求的是6个月的远期汇率，因此X 国和 Y 国的年利率需要分别处理为半年利率 3%/2=1.5%以及1%/2=0.5%。 Fo=1.60 peso per$1*[(1+1.5%)/(1+0.5%)]=1.62 peso per$1 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations -Interest rate parity theory. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 9. Green Co,a listed company,had the following share prices during the year ended 31 December 20X5: At start of 20X5 $2.50 Highest price in the year $3.15 Lowest price in the year $2.40 At end of 20X5 $3.00 During the year,Green Co paid a total dividend of $0.15 per share. ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM What is the total shareholder return for 20X5? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.26% B.22% C.32% D.36% 答案：A
explanation_zh: 本题考查股东的总收益的计算。计算公式为： TSR=(P₁-Po+Di)/Po=($3.00-$2.50+$0.15)/$2.50=26% 注意Po与 P1取值分别为20X5 年初年末的股票价格。 知识点标签： Financial management function-Stakeholders Total shareholder return. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 10. Carp Co has announced that it will pay an annual dividend per share is $0.80,and it has ten million shares in issue.The and its current cum dividend share price is $4.60. What is the cost of equity of Carp Co? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.19.4% B.20.5% C.28.0% D.22.7% and impact on corporate objectives- equal to 55%of earnings.Its earnings return on equity of Carp Co is 20% 答案：B
explanation_zh: 本题考查使用股息估值模型计算权益资本成本。公式为： Ke=[(Do*(1+g)/Po]+g 已 知payout ratio为 5 5 % , 则b=Retention ratio=1-55%=45%, g=b*re=45%×20%=9% Do=$0.8×55%=$0.44 Po需要将cum dividend share price 处理为除权价，为$4.6-$0.44=$4.16 Ke=[(Do*(1+g)/Po]+g =[$0.44×(1+9%)]/$4.16+9%=20.5% 知 识 点 标 签 ： Business finance -Estimating the cost calculation\assumptionsladvantages and disadvantages of DVM model. 难易程度：低 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM of capital -The

stem_zh: 11. Mile Co is looking to change its working capital policy to match the rest of the industry.The following results are expected for the coming year: $'000 Revenue 20,500 Cost of sales (12,800) Gross profit 7,700 Revenue and cost of sales can be assumed to be spread evenly throughout the year. The working capital ratios of Mile Co,compared with the industry,are as follows: Mile Co Industry Receivable days 50 42 Inventory days 45 35 Payable days 40 35 Assume there are 365 days in each year. If Mile Co matches its working capital cycle with the industry,what will be the decrease in its net working capital? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.$624,600 B.$730,100 C.$835,600 D.$975,300 答案：A
explanation_zh: 本题考查working capital cycle的应用。 Mile Co想要将自己的working capital cycle 调整与行业一致，因此会产生以下变化： Receivable days 从 5 0 天 减 少 为 4 2 天 ， 对 Account receivable 影 响 为 降 低 $20,500,000/365*(50-42)=$449,315.07 Inventory days 从45天减少为35天，对 Inventory 影响为降低$12,800,000/365*(45-35)= $350,684.93 Payable days 从40天减少到35天，对Account payable的影响为降低$12,800,000/365*(40-35) =$175342.47 Net working capital=Account receivable+Inventory-Account payable,因此对于Net working capital 的影响为：(-$449,315.07)+(-$350,684.93)-(-$175,342.47)=-$624,657.53 选择最接近的A 选项。 知识点标签： Working capital management-Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash-Cash operating cycle. 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 12. Indicate,by clicking on the relevant boxes,whether the following statements are true or false? 分值：2 题目类型：判断 A prospective merger would need to result in a company having a market share greater than 80%before it can be described as a monopoly TRUE FALSE A government may intervene to weaken its country's exchange rate in order to eliminate a balance of payments deficit TRUE FALSE A relatively high rate of domestic inflation will lead to a strengthening currency TRUE FALSE Government fiscal policy involves the management of interest rates TRUE FALSE M 答案：False;True;False;False
explanation_zh: 描述一错误，通常来说当企业的市场占比大于25%就可视为垄断； 描述二正确，政府降低自己国家的汇率有利于出口，进而消除贸易逆差； 描述三错误，当本国通货膨胀高时，本国货币会贬值； 描述四错误，fiscal policy 财政政策包括税和政府支出两方面，利率隶属于货币政策。 知识点标签：Financial management environment-The economic environment for business-Role of fiscal,monetary,interest rate and exchange rate policies;Competition policy. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 13. Indicate,by clicking on the relevant boxes,whether the following statements about interest rate risk hedging are correct or incorrect? 分值：2 题目类型：判 断 An interest rate floor can be used to hedge an expected increase in interest rates CORRECT INCORRECT The cost of an interest rate flooris higher than the cost of an interest rate collar CORRECT INCORRECT The premium on an interest rate option is payable when it is exercised CORRECT NCORRECT The standardised nature of interest rate futures means that over-andunder-hedging can be avoided CORRECT INCORRECT 答案：Incorrect;Incorrect;Incorrect;Incorect
explanation_zh: 说法一错误，interest rate floor 规定利率下限值，用于对冲利率的下降； 说法二错误，利率上限和利率下限的总成本与协议有效期的市场利率相关，无法确定孰高孰 低 ； 说法三错误，option premium 期权费是在买卖双方签订option 时就需要由买方支付给卖方的， 并不是行权时才需支付。 说法四错误，利率期货的标准化会造成over-或 under-hedging, 例如标准化合同为$1,000, 企业需要对冲金额为$6,500,只能签订6个合同$6,000(under-hedging) 或者7个合同$7,000 (over-hedging)。 知识点标签：Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-Main types of interest rate derivatives. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 14. Which of the following statements is true? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM A.Value for money is usually taken to mean economy,efficiency and engagement B.Cum dividend means the buyer of the share is not entitled to receive the dividend shortly to be paid C.The dividend payout ratio compares the dividend per share with the market price per share D.The agency problem means that shareholder wealth is not being maximized 答案：D
explanation_zh: A 选项错误， Value for money 包 括economy,efficiency 和 effectiveness; B 选项错误，Cum dividend 指的是股票价格是含权价，即包含将来即将被支付的股息，购买 股票的同时也具有获得该股息的权利； C 选项错误，dividend payout ratio=dividend per share/earning per share D 选项正确，代理问题是由于企业的所有权和经营权分离，所有者即股东不参与企业的实际 经营，管理权落在了经营者即董事手中，而两者追求的目标存在不一致，从而无法达到股东 利益最大化。 知识点标签： Financial management function -Financial and other objectives in not-for-profit organisations -Ways of measuring the achievement of objectives;Nature and importance of Value for Money. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 15. Swap Co is due to receive goods costing $2,500.The terms of trade state that payment must be received within three months.However,a discount of 1.5%will be given for payment within one month. Which of the following is the annual percentage cost of ignoring the discount and paying within three months? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.6.23% B.9.34% C.6.14% D.9.49% 答案：D
explanation_zh: 本题考查应付账款管理。 Swap Co有应付账款$2,500需要在三个月内支付，如果接受折扣，则需要在一个月内支付 $2,500*(1-1.5%)=$2462.5,折扣金额对应为$2,500*1.5%=$37.5。如果企业忽略折扣仍按照 三个月支付$2,500,即多持有了两个月的资金但多支付了$37.5,因此成本为 $ 3 7 . 5 / $ 2 4 6 2 . 5 = 1 . 5 2 3 % , 题 目 求 解 年 成 本 因 此 需 要 将 两 个 月 成 本 转 换 为 (1+1.523%)^6-1=9.49%。 知识点标签： Working capital management -Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash-Early settlement and bulk purchase discounts. 难易程度：高 Section B-ALL15 questions are compulsory and MUST be attempted The following scenario relates to the five questions(16-20)below Background Park Co is based in a country whose currency is the dollar($).The company regularly imports goods denominated in euro(e)and regularly sells goods denominated in dinars.Two of the future transactions of the company are as follows: Three months: Paying E650,000 for imported goods Six months: Receiving 12million dinars for exported capital goods Park Co has the following exchange rates and interest rates available to it: Bid Offer Spot exchange rate(dinars per$1): 57.31 57.52 Six-month forward rate(dinars per $1): 58.41 58.64 Spot exchange rate(Cper $1): 1.544 1.552 Three-month forward rate(Eper $1): 1.532 1.540 Six-month interest rates: Borrow Deposit Dinars 4.0% 2.0% Dollars 2.0% 0.5% The finance director of Park Co believes that the upward-sloping yield curve reported in the financial media means that the general level of interest rates will increase in the future,and therefore expects the reported six-month interest rates to increase. Task12 marks

stem_zh: 16. What is the future dollar value of the dinar receipt using a money market hedge? A.$197,752 B.$201,602 C.$208,623 D.$210,629 答案：B 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk-Money market hedging. 难易程度：高
explanation_zh: 本题考查money market hedge的应用。 公司将在六个月后收到12 million dinars,运用money market hedge的逻辑为制造一笔六个月 后12 million dinars的应付账款，具体步骤为： Step 1: 现在向银行借 dinars, 使之六个月后连本带息恰好为12 million dinars, 因此借12 million dinars/(1+4.0%)=11,538,461.54 dinars Step 2: 将借出的11,538,461.54 dinars 在现货市场换为 dollar,11,538,461.54 dinars/(57.52 dinars per$1)=$200,599.12 Step 3: 将$200,599.12存入银行，六个月后价值$200,599.12*(1+0.5%)=$201,602。 Task 22 marks

stem_zh: 17. Indicate,by clicking on the relevant boxes,whether Park Co will find each of the following hedges to be effective or not effective in hedging the foreign currency risk of the two transactions. Leading the euro payment on its imported goods EFFECTIVE NOTEFFECTIVE Taking out a forward exchange contract on its future dinar receipt EFFECTIVE NOTEFFECTIVE Buying a tailor-made currency option for its future euro payment EFFECTIVE NOTEFFECTIVE 答案：Effective;Effective;Effective 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk -Leading and lagging;Forward exchange contracts;Main types of foreign currency derivatives 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 本题考查汇率风险对冲方式的选择是否有效。 描述一：(预计欧元即将升值时)对进口的产品提前支付欧元，有效； 描述二：针对未来的dinar 收入签订远期合同，有效； 描述三：针对未来的euro 支出签订一个定制的期权合同，有效。 Task32 marks 18 Which hedging methods willassist Park Co in reducing its overall foreign currency risk? (1)Taking out a long-term euro-denominated loan (2)Taking out a dinar-denominated overdraft A.1 only B.2 only DELIVERY-PLATINUM C.Both 1 and 2 D.Neither 1 nor 2 答案：B 知识点标签：Risk Management-Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk-Money market hedging. 难易程度：中 解析：本题考查汇率风险对冲方式的选择。 描述(1)错误，欧元的应付账款发生在三个月后，长期的欧元借款无法匹配，应选择短期的 欧元存款； 描述(2)正确，dinar 的应收账款发生在六个月后，短期的dinar 透支可以匹配。 Task42 marks

stem_zh: 19. Indicate,by clicking on the relevant boxes,whether the following statements are correct or incorrect? Purchasing power parity can be used to predict the forward exchange rate CORRECT INCORRECT The international Fishereffect can be used to predict the real interest rate CORRECT INCORRECT 答案：Incorrect;Incorrect 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations -Purchasing power parity theory. 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 本题考查汇率的相关理论。 描述(1)错误，purchasing power parity theory 是利用现货市场汇率预测将来的现货市场汇率， 无法预测远期汇率； 描述(2)错误，International Fisher Effects 讨论的是两个国家通过膨胀以及名义利率之间的关 系，无法预测实际汇率。 Task52 marks

stem_zh: 20. Which of the following statements is consistent with an upward-sloping yield curve? A.The risk of borrowers defaulting on their loans increases with the duration of the lending B.Liquidity preference theory implies that short-term interest rates contain a premium over long-term interest rates to compensate for lost liquidity C.Banks are reluctant to lend short-term,while government debt repayments have significantly increased the amount of long-term funds available D. The government has increased short-term interest rates in order to combat rising inflation in the economy 答案：A 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations -Structure of interest rates and yield curves. 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 本题考查向上收益率曲线的相关解释。 A 选项正确，借款方借款期越长违约风险越高，因此利率越高(以补偿风险),可以解释向上 的收益率曲线； B 选项错误， Liquidity preference theory 认为投资者偏好短期和流动性，因此长期投资需要 给予更高的利率来吸引投资； C 选项错误，政府债务的偿还大大增加了可用的长期资金，利率会下降，无法解释向上的收 益率曲线； D 选项错误，政府提高短期利率以对抗经济中不断上升的通货膨胀，无法解释向上的收益率 曲线。 The following scenario relates to the five questions(21-25)below Background The finance director of Coral Co has been asked to provide values for the company's equity and loan notes.Coral Co is a listed company and has the following long-term finance: $m Ordinary shares 7.8 7%Convertible loan notes 8.0 15.8 The ordinary shares of Coral Co have a nominal value of $0 ·25 per share and are currently trading on an ex dividend basis at $7·10 per share.An economic recovery has been forecast and so share proces are expected to grow by 8%per year for the foreseeable future. The loan notes are redeemable after six years at their nominal value of $100 per loan note,or can be converted after six years into 10 ordinary shares of Coral Co per loan note.The loan notes are traded on the capital market. The before-tax cost of debt of Coral Co is 5%and the company pays corporation tax of 20%per year. Task12 marks

stem_zh: 21. What is the equity market value of Coral Co (to two decimal places)? 答案：$221.52m 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares-Market capitalisation. 难易程度：低
explanation_zh: 本题考查股东权益市场价值的计算。 根据题意使用股票市场单价乘以股票数量进行计算，股票数量为$7.8 million/$0·25 per share=31.2 million, 再乘以$7 ·10 per share的单价可得$221.52m Task2 2marks

stem_zh: 22. Assuming conversion,what is the market value of each loan note of Coral Co? A.$110·13 B.$112·67 C.$119·58 D.$125·70 答案：C 知识点标签：Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Convertible debt 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 本题考查可转债市场价值的计算。 假设可转债到期时会转换为股票，根据题意，6年后(即可转债到期时)股票价格为$7 ·10 per share*(1+8%)^6=11.267 per share,10 只股票总价值为$112.67。 可转债市场价值为未来现金流折现，由利息和转换股票价值两部分组成，因此： Market value of each convertible bond=$7xAnnuity factor @5%,6 years+$112.67xPV @5%, 6 years=$7x 5.076+$112.67x0.746=$119·58。 Task32 marks

stem_zh: 23. Which of the following statements about the equity market value of Coral Co is/are true? (1)The equity market value will change frequently due to capital market forces (2)If the capital market is semi-strong form efficient,the equity market value will not be affected by the release to the public of insider information (3)Over time,the equity market value of Coral Co willfollow a random walk A.1 only B.1 and 3 only C.2 and 3 only D.1,2 and 3 答案：B 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis (EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares-Market capitalisation. 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: Y-PLATINUM 本题考查股东权益市场价值的理解。 (1)正确，由于资本市场的影响，股票价格会频繁变动，随之股东权益市场价值也会频繁 变动；(2)错误，如果资本市场是半强有效，股票价格已经反映了历史信息和所有的公开信 息，随着企业内部信息的公开(即新的公开信息出现),股票价格会相应产生反应而变化； (3)正确，由于股票价格在长期是随机游走的，随之股东权益市场价值也是随机游走的。 Task 42marks

stem_zh: 24. Indicate,by clicking on the relevant boxes,whether the following are assumptions that are made by the dividend growth model? Investors make rational decisions YES NO Dividends showeither constantgrowth or zero growth YES NO The dividendgrowth rate is less than the cost of equity YES NO 答案：Yes;Yes;Yes 知识点标签：Business valuations-Models for the valuation of shares -Dividend valuation model and the dividend growth model 难易程度：低
explanation_zh: 描述一投资者会做出理智的决策，描述二股息具有恒定的增长率或不增长，以及描述 三股息增长率小于股本成本都是dividend growth model 的假设。

stem_zh: 25. Why might valuations ofthe equity and loan notes of Coral Co be necessary? (1)The company is planning to go to the market for additional finance (2)The securities need to be valued for corporate taxation purposes (3)The company has received a takeover bid from arival company A.1 and 2 only B.1 and 3 only C.3 only D.1,2 and 3 答案：B 知识点标签：Business valuations -Nature and purpose of the valuation of business and financial assets -Reasons for valuation 难易程度：低 解 析 ：描述(1)企业计划去市场上获取更多资金以及描述(3)竞争公司计划收购并给出了意愿 价格都需要对股权和债券进行估值来获取企业的价值是多少；描述(2)企业税由利润决定， 与有价证券的估值无关。 The following scenario relates to the five questions(26-30)below Background ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUMLink Co has been prevented by the competition authorities from buying a competitor,Twist Co,on the basis that this prevents a monopoly position arising.Link Co has therefore decided to expand existing business operations instead and as a result the finance director has prepared the following evaluation of a proposed investment project for the company: ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM $'000 Present value of sales revenue 6,657 Present value of variable costs (2,777) Present value of contribution 3,880 Present value of fixed costs (1,569) Present value of operating cash flow 2,311 Initial capital investment (1,800) Net present value 511 The project life is expected to be four years and the finance director has used a discount rate of 10%in the evaluation.The investment project has no scrap value. The finance director is considering financing the investment project by a new issue of debt. Task12 marks

26. What is the change in sales volume which will make the NPV zero? A.7·7% B.13·2% C.18·4% D.22·1% 答案：B 知识点标签： Investment appraisal -Adjusting for risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal- Sensitivity analysis 难易程度：低
explanation_zh: 本题求销售量变化百分之多少NPV 会变为零，即求销售量的敏感性。销售量的敏感 性计算公式为：NPV/present value of contribution=$511/$3,880=13.2%。 Task22 marks

stem_zh: 27. Which of the following statements relating to sensitivity analysis is/are correct? (1)Although critical factors may be identified,the management of Link Co may have no control over them (2)A weakness of sensitivity analysis is that it ignores interdependency between project variables (3)Sensitivity analysis can be used by Link Co to assess the risk of an investment project A.1 and 2 only B.1 only C.2 and 3 only D.1,2 and 3 答案：A 知识点标签： Investment appraisal-Adjusting for risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal- Sensitivity analysis 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 描述(1)正确，尽管敏感性分析可以识别出企业运营的关键因素，但企业管理层可能 不能控制它们，例如在完美竞争市场，产品价格是由市场决定的，企业无法控制和改变产品 的售价； 描述(2)正确，敏感性分析每次分析时只考虑一个变量的变化，因此会忽略变量之间的关联 性 ； 描述(3)错误，risk(风险)的概念为能够在事前知道事情可能的结果以及每种结果的发生的概 率，敏感性分析中不考虑概率因此无法分析项目风险。 Task 32 marks

stem_zh: 28. Using the average investment method and assuming operating cash flows of $729,000 per year, what is the return on capital employed of the investment project?
options_zh: ["B. 28% C.31% D.64% 答案：C 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques-Return on capital employed (accounting rate of return) 难易程度：中"]
explanation_zh: 本题考查ROCE 的计算。 公式为：ROCE=(Estimated average annual accounting profits)(Estimated average investment)* 100%。题干给出的$729,000是annual operating cash flows, 需要先转换为average annual accounting profits,方法为扣减去折旧。根据题意，初始投资$1,800,000,项目持续四年并且 没有残值，因此折旧为($1,800,000-0)/4=$450,000,因此average annual accounting profits为 $729,000-$450,000=$279,000。 本题要求使用average investment 进行计算，为($1,800,000+0)/2=$900,000。 因此ROCE=$279,000/$900,000*100%=31%。 Task 4 2marks

stem_zh: 29. Which of the following statements relating to debt finance is correct? A.Link Co can issue long-term debt in the euro currency markets B.The interest rate which Link Co pays on its new issue of debt will depend on its weighted average cost of capital C.A new issue of loan notes by Link Co will take place in the primary market D.Link Co will not be able to issue new debt without offering non-current assets as security 答案：C 知识点标签：Business finance -Sources of,and raising,business finance -Range of short-term finance;Range of long-term finance 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 本题考查债权融资相关概念。 A 选项错误，euro currency markets 指的是 Eurocurrency money market, 只能用于进行短期融 资，通常为三个月； B 选项错误，weighted average cost of capital加权平均融资成本同时考虑了股权融资和债券融 资的成本，不用于决定发行债券的利率； C 选项正确，有价证券的首次发行发生在primary market 一级市场； D 选项错误，企业可发行有抵押债券和无抵押债券。 Task52 marks

stem_zh: 30. Which of the following statements relating to competition policy is/are correct? (1)Scale economies are an advantage of monopoly and oligopoly (2)Social costs or externalities are an example of economic inefficiency arising from market failure (3)Monopoly is discouraged because it can lead to inefficiency and excessive profits A.1 and 2 only B.3 only C.2 and 3 only D.1,2 and 3 答案：D 知识点标签： Financial management environment -The economic environment for business- Competition policy 难易程度：低
explanation_zh: 本题考查竞争政策。 描述(1)正确，企业达到垄断或寡头即占据了大部分市场份额，因此可以达到大量生产从而 实线规模经济效益； 描述(2)正确，Social costs or externalities 隶属于市场失灵的表现； 描述(3)正确，垄断需要被限制因为会造成市场失效以及垄断企业的过高收益。 Section C-ALL the 2 questions are compulsory and MUST be attempted 2016DQ31 本题核心知识点：Business finance (a)Calculate the market value weighted average cost of capital of Gadner Co.(11 marks) 题目类型：Excel 官方答案： 得分标准： Cost of equity 2 Cost of preference shares 1 After-tax loan note interest cost 1 Setting up ka calculation 1 After-tax ka of loan notes 1 Cost of debt of bank loan 1 Market value of equity 0.5 Market value of preference shares 0.5 Market value of loan notes 0.5 Total market value of sources of finance 0.5 Calculation of WACC 2 11 知识点标签：Business finance-Estimating the cost of capital-Calculation of WACC 难易程度：中 解 析： 以下是对官方答案的思路解析，可供同学参考： 题目要求计算以融资的市值为权重的加权平均资本成本。整个计算可以分成三步。第一步， 计算每一种融资方式的成本；第二步，计算每一种融资方式的总市值；第三步，计算以融资 的市值为权重的加权平均资本成本。 第一步，计算每一种融资方式的成本。先找出企业的融资方式，分别是ordinary shares, preference shares,loan notes,bank loan。 权益成本的计算：由于题目明确给出equity beta, 意味着使用CAPM 计算权益成本Ke 。Ke= Rf+(Rm-Rf)*beta 。 假设短期国债的回报率4%为无风险回报率，权益风险溢价 equity risk premium=Rm-Rf=5.6% 。 使用CAPM,Ke=4%+5.6%*1.25=11%。 优先股成本的计算：Kp=D/Po, 优先股每股股息(D)= 优先股每股面值*票面股息率=0.5*10% =0.05。优先股市值为$0.55,优先股成本Kp=0.05/0.55=9.1%。 可赎回债券税后成本的计算：可赎回债券税后成本等于债券的市值、未来的税后利息和赎金 的 IRR 。根据题目，债券在6年后以5%的溢价，也就是$105赎回。对应的现金流如下，0 时刻市值-108.29,1-6年税后利息100*8%*(1-20%)=6.4,第6年赎金100*(1+5%)=105。 任意选择两个折现率，算出对应的两个NPV, 计算出IRR。可赎回债券税后成本就等于算 出的IRR 。提醒一下，官方答案选择5%和6%两个折现率，算出的IRR 为5.5%。我们也可 以选择任意两个其它的折现率计算对应的IRR, 计算出来的结果和官方答案会有差异，但是 ACCA 考试是会容许这个误差存在的。大家放心计算就是了。 银行贷款税后成本的计算：Kdat=coupon rate*(1-tax rate)=7%*(1-20%)=5.6%。 第二步，计算每一种融资方式的总市值。先找出企业的融资方式，分别是ordinary shares, preference shares,loan notes,bank loan。 权益总市值的计算：MV of equity=No of shares*share price。股票的总数量=股票总面值/每 股面值=8000/0.2=40000。每股市值为$6.35,权益总市值=40000*6.35=254000。 优先股总市值的计算：MV of preference share=No of shares*preference share price。股票的总 数量=股票总面值/每股面值=2000/0.5=4000。每股市值为$0.55,优先股总市值= 4000*0.55=2200。 可赎回债券总市值的计算：MV of redeemable loan notes=No of bonds*market value per bond。 债券的总数量=债券总面值/每份债券的面值=6000/100=60。每份债券的市值为$108.29,可 赎回债券总市值=60*108.29=6497。 银行贷款的总市值=银行贷款的总面值=2000 所有融资的总市值为254000+2200+6497+2000=264697。 第三步 ， 计算以融资的市值为权重的加权平均资本成本 。 加权平均资本成本 =11%*254000/264697+9.1%*2200/264697+5.5%*6497/264697+5.6%*2000/264697 = (11%*254000+9.1%*2200+5.5%*6497+5.6%*2000)/264697=10.8%。 (b)Explain the meaning of the terms business risk and financial risk .(4 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： 得分标准： Nature of business risk 2 Nature of financial risk 2 4 知识点标签：Business finance-Sources of finance and their relative costs -Circumstances under which WACC can be used in investment appraisal 难易程度：中 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路解析，可供同学参考： 题目要求讨论商业风险和财务风险的含义。讨论从两方面进行。第一，含义。第二，衡量方 式 。 商业风险与企业在运营对股东回报的影响有关。商业风险可以通过营运杠杆量度。营运杠杆 等于毛利润(contribution)除以息税前利润(PBIT)。 商业风险既不会受到企业的融资方式， 也不会受到企业的资本结构影响。 财务风险与企业的融资或资本结构对股东回报的影响有关。财务风险可以通过财务杠杆 (D/E ratio)、利率保证倍数衡量。 商业风险和财务风险构成了企业的总风险。 (c)Discuss the key features of a rights issue as a way of raising equity finance.(5 marks) (20 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： 得分标准： One mark per relevant point 5 知识点标签：Business finance-Sources of,and raising,business finance-Methods of raising equity finance 难易程度： 高 解 析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 配股是企业的权益融资的一种方式。题目要求讨论配股的主要特点。配股有以下的特点，回 答当中的五个就可以得满分。

stem_zh: 6. 承销。为了确保企业获得所需资金，配股往往的通过承销的方式发行。当前股东没有认 购的股票将会被承销商认购。承销商会收取一定的承销费用。 2016D Q32 本题核心知识点： Investment appraisal (a) Calculate the net present value of the investment project and comment on its financial acceptability.(8 marks) 题目类型：Excel 官方答案： 得分标准： Inflated sales revenue 1 Inflated variable cost 1 Tax liabilities O 1 Tax-allowable depreciation benefits years 1-3 1 Tax-allowable depreciation benefit year 4 1 Timing of tax liabilities and depreciation benefits 1 Calculation of present values 1 Comment on financial acceptability 1 8 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques -Net present value 难易程度：中 解 析： 以 下是对官方答案的思路解析，可供同学参考： 计 算NPV 可以分为三个步骤。第一步，寻找相关现金流；第二步，确定折现率；第三步， 计算现金流的净现值。 第一步，寻找相关现金流。相关现金流为sales revenue,variable cost,fixed cost,taxation,initial investment(expansion cost 投资到固定资产的成本)。由于这些相关现金流的通胀率不一致， 需要使用nominal approach 计 算NPV, 即 把selling price,variable cost 调整为名义现金流， 具体的做法为，第n 年 的nominal selling price =current selling price*(1+inflation rate)"=3.1* ( 1 + 3 % ) , 第n 年 的 unit nominal variable cost=current unit variable cost*(1+inflation rate)"= 1.1*(1+6%)”,n=1,2,3,4.1 至 4 年 每 年 的Sales revenue=nominal selling price *sales volume, 1 至 4 年 每 年 的variable cost=unit nominal variable cost*sales volume。 题目给出的fixed cost 的值已经是nominal fixed cost,无需调整，直接使用即可。 Taxation 由两部分组成。1.使用每年的taxable cash flow*tax rate(20%)计算出来的值，2.固 定资产的税务允许的折旧 (TAD) 带来的税务节省TAD tax benefit。具体的计算如下：1至 3 年 的TAD= 每年固定资产的期初余额*折旧率，第4年的 TAD= 第4年固定资产的期初 余 额 - 残 值 。 1 至 4 年 的TAD 的计算依次如下：3200*25%=800;(3200-800)*25%=600; (3200-800-600)*25%=450;(3200-800-600-450)-0=1350。每年的TAD tax benefit= 每 年的TAD*税率，1至4年的TAD 对应的tax benefit的计算依次如下：800*20%=160;600*20% =120;450*20%=90;1350*20%=270。要注意的是由于延后一年交税，所以taxation 和 TAD tax benefit 产生的时间为2至5年。 Initial investment 就是题目中的expansion cost $3.2 million。 第二步，确定折现率。折现率为after tax weighted average cost of capital 10%。 第三步，计算现金流的净现值。每年现金流现值=每年的after tax cash flow* 折现率为10% 对应的现值系数。查现值表，可以找到1至4年的现值系数。把1至4年的现金流现值相加， 然后减去initial investment,就可以得出项目的净现值NPV。 评论：净现值NPV 为正数，这个项目在财务上可接受。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLA (b)Determine the net present value of the optimum investment schedule for Delta Division. (3 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： 得分标准： Calculating profitability indexes 1 Formulating optimum investment schedule 1 NPV of optimum investment schedule 1 3 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Specific investment decisions (Lease or buy,asset replacement,capital rationing)-Profitability indexes for divisible investment projects 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 以下是对官方答案的思路解析，可供同学参考： 题目指出可用作投资的资金限制在$7m, 项目都是可分拆的，其中项目C 和项目E 互斥， 也就是不能够同时选择项目C 和项目E。 首先，计算每个项目的盈利能力指数profitability index(PI)=NPV/initial investment; 然后 根据PI 由高到低排序，筛选出可启动的项目依次是D,A,E,B, 要注意的是，虽然C 项 目 的PI 比 B 项目要高，但是E 和 C 是不能同时选择的，所以就把项目C 排除在外。启动了 项目D,A,E 后只剩下资金$1m, 然而要启动整个B 项目总共需要$2m, 但因为项目是可 以分拆的，所以选择启动1m/2m=50%的项目B, 得到50%的B 项目的NPV 。把项目D,A, E 全部的NPV 和项目B 50%的 NPV 累加，算出的就是最佳投资规划的净现值NPV。 (c)Discuss the reasons why hard and soft capital rationing occur.(5 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： 得分标准： Soft capital rationing 2 Hard capital rationing 2 Additional detail 1 5 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Specific investment decisions(Lease or buy,asset replacement,capital rationing)-The reasons for capital rationing 难易程度：中 解 析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 题目要求讨论硬性资本限制和软性资本限制的原因。讨论可以围绕两方面进行，第一，资本 限制的分类；第二，硬性资本限制和软性资本限制产生的原因。 资本限制可以分为硬性资本限制和软性资本限制。分类的标准如下：由外部原因导致的资本 限制属于硬性资本限制；由内部原因导致的资本限制属于软性资本限制。 软性资本限制，也就是企业由能力获得融资，但是企业不愿意去融资，所以出现了资本限制。 企业不愿意去融资的原因包括：1.企业对未来的利润比较悲观，如果是债务融资的话，以 后就需要支付利息，而企业不愿意支付这些利息；2.如果是权益融资，企业的股票数量就 是增加，每股收益(EPS=PAT/No of share)就会下降，同时当前股东的拥有权和控制权会被稀 释，这是企业不愿意看到的；3.企业追求的是有控制的成长，而不是快速成长，所以会限 制投资；4.如果企业面临未来现金流不确定，企业会限制投资，只选择有竞争性的，也就 是盈利能力高的项目。 硬性资本限制，也就是投资者不愿意投资到企业中，企业无法获得融资，所以出现了资本限 制。投资者不愿意投资到企业中的原因包括：1.投资者可能认为这个企业的风险过高，比 如说这个企业的财务杠杆过高，或者是业绩很糟糕，或者是预期未来的盈利和现金流很糟糕；

stem_zh: 2. 国家或者全球的经济都十分低迷，或者是发生了银行信贷危机，这种情况下企业很难获 得长期的融资。 (d)Discuss TWO ways in which the risk of an investment project can be assessed.(4 marks) (20 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： 得分标准： Risk assessment method 1 2 Risk assessment method 2 2 4 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Adjusting for risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal- Probability analysis &Risk-adjusted discount rates 难易程度： 高
explanation_zh: 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 投资项目的风险可以通过概率分析 (probability analysis)和资本资产定价模型 (CAPM) 分析。 probability analysis概率分析是通过给预测的项目结果配置一个对应的概率来评估或者量化 项目风险的。对于整个项目而言，根据不同的经济状态预测两个或更多的可能结果，同时预 估这些结果发生的概率。不同的经济状态下项目关键变量可能会产生不同的价值。 对应单一的项目变量而言，变量价值的概率分布可以通过专家的分析得到。概率分布和变量 间的关系可以通过模拟模型分析。模拟模型可以生成项目所有可能的净现值的概率分布曲线。 项目的风险可以通过项目的净现值的标准偏差衡量。 资本资产定价模型 (CAPM) 分析：投资项目的系统商业风险可以通过分析同行业的有代表 性的公司的商业风险获得。 equity beta反映是公司的系统商业风险和系统财务风险，而asset beta 只反映公司的系统商业风险。对代表公司的equity beta 去杠杆可以计算出这个公司的 asset beta。代表公司的系统商业风险就是投资项目的系统商业风险。接着，使用投资公司的 杠杆对项目的asset beta 加杠杆，从而求出既反映项目的投资项目的系统商业风险，也反映 项目的系统财务风险的风险系数equity beta。

stem_zh: SectionA-ALL15 questions are compulsory and MUST be attempted

1. The owners of a private company wish to dispose of their entire investment in the company.The company has an issued share capital of $1m of $0·50 nominal value ordinary shares.The owners have made the following valuations ofthe company's assets and liabilities. Non-current assets(book value) $30m Current assets $18m Non-current liabilities $12m Current liabilities $10m The net realisable value of the non-current assets exceeds their book value by $4m.The current assets include $2m of accounts receivable which are thought to be irrecoverable. What is the minimum price per share which the owners should accept for the company? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.$14 B.$25 C.$28 D.$13 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察基于资产的估值法的计算，要求选择正确的选项。 根据公式基于资产的估值法中，权益的价值等于总资产的价值减去总负债的价值。根据题 目中第一句话的信息，企业想要处置整个公司可以判断出需要用的数据是可实现净值。因 此根据题目关于可实现净值的信息的描述，固定资产可实现净值需要在账面价值的基础上 调增$4m., 流动资产中$2m 是坏账收不回来，因此需要调减，调整之后，用总资产的可实 现净值减去总负债的账面净值就可以等到总权益的价值。由于题目中，问的是每一只股票 的价值，因此再除以股数就可以算出最终每一只股票的价值。因此公司可以接受的最低的 价值是：NRV:(30m+18m+4m-2m-12m-10m)/2m=$14 per share 综上，答案选 A。 知识点标签：Business valuations-Models for the valuation of shares-Net realisable value basis. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 2. Which of the following financial instruments will NOT be traded on a money market? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.Commercial paper B.Convertible loan notes C.Treasury bills D.Certificates of deposit 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察对现货市场上金融工具的理解。 题目中要求选出选项中哪一个不属于现货市场上的金融工具。现货市场上金融工具主要的 特征是到期时间小于一年。因此选项中A 商业票据，C国债，D存单凭证都是短期的现货市 场上的金融工具，只有B 可转债是长期的资本市场上的金融工具. 综上，答案选B。 知识点标签：Financial management environment-The nature and role of money market-Role of banks and other financial institutions. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 3. Andrew Co is a large listed company financed by both equity and debt. In which of the following areas of financial management will the impact of working capital management be smallest? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.Liquidity management B.Interest rate management C.Management of relationship with the bank D.Dividend policy 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对营运资本的理解。 题目中要求选出选项中的领域哪一个受到营运资本的影响是最小的。营运资本是短期的资 本的管理.因此，会影响选项中A 流动性水平的管理，B 借款利率，C与银行之间的关系也会 影响借款利率。因此，D 股利政策，相较于其他三个选项受到的影响是最小的。 综上，答案选D。 知识点标签： Working capital management-Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 4. Which of the following are descriptions of basis risk? (1)It is the difference between the spot exchange rate and currency futures exchange rate (2)It is the possibility that the movements in the currency futures price and spot price will be different (3)It is the difference between fixed and floating interest rates (4)It is one of the reasons for an imperfect currency futures hedge 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A1 B1 only and 3 C2 and 4 only D2,3 and 4 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对基差风险的了解。 (1):描述的是基差，而不是基差风险。所以选项错误 (2):描述的是基差风险，基本差风险指的是现货市场上金融工具价格与期货市场上金融 工具价格的不同所造成的风险。选项正确。 (3):基差风险与固定利率和浮动利率没有关系。所以选项错误。 (4):基差风险是造成期货市场上金融工具没有办法进行完美对冲的原因之一。选项正确。 综上，答案选 C。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk -Main types of foreign currency derivatives. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 5. Crag Co has sales of $200m per year and the gross profit margin is 40%.Finished goods inventory days vary throughout the year within the following range: Maximum Minimum Inventory(days) 120 90 All purchases and sales are made on a cash basis and no inventory of raw materials or work in progress is carried. Crag Co intends to finance permanent current assets with equity and fluctuating current assets with its overdraft. In relation to finished goods inventory and assuming a 360-day year,how much finance will be needed from the overdraft? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$10m B$17m C $30m D$40m 答案：A
explanation_zh: 本题考察的是对营运资本的融资政策计算的掌握。 题目中要求的是有多少融资是依靠透支完成的。题目中给出了一年内平均最低存货的在库 天数，这部分对应的存货的量，因为长期留在企业内部，因此属于永久性流动资产。同时 题目中给出了一年内平均最高的存货的在库天数，这部分对应的存货的量减去之前长期留 在企业内部最低的存货的量，就可以算出一年内流动的平均存货的量，而这部分存货就是 暂时性流动资产。根据题目中的描述，只有暂时性流动资产是依靠透支完成的。因此需要 求出的就是暂时性流动资产的量。 $200mx30/360x0·6=$10m 综上，答案选A。 知识点标签： Working capital management -Determining working capital needs and funding strategies-Key factors in determining working capital funding strategies 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 6. In relation to an irredeemable security paying a fixed rate of interest,which of the following statements is correct? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A As risk rises,the market value of the security will fall to ensure that investors receive an increased yield B As risk rises,the market value of the security will fall to ensure that investors receive a reduced yield C As risk rises,the market value of the security will rise to ensure that investors receive an increased yield D As risk rises,the market value of the security will rise to ensure that investors receive a reduced yield 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对不可赎回债券公式的理解. 根据不可赎回债券的公式，不可赎回债券的市场价值等于投资者可以收到的利息比上投资 者所要求的回报率。当投资者可以收到的利息是固定不变的时候，随着风险的增加，投资 者会要求更高的投资回报率。为了确保投资就可以收到更高的投资回报率，债券的市场价 值会相对下降。 综上，答案选A。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations-The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Irredeemable debt. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 7. Pop Co is switching from using mainly long-term fixed rate finance to fund its working capital to using mainly short-term variable rate finance. Which of the following statements about the change in Pop Co's working capital financing policy is true? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A Finance costs will increase B Re-financing risk will increase C Interest rate risk willdecrease D Overcapitalisation risk will decrease 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察对营运资本融资政策的理解。 题目中要求选出关于营运资本融资政策的变化中哪一个描述是正确的。从题目信息中，可 以得知企业是从长期融资转为短期融资，因此。 A短期融资比较便宜，选项错误。 B 对于短期融资来说，续借风险比较高。选项正确。 C 利率风险受到会经济因素影响，不一定。选项错误。 D 资本化过度是由于营运资本投资政策所导致的与信息无关。选项错误。 综上，答案选B。 知识点标签：Working capital management -Determining Nature and role of money and capital markets 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 8. In relation to an operating lease,which of the following statements is correct? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A All the risks and rewards ofownership transfer to the lessee B The asset and lease obligation will be recorded in the statement of financial position C The lease period will cover almost all of the leased asset's useful economic life D The lessor will be responsible for repairs and maintenance of the leased asset 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是关于经营租赁的理解。 本题要求选出下面关于经营租赁的描述哪一个是正确的。 A: 在经营租赁下，资产的所有权，相关的风险和收益，仍然是属于出租方所有。因此， 选项错误。 B: 经营租赁中租赁相关的成本并不计入其资产负债表中。因此，选项错误。 C: 经营租赁通常情况下都是短期租赁。因此，选项错误。 D: 经营租赁下所有权归出租方所有，因此维修等费用都由出租方来承担。因此，选项正 确。 综上，答案选D。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Investment appraisal -Specific investment decisions(Lease or buy,asset replacement,capital rationing)-Leasing and borrowing to buy 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 9. A company has annual after-tax cash flows of $2 million per year which are expected to continue in perpetuity.The company has a cost of equity of 10%,a before-tax cost of debt of 5%and an after-tax weighted average cost of capital of8%per year.Corporation tax is 20%. What is the theoretical value of the company? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$20m B$40m C $50m D$25m 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察估值中折现率的选择。 本题中要求的是估计整个公司的价值，因此在折现率的选择中应该选择反映整个公司资金 融资成本的WACC 。 根据题目信息，企业每年都可以获得$2m 的现金流，并且可以永远获 得下去，因此可以借助永续年金的公式去进行估值。 Theoretical value=2m/0·08=$25m 综上，答案选D。 知识点标签： Business finance -Sources of,and raising,business finance -Methods of raising equity finance 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 10. Which of the following would you 分值：2 题目类型：单选 expect to be the responsibility of financial management? A Producing annual accounts B Producing monthly management accounts CAdvising on investment in non-current assets D Deciding pay rates for staff 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察对财务管理定义的理解。 题目中要求选出下列哪些是属于财务管理的内容 A 编制财务账户并不属于财务管理的内容。选项错误。 B 编制月度管理账户不属于财务管理的内容。选项错误。 C 投资固定资产属于财务管理中投资相关的内容。选项正确。 D 决定员工工资不属于财务管理的内容。选项错误。 综上，答案选C。 知识点标签： Financial management function -The nature and purpose of financial management -Nature and purpose of financial management 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 11. Lane Co has in issue 3%convertible loan notes which are redeemable in five years'time at their nominal value of $100 per loan note.Alternatively,each loan note can be converted in five years' time into 25 Lane Co ordinary shares. The current share price of Lane Co is $3·60 per share and future share price growth is expected to be 5%per year.The before-tax cost of debt of these loan notes is 10%and corporation tax is 30%. What is the current market value of a Lane Co convertible loan note? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$82·71 B$73·47 C $67·26 D$94·20 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察可转换债券的市场价值的计算。 可转换债券市场价值的计算是将未来投资者可以收到的所有的现金流全部折现。因此第一 步首先要确认的是未来的转换价格，在债务类赎回和转换成企业权益这两者中选择较高的 作为赎回价格。 Conversion value=3 ·60x1 ·055x25=$114 ·87 再将未来收到的所有的现金流全部都折现，算出市场价值 Discounting at 10%,loan note value=(3×3·791)+(114·87×0·621)=$82·71 综上，答案选D。 知识点标签： Business valuations-The valuation of debt and other financial assets-Convertible debt 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 12. Country X uses the dollar as its currency and country Y uses the dinar.Country X's expected inflation rate is 5%per year,compared to 2%per year in country Y.Country Y's nominal interest rate is 4%per year and the current spot exchange rate between the two countries is 1·5000 dinar per $1. According to the four-way equivalence model,which of the following statements is/are true? (1)Country X's nominal interest rate should be 7·06%per year (2)The future (expected)spot rate after one year should be 1·4571 dinar per $1 (3)Country X's real interest rate should be higher than that of country Y 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A1 only B 1 and 2 only C2 and 3 only D1,2 and 3 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察四恒等式模型中公式的应用。。 题目中要求根据四恒等式模型判断下列描述是否正确。 (1):题目中，要求X 国家的名义利率，因此可以根据国际费雪效应的公式求出。 (1·04x1·05/1·02)-1=7·06% 。 选项正确 (2):题目中要求1年之后现货市场上的即期汇率。因此，可以用PPPT 公式求出。 1·5 dinar x1·02/1·05=1·4571 dinar/$。选项正确 (3):题目中要求对比两个国家之间的实际利率，在国际费雪效应下，任何国家的实际利 率都是相等的。选项错误。 综上，答案选B。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations -Four-way equivalence 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 13. Which of the following government actions would lead to an increase in aggregate demand? (1)Increasing taxation and keeping government expenditure the same (2)Decreasing taxation and increasing government expenditure (3)Decreasing money supply (4)Decreasing interest rates 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A1only B1 and 3 C2 and 4 only D 2,3 and 4 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察宏观经济政策中财政政策和货币政策的应用。 题目中要求选出下列政府的哪些行为，可以提高总需求。 (1):政府提高税收，会导致可支配收入减少，市场上的总需求降低。选项错误。 (2):降低税收会导致可支配收入增加，增加市场总需求。同时提高政府花费，也会增加 市场总需求。选项正确。 (3):降低市面上的货币供给量会减少总需求。所以选项错误。 (4):降低利率，更多的钱会从银行里拿出来流入市场，增加总需求。选项正确。 综上，答案选 C。 知识点标签： Financial management environment -The economic environment for business - Role of fiscal,monetary,interest rate and exchange rate policies 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 14. Peach Co's latest results are as follows: $000 Profit before interest and taxation 2,500 Profit before taxation 2,250 Profit after tax 1,400 In addition,extracts from its latest statement of financial position are as follows: EquityNon-current liabilities$000 10,000 2,500 Equity Non-current liabilities What is Peach Co's return on capital employed (ROCE)? PLATINUM 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A14% B 18% C20% D 25% 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察投资回报率的计算。 本题考察投资回报率的计算，根据投资回报率的公式，分子应该用的是息税前利润，分母 用的是资本的雇佣。根据题目的数据信息，结合ROCE 的公式，可以得出： ROCE=Operating profit/(D+E)=100x2,500/(10,000+2,500)=20% 综上，答案选C。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Investment appraisal -Investment appraisal techniques -Return on capital employed(accounting rate of return). 难易程度： 低

stem_zh: 15. Drumlin Co has $5m of $0·50 nominal value ordinary shares in issue.It recently announced a 1 for 4 rights issue at $6 per share.Its share price on the announcement of the rights issue was $8 per share. What is the theoretical value of a right per existing share? 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$1·60 B $0·40 C $0·50 D$1·50 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察供股中关于理论上除权价格相关的计算。 题目中要求计算每一股原始股所对应的一个权利的价值。因此需要先算出每股股票发行后 理论上除权价格，可以用发行之后股票的价格除以总的数量，算出每股的除权价。在减去 每股认购时的认购成本。即可得出value of aright。但由于每拥有4股原始股，才可以认购 一股供股，因此 Value of a right =(5m x$8+1-25m x $6)/6·25m-$6)/4 shares=$0·4 per share 综上，答案选B。 知识点标签： Business finance-Sources of,and raising,business finance-Methods of raising equity finance 难易程度：中 Section B-ALL15 questions are compulsory and MUST be attempted The following scenario relates to the five questions (16-20)below Background Herd Co is based in a country whose currency is the dollar($).The company expects to receive E1,500,000 in six months’time from Find Co,a foreign customer.The finance director of Herd Co is concerned that the euro()may depreciate against the dollar before the foreign customer makes payment and she is looking at hedging the receipt. Herd Co has in issue loan notes with a total nominal value of $4 million which can be redeemed in 10 years'time.The interest paid on the loan notes is at a variable rate linked to LIBOR.The finance director of Herd Co believes that interest rates may increase in the near future. The spot exchange rate is E1·543 per $1.The domestic short-term interest rate is 2%per year, while the foreign short-term interest rate is 5%per year. Task12 marks 16.What is the six-month forward exchange rate predicted by interest rate parity? AC1·499 per$1 BC1520 per $1 Ce1566 per $1 DE1·588 per $1 答案：C 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations -Interest rate parity. 难易程度：高 解析：题目考察利率平价理论公式的计算。 本题需要根据题目信息，利用利率平价理论，要求出六个月的远期利率水平。根据现货市 场上的汇率水平C1-543 per $1。以及欧元短期利率水平每年2%。美元短期的利率水平，每 年5%。带入利率平价理论的公式即可得出远期利率。 Forward rate=1543x(1·025/1·01)=€1·566 per$1 综上，答案选C。 Task 22 marks 17.As regards the euro receipt,what is the primary nature of the risk faced by Herd Co? A Transaction risk B Economic risk C Translation risk D Business risk JLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 答案：A 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -The nature and types of risk and approaches to risk management. 难易程度：低 解析：题目考察外汇风险概念的理解。 A交易风险是由于发生海外采购或者销售交易行为所产生的风险，因此，销售到欧洲产生 欧元的应收账款，属于交易风险。选项正确。 B经济风险，与宏观经济政策有关。选项错误。 C 转换风险，与母子公司之间报表数据转换所产生的账面上的风险。选项错误。 D 经营风险与行业性质有关。选项错误 综上，答案选A。 Task32 marks 18.Which of the following hedging methods will NOT be suitable for hedging the euro receipt? A Forward exchange contract B Money market hedge C Currency futures D Currency swap 答案：D 知识点标签：Risk Management -Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk. 难易程度：低 解析：题目考察外汇风险概念的理解。 题目要求选出针对外汇欧元的应收账款，下列选项中哪些规避风险的方式是不合适的。 A远期合约可以用来规避短期的外币应收账款。选项合适。 B 现货市场上的规避方式也可以用来规避短期外币的应收账款。选项合适。 C 期货合约可以用来规避短期的外币应收账款的风险。选项合适。 D 互换一般用于规避中长期的风险，不适合用于一次性的，短期的交易风险的规避。选项 不合适。 综上，答案D。 Task 42marks 19.Which of the following statements support the finance director's belief that the euro will depreciate against the dollar? (1)The dollar inflation rate is greater than the euro inflation rate (2)The dollar nominal interest rate is less than the euro nominal interest rate A1 only B2 only C Both 1 and 2 D Neither 1 nor 2 答案：B 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations-Purchasing power parity. 难易程度：中 解析：题目考察购买力平价理论和利率平价理论的应用。 题目要求选出下列哪一项的描述是支持欧元相对于美元贬值。 (1):当美元的通货膨胀率高于欧元的通货膨胀率，根据购买力平价理论，可以推出欧元 相对于美元升值。选项错误。 (2):当美元的名义利率低于欧元的名义利率，根据利率平价理论，欧元相对于美元贬值。 选项正确。 综上，答案选B。 Task 52marks 20.As regards the interest rate risk faced by Herd Co,which of the following statements is correct? A In exchange for a premium,Herd Co could hedge its interest rate risk by buying interest rate options B Buying a floor will give Herd Co a hedge against interest rate increases C Herd Co can hedge its interest rate risk by buying interest rate futures now in order to sellthem at a future date D Taking out a variable rate overdraft will allow Herd Co to hedge the interest rate risk through matching 答案：A 知识点标签：Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk. 难易程度：高 解析：题目考察关于利率风险的规避方式的理解和应用。 题目要求选出对于Herd 公司当前所所面临的利率风险，下列哪一个选项的描述是正确的。 A 对于当前所面临的利率风险，可以选择购买利率期权去进行风险的规避。选项正确。 B Herd Co担心利率上涨，应该购买都是利率期权的上限Cap, 而不是下限floor 。选项错 误。 C 担心利率上涨，应该是做空头Short Future, 而不是做多头Long Future。选项错误。 D 预测未来利率会上涨，因此规避风险的时候应该选择的是固定利率而不是可浮动的利率。 综上，答案选A。 The following scenario relates to the five questions(21-25)below Background Ring Co has in issue ordinary shares with a nominal value of $0·25 per share.These shares are traded on an efficient capital market.It is now 20X6 and the company has just paid a dividend of $0·450 per share. Recent dividends ofthe company are as follows: Year 20X6 20X5 20X4 20X3 20X2 Dividend per share $0·450 $0·428 $0·408 $0·389 $0·370 Ring Co also has in issue loan notes which are redeemable in seven years'time at their nominal value of$100 per loan note and which pay interest of 6%per year. The finance director of Ring Co wishes to determine the value of the company. Ring Co has a cost of equity of 10%per year and a before-tax cost of debt of 4%per year.The company pays corporation tax of25%per year. Task12marks 21.Using the dividend growth model,what is the market value of each ordinary share? A$8·59 B$9·00 C$9·45 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM D$7·77 答案：C 知识点标签： Business valuations -Models for the valuation of shares -Dividend valuation model and the dividend growth model. 难易程度：中 解析：题目考察利用股利估价模型对普通股股票的市场价值进行估值。。 根据题目信息，结合股利股价模型公式中的变量，可以判断股利每年都是有增长的，因此 需要先算出股利每年的增长率。 Historical dividend growth rate =100x((0·450/0·370)0·25-1)=5% 根据题目信息，找出当前每股的股利是$0 ·450 per share., 权益类投资者所要求的投资回报 率是10%,将所得数据带入公式。 Share price=(0·450x1·05)(0·1-0·05)=$9·45 综上，答案选C。 Task22 marks 22.What is the market value of each loan note? A$109·34 B$112·01 C$116·57 D$118·68 答案：B 知识点标签 ：Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets-Redeemable debt. 难易程度：中 解析：题目考察对债券市场价值的估值。 估值的原理是将债券未来能够带来给投资者的所有的现金流全部都折现加总，即为债券当 前的市场价值。因此，分别将投资者购买债券每年可收到的利息和到期日可以收到的本金 进行折现加总。Market value =(6x6·002)+(100x0·760)=36·01+76·0=$112·01 综上，答案选B。 Task32 marks

stem_zh: 23. The finance director of Ring Co has been advised to calculate the net asset value (NAV)of the company. Which of the following formulae calculates correctly the NAV of Ring Co? A Total assets less current liabilities B Non-current assets plus net current assets C Non-current assets plus current assets less total liabilities D Non-current assets less net current assets less non-current liabilities ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 答案：C 知识点标签：Business valuations -Models for the valuation of share. 难易程度：低
explanation_zh: 题目考察对基于资产的估值法下公式的理解。 A总资产减流动负债。选项错误。 B 固定资产加净流动资产。选项错误。 C 固定资产加流动资产减总负债。选项正确。 D固定资产减净流动资产减长期负债。选项错误。 综上，答案选C。 Task 42 marks 24.Which of the following statements about valuation methods is true? A The earnings yield method multiplies earnings by the earnings yield B The equity market value is number of shares multiplied by share price,plus the market value of debt C The dividend valuation model makes the unreasonable assumption that average dividend growth is constant D The price/earnings ratio method divides earnings by the pricelearnings ratio 答案 ：C 知识点标签：Business valuations-Models for the valuation of share. 难易程度：中 Y-PLATINUM 解 析 ：题目考察对几种估值方法的理解和应用。 A 利润回报率法的公式，用的是利润除利润回报率，而不是乘。选项错误。 B 权益类的市场价值用的是股票的数量乘每股股票的价值，不需要再加债务类的市场价值。 选项错误。 C 股利股价模型中，假设股利的增长率是稳定不变的。是一个不切实际的假设。选项正确。 D市盈率的方法去进行估值，用的是市盈率乘收益，而不是除收益。选项错误。 综上，答案选C。 Task52 marks 2 5.Which of the following statements about capital market efficiency is/are correct? (1)Insider information cannot be used to make abnormal gains in a strong form efficient capital market (2)In a weak form efficient capital market,Ring Co's share price reacts to new information the day after it is announced (3)Ring Co's share price reacts quickly and accurately to newly-released information in a semi- strong form efficient capital market A1 and 2 only B1 and 3 only C3 only D1,2 and 3 答案：B 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares -Efficient market hypothesis 难易程度：中 解析：题目考察关于有效市场假设的理解。 本题要求选出下列关于有效市场假设中正确的的描述。 (1):强势有效市场中，即使获得内幕消息，也是没有办法帮助投资者获得超额利润。选 项正确。 (2):在弱势有效市场中，股票价格不会对新信息作出快速反应。选项错误。 (3):在半强势有效市场中，股票价格对新信息能够做出快速准确的反应。 综上，答案选B。 The following scenario relates to the five questions(26-30)below Background The following information relates to an investment project which is being evaluated by the directors of Fence Co,a listed company.The initial investment,payable at the start of the first year of operation,is $3·9 million. Year 3 4 Net operating cash flow($000) 1,2001,5001,6001,580 Scrap value($000) 100 The directors believe that this investment project will increase shareholder wealth if it achieves a return on capital employed greater than 15%.As a matter of policy,the directors require all investment projects to be evaluated using both the payback and return on capital employed methods.Shareholders have recently criticised the directors for using these investment appraisal methods,claiming that Fence Co ought to be using the academically-preferred net present value method. The directors have a remuneration package which includes a financial reward for achieving an annual return on capital employed greater than 15%.The remuneration package does not include a share option scheme. Task12marks 26.What is the payback period of the investment project? A2·75 B1·50 C265 D1·55 years years years years 答案：A 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques -Payback period 难易程度：低 解析：题目考察投资评估方法中投资回收期法的计算。 根据投资回收期方法的公式，需要回收的初始投资的金额为$3 ·9million., 题目中给出了每 年现金流的数据可以用来直接回收，因此可以得出： Payback period=2+(1,200/1,600)=2·75 years 综上，答案选A。 Task 22 marks 27.Based on the average investment method,what is the return on capital employed of the investment project? A13·3% B 26·0% C52·0% D 73·5% 答案：B 知 识 点 标 签 ：Investment appraisal -Investment appraisal techniques -Return on capital employed (accounting rate of return) 难易程度：低 解析：题目考察投资评估方法中的总投资回报率法的计算。 根据总投资回报率的公式，先求出分子，平均每年的会计利润。由于题目中给出的是现金 流，因此需要在现金流的基础上调减非现金流的项目，得出会计利润。 Average annual accounting profit=(5,880-3,800)/4=$520,000 per year 再根据题目中的数据算出平均投资金额。 Average investment=(3,900+100)/2=$2,000,000 带入总投资回报率的公式，得出： ROCE=100x520/2,000=26% 综上，答案选B。 Task 32 marks 28.Which of the following statements about investment appraisal methods is correct? A The return on capital employed method considers the time value of money B Return on capital employed must be greater than the cost of equity if a project is to be accepted C Riskier projects should be evaluated with longer payback periods D Payback period ignores the timing of cash flows within the payback period 答案：D 知识点标签： Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques. 难易程度： 中 解析：题目考察关于投资评估方法定义的理解和运用。 A 总资产回报率法是基于会计利润进行计算，因此并没有考虑到货币的时间价值。选项错 误。 B 总投资回报率的判断标准是当一个项目的总投资回报率大于企业既定的目标投资回报率 时 ，则该项目是可以被接受的。选项错误。 C 风险更高的项目应该被更高的投资回收期评估评估，描述不准确。选项错误。 D 投资回收期法只考虑了初始投资被收回来之前的现金流，并没有考虑初始投资收回来之 后的现金流。选项正确。 综上，答案选D。 Task 42 marks 29.Which of the following statements about Fence Co is/are correct? (1)Managerial reward schemes of listed companies should encourage the achievement of stakeholder objectives (2)Requiring investment projects to be evaluated with return on capital employed is an example of dysfunctional behaviour encouraged by performance-related pay (3)Fence Co has an agency problem as the directors are not acting to maximise the wealth of shareholders A1 and 2 only B 1 only C2 and 3 only D1,2 and 3 答案：D 知识点标签：Financial management function--Stakeholders and impact on corporate objectives. 难易程度：中 解析：题目考察对代理问题的理解。。 本题要求选出下列关于有效市场假设中正确的的描述。 (1):管理层薪酬包的设立目标是鼓励管理层能够实现股东的目标。选项正确。。 (2):将投资项目的评估指标与会计利润挂钩，会导致管理层出现只追求短期利润的短视 行为。选项正确。 (3):代理问题产生的原因是由于管理层只追求自己的利益，而没有去追求股东财富最大 化。选项正确。 综上，答案选D。 Task52 marks 30.Which of the following statements about Fence Co directors'remuneration package is/are correct? (1)Directors'remuneration should be determined by senior executive directors (2)Introducing a share option scheme would help bring directors’objectives in line with shareholders'objectives (3)Linking financial rewards to a target return on capital employed will encourage short-term profitability and discourage capital investment A2 only B1 and 3 only C2 and 3 only D1,2 and 3 答案：C 知识点标签： Financial management function-Stakeholders and impact on corporate objectives.- Managerial reward schemes 难易程度： 中 解析：题目考察对管理层薪酬包的理解和运用。 本题要求选出下列关于有效市场假设中正确的的描述。 (1):管理层的薪酬应该由薪酬委员会来制定。选项错误。 (2):员工持股计划的引入可以促使管理层也追求股东财富最大化，使管理层的目标与股 东的目标保持一致。选项正确。 (3):将投资项目的评估指标与会计利润挂钩，会导致管理层出现只追求短期利润的短视 行为。选项正确。 综上，答案选C。 1、2016 Sep Q1 本题核心知识点： Working capital management (a)Evaluate whether Nesud Co should accept the early settlement discount offered by its supplier. (4 marks) 题目类型：excel 官方答案： 得分标准： (a) Change in trade payables Increase in finance cost Administration cost increase Early settlement discount Comment on financial acceptability 4 知识点标签：Working capital management-Management of inventories,accounts receivable,accounts payable and cash-The use of relevant techniques in managing accounts payable 难易程度：中 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题考查是否接受供应商提供的早还款折扣，需要考虑接受折扣带来的益处和成本，两者 进行比较，如果成本更高则不接受，反之则接受。 我们是站在顾客的角度，有应付账款，如果选择接受折扣，益处为早还款折扣本身，能使 我们要付的货款减少。而成本则是提早还款带来的利息成本的增加以及题目中提到的管理 成本的增加。 Costs:

stem_zh: 1. 利息成本的增加 首先，我们计算成本，需要先计算出应付账款减少了多少，也就是提早还款的金额。 Relevant trade payables before discount=1,500,000x60/360=$250,000 Relevant trade payables after discount =1,500,000x 30/360=$125,000 Reduction in trade payables=250,000-125,000=$125,000 More quickly,reduction in trade payables =1,500,000x(60-30)/360=$125,000 然后再用应付账款减少的量乘以利率，即可计算出增加的利息成本。 The finance needed to reduce the trade payables will increase the overdraft. Increase in finance cost=125,000x0·04=$5,000

2. 管理成本的增加 Administration cost increase =$500 Benefits: 益处为折扣带来的货款减少，因此用总货款1.5m 乘以0.5%的折扣 Discount from supplier=$1,500,000x0·005=$7,500 综上所述，益处为7500大于成本5500,所以可以计算出净益处为2000。我们应该接受这 个早还款折扣。 Net benefit of discount=7,500-5,000-500=$2,000 per year On financial grounds,Nesud Co should accept the supplier's early settlement discount offer. (b)Evaluate whether Nesud Co should adopt an economic order quantity approach to ordering Component K. (6marks) 题目类型：excel 官方答案： 得分标准： (b) Annual demand Current ordering cost Current holding cost Economic order quantity EOQ ordering cost EOQ holding cost Comment on adopting E0Q approach to ordering 知识点标签：Working capital management-Management of inventories,accounts receivable,accounts payable and cash-Relevant techniques in managing inventory: EOQ&JIT 难易程度：中
explanation_zh: 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题考察是否需要采用经济订货量政策来订购产品K 。我们需要比较现有的订购政策下的 存货成本和采取了EOQ 后的存货成本。如果EOQ 下的存货成本更低则采用EOQ, 反之则 不猜用哪个。 题干给出了现有的订货政策为每个月订购一次，而一年的总需求为480,000单位(2.4m/5), 所以每次的订购量为40,000个(480,000/12=40,000)。 Annual demand=2,400,000/5=480,000 units per year Each month,Nesud Co orders 480,000/12=40,000 units 我们可以计算出在现有的订购政策下，也就是Q=40,000 个时对应的存货成本，包括订货 成本、持有成本。 订货成本等于每次下订单的订货成本Co 乘以下订单的次数12次。 持有成本等于每单位存货的持有成本乘以平均存货量。平均存货量等于Q/2。 总存货成本=订货成本+持有成本，结果为24,181元。 Current ordering cost=12x248·44=$2,981 per year NLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM Average inventory of Component K=40,000/2=20,000 units Current holding cost=20,000x106=$21,200 per year Total cost of current ordering policy=2,981+21,200=$24,181 EOQ 下的存货成本需要先根据EOQ 公式计算出EOQ=15,000 单位，对应的订购次数为32 次(480,000/15,000)。 可以计算出订货成本和持有成本分别为7950和7950。加总得到总存货成本为15,900元， 低于原先的24,181元。因此我们应该选择采纳EOQ 的订购方式。 Economic order quantity=(2x248·44x480,000/1-06)0·5=15,000 units per order Number of orders per year=480,000/15,000=32 orders per year Ordering cost=32×248 ·44=$7,950 per year Average inventory of Component K=15,000/2=7,500 units Holding cost=7,500x1-06=$7,950 per year Total cost of EOQ ordering policy=7,950+7,950=$15,900 INE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (c)Critically discuss how Nesud Co could improve the management of its trade receivables. (10 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： 得分标准： (c) Credit analysis Credit control Collection of amounts owed Factoring of trade receivables Other relevant discussion 10 知识点标签：Business fiancé-Sources of,and raising,business finance-Methods of raising equity finance 难易程度：高 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题考查如果提高应收账款的管理。 首先可以写应收账款管理政策的三个阶段：credit 1.Credit analysis analysis,credit control以及TR collection。 需要描述清楚此阶段的目的是可以通过事先评估顾客信用的方式来减少出现坏账的可能性。 其次需要描述分析顾客信用的信息来源，包括bank reference 、trade references,reports from credit reference agencies,records of previous transactions with potential customers,annual reports 等等。 2.Credit control 首先需要描述此阶段目的是确保顾客能够遵循原先定下的交易条款，能够按时还款。其次 可以详细描述进行控制的两种方式，分别是账龄分析和信用使用报告。 3.TR collection 首先需要描述对于还未逾期的应收账款如何回收。其次对于已经逾期的应收账款我们可以 采用发邮件、打电话、实地拜访等多种方式来进行回收。 除了这三点之外，我们还可以去讨论加快回收应收账款的方式，同样也能提高管理应收账 款的效率，比如 factoring。 4.Factoring 首先简短介绍保理的含义，其次介绍它的三个功能即可。 2 、2016 Sep Q2 本 题 核 心 知 识 点： Investment appraisal&Business finance (a)Calculate the net present value of the investment project in nominal terms and comment on its financial acceptability.(12 marks) 题目类型：Excel 官 方 答 案： 得分标准 ： Inflated selling price per unit Sales revenue Inflated variable cost Inflated fixed costs Tax liabilities Tax-allowable depreciation benefits years 1-3 Tax allowable depreciation benefits year 4 Incremental working capital and recovery Calculation of present values Correct initial investment Comment on financial acceptability 12 知 识 点 标 签：Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques-Net present value 难易程度：中 解 析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化 ， 可供同学参考 ： 本题要求计算该投资项目的NPV, 我们根据NPV format先对现金流进行调整，再折现得 到现值 ， 将现值加总即可得到净现值 。 首先，要计算出通货膨胀对销售额、变动成本以及增量的固定成本的影响。 CF,n=CFt,r (1+i) 其中销售额和变动成本通货膨胀率为4%,固定成本的通货膨胀率为5%,可以计算出每年 的名义上的销售价格和每单位变动成本，乘以销售量即可得到总的销售额、变动成本及固 定成本 。 其次，计算tax benefits on TAD,先按照题目中说到的25%的加速折旧法计算出每年的折旧 额，最后一年需要将所有剩下的折旧都算入。计算出折旧后，每年的折旧乘以20%的税率 即 可 得 到 每 年 的 tax benefits on TAD。 第三，需要写出营运资本的working。题目中说到营运资本在期初的投资为1.5m, 之后按 照6%的速度增长。我们需要根据“期初投资，只算增量，期末回收看情况”的口诀去进 行计算。这道题目说到机器在四年后由于技术进步会被淘汰，也就是说项目结束。因此第 四年时需要回收所有的营运资本 。 写出以上三个working 后即可列出NPV format 。Sales revenue 减去variable costs 减去fixed costs 得到应税现金流，再乘以税率得到税费，加上 tax benefits on TAD即可得到税后现金 流，再加上对于营运资本的投资，初始投入和残值得到净现金流。之后按照12%的折现率 进行折现得到现值加总即可计算出NPV。 最后，需要评价一下项目的可行性。NPV 计算出来为11988k, 是正数，因此根据NPV 的 决策依据，该项目可行。 (b)Discuss how the capital asset pricing model can assist Hebac Co in making a better investment decision with respect to its new product launch.(8marks) 题目类型：word 官 方 答 案： 得 分 标 准： ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (b) Business risk,financial risk and WACC 2 Using a proxy company 1 Systematic risk,business risk and financial risk 1 Ungearing the equity beta 1 Regearing the asset beta 1 Project-specific cost of equity and WACC 2 8 知 识 点 标 签： Business finance---Sources of finance and their relative costs-Application of the CAPM in calculating a project-specific discount rate. 难易程度：高 解 析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题考查的是如何用CAPM 模型来计算出一个新项目的折现率，这道题不是考查计算，而 是 需 要 考 生 进 行 详 细 计 算 步 骤 的 描 述 。 首先要描述一下公司整体的WACC可以作为项目折现率的情况，那就是项目的财务风险以 及商业风险和公司一致时。如果项目的商业风险发生了改变，比如进入到一个新的行业， 那么我们就需要计算出项目特定的折现率，而在计算的过程中就需要用到CAPM 模型。 接下来可以具体描述计算的步骤，分别是找到对照公司的equity beta, 下杠杆得到asset beta, 再次上杠杆得到新的equity beta。这个新的equity beta 能够反映公司本身的财务风险 以及新项目的商业分险。之后带入CAPM 模型中可以计算出一个项目特定的Ke, 再带入 WACC 计算出项目特定的折现率。 2018 SD Q1 本题核心知识点： Specific investment appraisal (a)(i)Assuming that the new machine is operated for a three-year period,evaluate whether Melanie Co should use leasing or borrowing as a source of finance. (6 marks) 题目类型：Excel 官方答案： 得分标准： Lease timing 1 PV leasing ONLINE DE1 VERY Maintenance cost 1 Purchase cost 0.5 Residual value 0.5 PV buy 1 Decision 1 Total 6 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Specific investment decisions-Leasing and borrowing to buy 难易程度：中 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路解析，可供同学参考： 本题要求假设新机器运转时间为三年，评估企业应该选择租赁还是借款购买。解决此类题目 思路为分别计算出租赁和借款购买两个方案成本的现值，选择成本现值更低的选项。 其中租赁涉及到的成本为三笔$55,000的租金，但是需要注意这三笔租金是“payable annually in advance”,即在年初提前支付，故分别发生于Year 0,Year 1和 Year 2。本 题bank loan 利率为8% per year, 要求忽略税，因此用8%作为折现率 (cost of debt) 折现后可得租赁的 成本现值为$153,065。 借款购买涉及到的成本为初始借款投资$160,000(发生在Year 0); 除此之外，每年会发生 $8,000的维护成本，维护成本是“payable at the end of each year”,即发生在在Year 1,Year 2 和Year 3; 机器在第三年结束时残值为$40,000。用8%作为折现率 (cost of debt) 折现后 可得借款购买的成本现值为$148,856。 借款购买的成本现值更低，因此Melanie 应该选择借款购买。 (a)(ii)Using a discount rate of 10%,calculate the equivalent annual cost of purchasing and operating the machine for both three years and four years,and recommend which replacement interval should be adopted. (6 marks) 题目类型：Excel 官方答案： 得分标准： 3-year PV cost 1 3-year EAC 1 Maintenance 4-year 0.5 Residual value 4-yearr 0.5 4-year PV cost ONLINE 1 4-year EAC 1 Decision 1 Total 6 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Specific investment decisions -Asset replacement decisions 难易程度：中 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路解析，可供同学参考： 本题要求使用10%作为折现率，计算购买机器后分别在运转三年后更换和四年后更换的等 值年成本，并对更换周期给出建议。 以三年为更换周期涉及到的成本为初始投资$160,000(发生在Year 0); 除此之外，每年会 发生$8,000的维护成本，维护成本是 “payable at the end of each year”,即发生在在Year 1, Year 2和 Year 3;机器在第三年结束时残值为$40,000。用10%作为折现率折现后可得成本 现值为$149,848。等值年成本EAC=PV of costs/Annuity factor for the life of the project(使用 10%的折现率，三年的年金系数)=($149,848)/2 ·487=(60,253)。 以四年为更换周期涉及到的成本为初始投资$160,000(发生在Year 0); 除此之外，由于维 护系统升级，每年发生的维护成本为$12,000,维护成本是“payable at the end of each year”, 即发生在在Year 1,Year 2和 Year 3; 机器在第四年结束时残值为$11,000。用10%作为折 现率折现后可得成本现值为$190,515。等值年成本EAC=PV of costs/Annuity factor for the life of the project(使用10%的折现率，四年的年金系数)=($190,515)/3 · 170=(60,099)。 以四年为更换周期的等值年成本更低，因此Melanie 应该选择四年作为机器的更换周期。 (b)Critically discuss FOUR reasons why NPV is regarded as superior to IRR as an investment appraisal technique. (8 marks) (20 marks) 题目类型：word 官方答案： 得分标准： First reason 2 Second reason 2 Third reason 2 Ⅲ Forth reason 2 Total 8 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques -Net present value,Internal rate of return 难易程度：中 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题要求批判地讨论四个NPV 作为投资评估技术优于IRR 的原因。 在大多数简单的接受或拒绝决策中，IRR 和NPV 将选择相同的项目。然而，净现值作为一 种投资评估技术具有一些优于IRR 的特点。 原因一：净现值和股东财富 如果按照恰当的融资成本计算，项目的净现值应该等于项目能够提供的股东财富的增加。因 此NPV 与公司最大化股东财富的财务目标直接相关。IRR 计算项目的回报率，尽管可以显 示项目对股东的吸引力，但是不能衡量项目能够为股东带来的财富增长。 原因二：绝对测量值 净现值着眼于财富的绝对增长，因此可以用来比较不同规模的项目。IRR 着眼于相对回报率， 这样做忽略了投资项目的相对规模。 原因三：非常规现金流 在项目现金流多次逆转的情况下，IRR 方法可能产生多个结果(即，可能有多个折现率计算 出的NPV 为零)。如果决策者意识到存在多个IRR, 他们仍有可能使用内部收益率做出正 确的决定；但如果决策者没有意识到，就可能会做出错误的决策。 原因四：互斥项目 在互斥项目的情况下，IRR 可能会(错误地)将项目以与NPV 不同的顺序排序，这是内部 收益率法的再投资假设导致的。IRR 假设任何项目在生命周期内产生的净现金流入将按照项 目内部收益率进行再投资；而NPV 假设项目在生命周期内产生的净现金流入将按照融资成 本再投资。因此NPV 假设的再投资率更为现实。 原因五：资本成本变化 NPV 可用于融资成本逐年变化的情况(使用不同的折现率对对应年份现金流折现即可)。 尽管在这种情况下IRR 可以计算出结果，但是做出接受或拒绝项目的决定较为困难，因为 很难确定应该将IRR 与哪个折现率进行比较。 注：本题只要求讨论四个原因。 2019 MJQ2 本题核心知识点： Investment appraisal &Financial management function (a)(i)Calculate the nominal net present value of Pinks Co's investment project.
