Ch=$2.5,Co=$400, 采购单价P=$3.00, 公司是按照EOQ(W1) 进行 订货。存货的安全边际buffer inventory =D×5/365=68493(W2)。 在更换供应商后， Ch=$2.5,Co=$400, 采购单价 P=$2.25, 公司是按照Q=1million 进 行订货。存货的安全边际 buffer inventory =D×15/365=205479(W2)。 (i) 问要求计算更换供应商前后，化学制品X 的存货每年总成本。 存货总成本=采购成本+订货费用+持有成本 存货持有成本受存货平均持有水平的影响，由于不管是否更换供应商，平均存货持有水平 都是等于在存货单次订货量除以2的基础上，加上存货安全边际。 (ii) 问要求计算更换供应商前后，化学制品X 平均存货持有水平对应的价值，所以根据 存货的平均持有水平乘以采购单价从而分别计算出更换供应商前后，存货日常占用企业资 金究竟是多少。 (iii) 问要求提供合理的理由，给Purdy 公司提供是否应该更换供应商的建议。 根据 (ii) 问的计算结果，我们会发现更换供应商后，因为存货平均持有水平的上涨，导 致存货日常会需要占用企业更多的资金，考虑到Purdy 公司目前迫于银行的压力需要减少 透支，更换供应商反而会增加对于透支的需要， Purdy 公司目前看来是用透支获取的短期 资金满足存货这种企业日常流动资产资金上需要，所以综合考虑到这个情况，不建议 Purdy 公司更换新供应商。 (b)Discuss the conflict that exists between the objectives of liquidity and profitability in the management of working capital.(5 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： Working capital management involves the management of a company's current assets and current liabilities,principally inventory,accounts receivable,cash and accounts payable.When managing working capital,a company faces twin objectives.One objective is to earn profits in order to provide satisfactory returns for its investors and contribute towards the maximisation of shareholder wealth. Another is to generate enough cash to allow the business to meet its financial commitments,such as wages,salaries,accounts payable,interest and tax. These two objectives can often conflict.For example,to increase profitability,a firm may increase its inventory levels in order to be able to offer customers prompt delivery.In theory,this will be attractive to customers and sales and profits should increase.However,by increasing inventory levels the company ties up more cash in inventory,thus decreasing its ability to meet its short-term commitments. On the other hand,a company which pressurises customers for payment by aggressive management of accounts receivable may find that its cash resources increase as customers pay more promptly,but at the same time its sales and profits may fall as customers turn to other suppliers who offer more generous credit terms. Cash management involves a similar trade off.Cash is often regarded as‘an idle asset'as it earns no return.Companies often invest their cash resources to earn some return and increase profitability.By doing so,they usually have to tie up the cash for a fixed amount of time (otherwise the interest earned would be very small),and hence damage their liquidity. Finally,companies which take long periods of credit from suppliers may find their liquidity improves but this can be to the detriment of profits as settlement discounts may be lost and supplier relationships damaged. When managing working capital,firms need to be aware of the conflict between the twin objectives.A sensible approach is to see the need for sufficient liquidity as a constraint on working capital management and then to seek to maximise profits subject to this constraint. 得 分 标 准： Discussion on conflict Further illustration 5 知 识 点 标 签： Working capital management -The nature,elements and importance of working capital-Identify the objectives of working capital management in terms of liquidity and profitability,and discuss the conflict between them. 难易程度：高 解 析： 题目要求讨论营运资本管理中，流动性和盈利性这两个目标直接存在的冲突问题。 · 营运资本管理管理的对象是公司的流动资产和流动负债，主要包括存货、应收账款、 应付账款和现金。 · 在管理营运资本的时候，企业的管理目标有两个： 一个是盈利性，赚取利润，提供 让投资者满意的回报，从而最大化股东财富；另一个保证企业的流动性，持有足够 的现金或者变现能力较好的流动资产，保证企业在履行财务承诺，包括工资、薪水、 应付账款、利息和税收时，手边有充裕的流动现金可以用于支付。 · 不过，这两个目标之间是存在冲突的。 · 存货管理 企业为了提高盈利性水平，会增加存货持有水平，这样销售额上涨时，企业就有充 裕的存货可以用于支持。不过存货水平的增加相应的会导致更多的资金被存货占用， 企业不能用这笔钱投资收益率更高的项目了，这就会伤害企业的盈利性水平。 · 应收账款管理 如果企业积极管理应收账户，催促客户更及时地支付货款，那么企业的流动资金会 因此变多，相较于竞争对手给客户提供更为慷慨的赊购还款政策，我们企业的销售 额会因此受到负面影响，在一定程度上，这种操作会伤害企业的盈利性水平。 · 现金管理 现金管理中也存在类似的权衡问题，在企业中，现金通常被视为闲置资产，因为它 的回报收益是最低的，虽然它的流动性水平是最高的。如果为了提高企业的盈利性 水平，就不得不将现金投入到那些回报更高，但是需要冻结现金的项目中去，这会 伤害企业的流动性水平，所以需要企业对此进行权衡。 · 应付账款管理 供应商提供的应付账款这个资金资源可以在一定程度上改善企业的流动性水平，但 是与此同时会伤害企业的盈利性水平，因为你为了占用供应商提供的这个免费的资 金资源，就相当于放弃了供应商提供的提前付款折扣，与供应商之间的关系也有可 能因为长期的拖欠供应商的货款而恶化 。 · 综上，企业在管理营运资本的时候，需要意识到两个目标之间的冲突。一个明智的 方法是在保证企业持有充足的流动性的前提下寻求利润最大化。 (c)Explain the cash operating cycle and its relationship with the level of investment in working capital.(5 marks) 题目类型：Word 官 方 答 案： The cash operating cycle(sometimes known as the working capital cycle)measures the interval between the company paying out cash at the start of its production process(in manufacturing,this is normally paying suppliers for raw materials)and receiving cash from customers when products are sold and paid for. The cash operating cycle for a company can be calculated by adding inventory days(for raw materials,work in progress and finished goods)to accounts receivable days and then deducting accounts payable days. The length of a company's cash operating cycle has two major drivers.First the type of industry a company operates in.House construction companies often have very long cash operating cycles. Their business involves buying land,gaining permission to build,building houses and infrastructure,selling and then collecting cash from sales.This whole process often takes more than a year. Large supermarket chains on the other hand often have very short cash operating cycles.Their buying power allows them to enjoy long credit periods from suppliers,whilst inventory holding periods and accounts receivables are very short.Often,they have negative cash operating cycles. The efficiency of a company's working capital management will also affect the length of the cycle. A company which has poor control of inventory and accounts receivable,yet which pays its suppliers promptly will find that it has a longer cash operating cycle than competitors who manage their working capital well. The longer a company's cash operating cycle,the greater its investment in net working capital will be.If inventory is held for a large amount of days,physical inventory,and the amount of money invested in it will be high. Similarly the longer it takes accounts receivable to be settled,the more money the company will have invested. Finally,a short accounts payable period will mean that the company takes little credit from suppliers and hence fails to reduce its net working capital investment. 得 分 标 准： Explanation of cycle Link to investment in working capital 5 知 识 点 标 签： Working capital management -Determining working capital needs and funding strategies -Calculate the level of working capital investment in current assets and discuss the key factors determining this level,including:the length of the working capital cycle and terms of trade 难易程度：高 解 析： 题目要求解释现金循环周期和营运资本投资水平之间的关系。 · 现金循环周期衡量的是公司在生产过程中从支付现金到从客户手中收回现金所需要 的时间。通常我们是用存货周转天数加上应收账款周转天数减去应付账款周转天数 计算得出 。 · 企业现金循环周期的长短主要取决于两个因素： · 一个是公司的行业类型。 比如房屋建筑公司通常比较有很长的现金循环周期，从购买土地，到获得建设许可， 然后建设房屋和完善基础设施，销售，最后从客户那里收到现金，整个过程往往需 要远远超过一年的时间。 而大型连锁超市的现金循环周期通常很短。它们的讨价还价能力让他们可以从供应 商那里获得较长的付款期，而存货周转通常比较快，而且应收账款周转天数也比较 短，所以大型连锁超市的现金循环周期有可能是负的。 · 另一个是公司的营运资本管理效率。 对存货和应收账款控制不佳，总是及时付款给供应商的公司，其现金循环周期会比 营运资本管理良好的竞争对手要长。 · 公司的现金循环周期越长，其对净营运资本的投资就越大。 存款的持有天数越长，企业拥有的实物库存越多，它们占用的资金就会越多。 应收账款周转的天数越长，公司在这投入的资金就越多。 较短的应付账款周转天数意味着公司从供应商那获得的资金较少，因此对于公司在 营运资本上投资能发挥的削减作用有限。 2022 SD Q2 Clover Co This scenario relates to three requirements. Clover Co must replace a machine which is essential to its production process.The company has identified two machines of identical capacity,but different technology,which would be suitable. Only one machine would be purchased in this mutually exclusive investment decision. Machine 1 This machine would cost $2,000,000 and would need replacing after three years,when its residual value would be $200,000.Maintenance costs would be $52,000 per year in the first year of operation,increasing by8%per year in each subsequent year.Annual operating costs,expected to be $300,000 in the first year of operation,would increase by 10%per year in each subsequent year. Machine 2 This machine would cost $2,500,000 and would need replacing after five years,when its residual value would be$150,000.Maintenance costs are forecast to be $39,000 per year in the first year of operation,increasing by 6%per year in each subsequent year.Annual operating costs,expected to be $248,000 in the first year of operation,would increase by 12%per year in each subsequent year. Other information Clover Co believes that whether Machine 1 or Machine 2 is selected,future replacement machines would,in each case,be more advanced versions of the machines,with identical life cycles.Buying Machine 1 would therefore commit the company to a three-year replacement cycle,while buying Machine 2 would commit the company to a five-year replacement cycle. The residual value of Machine 1 is a buyback price from the machine's seller that would be included in the contract of sale.The residual value of Machine 2 is an estimate made by Clover Co based on existing market information. The technology used in each machine is expected to continue to develop in the future.While Clover Co thinks it is unlikely that Machine 1 would become obsolescent during its three-year life, the company thinks it is likely that Machine 2 could be affected by obsolescence towards the end of its life. For both machines,all increases in costs are due to increasing age. Clover Co uses a discount rate of 13%to appraise investment projects.Ignore taxation. 本题核心知识点：Investment appraisal (a)(i)Calculate the equivalent annual cost of each machine's replacement cycle.(10 marks) 题目类型：Excel 官方答案： Equivalent annual cost of Machine 1(three-year cycle) Year 1 2 3 Residual value 200,000 Maintenance cost (52,000) (56,160) (60,653) Operating cost (300,000) (330,000) (363,000) Net cash flow (352,000) (386,160) (223,653) 13%discount factor 0 ·885 0 ·783 0 ·693 Present values (311,504) (302,420) (155,003) Sum of PVs Initial investment (768,927) (2,000,000) NPV (2,768,927) EAC=(2,768,927)/2·361=($1,172,701) Equivalent annual cost of Machine 2(five-year cycle)YearResidual valueMaintenance cost Operating costNet cash flow13%discount factor Present valuesSum of PVsInitial investmentNPV(39,000) (248,000) (287,000)0·885(253,982)(1,149,151) (2,500,000)(3,649,151 )2(41,340)(277,760) (319,100)0·783(249,902)4(46,450) (348,422) (394,872)0·613(242,182)3(43,820) (311,091)(354,912)0·693(245.972)150,000 (49,237) (390,233) (289,469)0·543(157,112) Equivalent annual cost of Machine 2(five-year cycle) Year Residual value Maintenance cost Operating cost Net cash flow 13%discount factor Present values Sum of PVs Initial investment NPV (39,000) (248,000) (287,000) 0·885 (253,982) (1,149,151) (2,500,000) (3,649,151 ) 2 (41,340) (277,760) (319,100) 0·783 (249,902) 4 (46,450) (348,422) (394,872) 0·613 (242,182) 3 (43,820) (311,091) (354,912) 0·693 (245.972) 150,000 (49,237) (390,233) (289,469) 0·543 (157,112) EAC=(3,649,151)/3·517=($1,037,507) 得 分 标 准： (i) Initial investment Residual values Machine 1 maintenance costs Machine 1 operating costs Machine 1 PVs Machine 1 EAC Machine 2 maintenance costs Machine 2 operating costs Machine 2 PVs Machine 2 EAC 10 知 识 点 标 签： Investment appraisal-Specific investment decisions (Lease or buy,asset replacement,capital rationing)-Evaluate asset replacement decisions using equivalent annual cost and equivalent annual benefit. 难易程度：中 解 析： 本题要求计算公司计划采购的两台机器设备的约当年均成本EAC。 约 当 年 均 成 本EAC=PV of costs /Annuity factor of machine life 机器1: 初始成本$2,000,000,设备残值$200,000,设备年限3年，另外每年有：【1】维修费用Y1= $52,000,后续按照8%调增；【2】运营费用Y1=$300,000, 后续按照10%调增。 机器2: 初始成本$2,500,000,设备残值$150,000,设备年限5年，另外每年有：【1】维修费用Y1= $39,000,后续按照6%调增；【2】运营费用Y1=$248,000, 后续按照12%调增。 由于这道题不需要考虑税，所以不需要考虑设备的维修费用、运营费用和折旧费用带来的 抵税作用，直接将初始投资、项目残值、维修费用和运营费用这4项相关现金流按照题目 条件放在对应年份上，按照13%的折现率折现加总求和算出每台设备的PV of costs。 然后3年的机器1除以13%3年的年金系数2.361,5年的机器2除以13%3年的年金系数 3.517,就可以分别算出两台机器各自的约当年均成本了。 (ii)Discuss which machine should be selected by Clover Co.(4 marks) 题目类型：Word 官 方 答 案： Financial acceptability Choosing between the two machines on financial grounds cannot be achieved using NPV,since they have different replacement cycles,reflecting their unequal lives.However,the two investment decisions can be compared using the equivalent annual cost (EAC)method,which indicates that Machine 2 should be chosen as it has a lower EAC than Machine 1.On financial grounds alone,therefore,Machine 2 with its five-year replacement cycle should be recommended. Uncertainty The future value of the residual value of Machine 1 is certain insofar as it will be a contractual commitment by the selling company.The future value of the residual value of Machine 2 is an estimate made by Clover Co and is therefore subject to uncertainty.The three-year replacement cycle might therefore be chosen,even though it has a higher EAC,because its residual value is more certain than that of the five-year replacement cycle.However,even if the residual value of Machine 2 were zero,Machine 2 would still have the lower EAC. Obsolescence Purchasing Machine 1 and committing to a three-year replacement cycle looks to carry little risk of Clover Co suffering from obsolescence due to technological advances.By contrast,purchasing Machine 2 and committing to a five-year replacement cycle appears to lead to significant obsolescence risk late in the life of the machine.The three-year replacement cycle might therefore be chosen,even though it has a higher EAC,because Clover Co believes it carries significantly less obsolescence risk. Flexibility Purchasing Machine 1 may give Clover Co greater flexibility in that its shorter replacement cycle could facilitate a more rapid response to changing technology through investment in other machines than the two under consideration,if such were to become available. 得 分 标 准： (ii) Financial decision on EAC Uncertainty Obsolescence Other relevant points 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Adjusting for risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal; Specific investment decisions (Lease or buy,asset replacement,capital rationing)-Evaluate asset replacement decisions using equivalent annual cost and equivalent annual benefit. 难易程度：高 解 析： 题目要求讨论Clover公司应该选择采购哪台设备。 · 从财务角度考虑 单纯看项目的净现值是无法直接在两台设备中进行选择的，毕竟两台设备寿命的不 同导致他们更换周期是不一样的。不过我们可以使用约当年均成本EAC 的方法进 行比较。由于机器2的EAC比机器1的EAC要低，所以从财务的角度，推荐选择 采购机器2,每5年更换一次。 · 从不确定性考虑 机器1未来的剩余价值是确定的，因为它是销售协议中的合同承诺。而机器2的未 来的剩余价值是Clover公司自己根据市场信息估计的，所以具有不确定性。因此 从这个角度出发，Clover 公司可能会选择三年置换周期的机器1。 · 从过时的可能考虑 购买机器1并承诺三年的置换周期看起来对于Clover 公司来说风险会比较小，因为 时间相较于5年会更短，面临因为技术进步而导致的过时淘汰的可能性会比5年置 换周期的机器2更低。所以即使机器2的EAC 更低，从过时的可能这个角度出发， 应该选择机器1。 · 从灵活性的角度考虑 购买机器1可以给Clover 公司带来更大的灵活性，因为其较短的更换周期会有助于 公司通过投资其他机器，对不断变化的技术做出更快速的相应。 (b)Discuss why discounted cash flow (DCF)investment appraisal methods are considered to be superior to non-DCF methods.(6 marks) 题目类型：Word 官 方 答 案： Discounted cash flow(DCF)investment appraisal methods,such as net present value (NPV)and internal rate of return (IRR),are considered superior to non-DCF investment appraisal methods, such as payback and return on capital employed (ROCE),for a variety of reasons,as follows. Time value of money DCF investment appraisal methods are seen as superior to non-DCF methods because DCF methods take account of the time value of money by discounting future cash flows to their present values,while non-DCF methods ignore the time value of money.While DCF methods therefore give more weight in an investment appraisal to cash flows in the near future compared to cash flows in the distant future,payback ignores the amount and timing of cash flows within the payback period,while ROCE averages profit over the life of the project. Cash flow basis DCF investment appraisal methods are seen as superior to non-DCF methods because DCF methods use cash flows.Cash flows are not distorted by company-specific factors such as depreciation policy and amortisation decisions which can affect profit,for example,the average annual accounting profit used by ROCE.From this point of view,DCF methods can be seen as more objective than non-DCF methods. Whole project considered DCF investment appraisal methods consider cash flows over the whole life of an investment project,whereas payback ignores cash flows after the payback period.Investment decisions using payback period may therefore be sub-optimal in relation to the financial management objective of maximising shareholder wealth,because a project with a higher NPV might be rejected in favour ofa project with a lower NPV but a shorter payback period. 得 分 标 准： 2 1 l(b) Time value of money 2 2 1 l Cash flow basis Whole project considered Other relevant points 6 知 识 点 标 签： Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques -Discuss the superiority of discounted cash flow(DCF)methods over non-DCF methods 难 易 程 度： 高 解 析： 题目要求讨论为什么折现现金流这种投资评估方法是优于非折现现金流的评估方法。 折现现金流DCF 的投资评估方法包括净现值法NPV 和内含报酬率 IRR。 非折现现金流non-DCF 的投资评估方法包括回收期payback period 和资本回报率ROCE。 · 货币的时间价值 因为DCF 方法通过对未来的现金流折现的方式考虑货币的时间价值，而non-DCF 方法忽略了货币的时间价值。因此，与遥远的未来的现金流相比，DCF 方法在投 资评估中更重视近期的现金流，而non-DCF 方法比如回收期法忽略了回收期内现 金流的数量和时间，ROCE 则是在项目的整个周期内计算年均会计利润。 · 以现金流为基础 DCF 方法是基于现金流进行评估，而现金流不会受到公司特定因素的影响，比如 折旧政策和摊销政策，这些特定因素会影响比如ROCE 的计算基础年均会计利润。 从这个角度来看DCF 方法可以被视为比non-DCF 方法更客观。 · 考虑整个项目周期 DCF方法考虑了投资项目整个生命周期内的所有现金流，而non-DCF 方法比如回 收期发忽略了回收期后的现金流。因此，对于最大化股东财富的财务管理目标而言， 使用回收期的投资决策可能是次优的，因为净现值较高的项目可能因为回收期较长 而被拒绝，企业可能会因此选择净现值较小但回收期较短的项目。 ONLINE DE Section A

stem_zh: 1. Abrar Co has 6%convertible loan notes in issue with a floor value of $106.20 per $100 loan note. Each loan note can be converted into 15 ordinary shares at any time or redeemed in five years' time at nominal value. What is the minimum share price at which investors would convert their loan notes (to two decimal places)? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section AExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：$7.08
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是可转债的运作原理，要求计算出可转债投资人选择行使转换权时的最 低股价时多少，答案要求保留两位小数。 可转债的投资人在可转债到期时需要判断是否行使转换权，判断的依据就是看可转债的到 期赎回价值和转换价值哪个更高。 题目条件提供了可转债的保底价值(floor value)$106.20,这个价值就是可转债按照赎回价赎 回这个场景下，可转债投资者在未来可以受到的所有现金流入(包括五年内每年可以收到的 票面利息和第五年的赎回价$100)的现值之和。 所以这个保底价值就是判断是否行使转换权的那个临界值，只要可转债到期那天的转化价 值大于等于保底价值，那么可转债的投资人一定会选择行使转换权。 可转债的转换价值等于可转债到期时的股价与可转换的股数两者相乘，所以用保底价值除 以可转债可转换的股数，就可以得出投资者行使转换权的最低股价=$106.20/15=$7.08 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations-The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Discuss and apply appropriate valuation methods -Convertible debt 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 2. A state funded hospital has the objective of providing value for money.It measures the achievement of this objective using the three E's (economy,effectiveness and efficiency). Which of the following performance indicators measures the hospital's economy? 原题来源：2022/ SD Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.Number of patients admitted per year B.Total medical staff salary cost C.Cost per successfully treated patient D.Average waiting time for patient admission to hospital 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察衡量非营利组织的3E的应用，题目要求选择符合Economic 的选项。 Economic 指的是经济性，在不影响品质的情况下，尽可能降低投入上的花销。 由于这个是一家由国家资助的医院，对于医院来说，投入就是医务人员的劳务报酬。所以 选项B 反映的是经济型，所以是正确的。 选项A 错误，每年收治的患者人数，这个属于产出。 选项C 错误，每个治疗好的病人身上的花销，这个反映的是效率Efficiency 这块，它呈现 的是输入转化为输出的效率如何。 选项D 错误，病人入院的平均等待时间，这个时间如果满足特定目标的话，反映的是效果 effectiveness 这块。 知识点标签： Financial management function -Financial and other objectives in not-for-profit organisations -Discuss ways of measuring the achievement of objectives in not-for-profit organisations 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 3. A machine costing $450,000 has a useful life of six years,after which time its estimated present value of resale will be $25,800.The present value of the total running costs over the next six years is $82,280. The company's cost of capital is 10%. What is the equivalent annual cost of using the machine if it were bought and replaced every six years in perpetuity(to the nearest dollar)? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 3 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：S116,299
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是约当年均成本 Equivalent annual cost 的计算。 题目中设备的初始投入成本是$450,000,残值的现值是$25,800,6年内容所有维护成本的 现值是$82,280,所以总的成本花费的现值是=$450,000+$82,280-$25,800=$506,480。 设备的预计可使用年限是6年，按照10%的折现率，取6年的年金系数4.355,所以均摊到 每一年的成本Equivalent annual cost=$506,480/4.355=$116,299 知 识 点 标 签 ：Investment appraisal -Specific investment decisions (Lease or buy,asset replacement,capital rationing)-Evaluate asset replacement decisions using equivalent annual cost and equivalent annual benefit. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 4. A financial manager believes that if information regarding his organisation is made public,it will not affect the share price as this information is already reflected in the current share price. In terms of capital market efficiency,to which of the following does the financial manager's belief relate? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report SectionAExample 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.Weak form efficiency B.No efficiency C.Strong form efficiency D.Semi-strong form efficiency 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对于有效市场假说的理解。 题目中的财务经理认为如果有关组织的信息一经公开，股价不会受到影响，因为这些信息 已经体现在当前的股价中了。这是强势有效市场的特征，无论信息公开与否(未公开的属 于内幕消息),都会快速公允的体现在股价上。所以答案选择C。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis (EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares -Distinguish between and discuss weak form efficiency, semi-strong form efficiency and strong form efficiency 难易程度：中 Section B The following scenario relates to the five questions(1-5)below The home currency of Wren Co is the dollar($)and the company has a supplier in a foreign country whose currency is the dinar(D).In six months'time,Wren Co must make a payment to the supplier,of D3 million,and the company is concerned about exchange rate risk. Exchange rates: Spot exchange rate:2.00 dinars per dollar Six-month forward exchange rate:1.94 dinars per dollar Six-month interest rate Borrowing Deposit Dinars 4%per year 2%per year Dollars 10%per year 8%per year Wren Co wants to compare making a lead payment of D3 million now,with taking out a forward exchange contract for D3 million,that can be exercised in six months'time.As the company is short of cash,it would need to borrow money for any exchange rate risk hedging. Wren Co is considering raising $500,000 in three months'time in order to ease its cash flow problems.The company would borrow the money for a period of six months and it would hedge interest rate risk by using a forward rate agreement (FRA).Wren Co has been offered two different FRAs by its bank:a 3v9 FRA at 10.0-8.0 and a 3v 6 FRA at 9.8-7.8,but the company is also considering interest rate derivative hedging.

stem_zh: 1. In relation to interest rate derivatives,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.Interest rate futures hedges can be closed out any time B.Forward rate agreements fix the interest rate on future long-term borrowing C.If interest rate options are allowed to lapse,there is no overall cost to the holder D.Buying both an interest rate cap and an interest rate floor is an example of an interest rate collar 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是利率风险对冲中使用的金融衍生品的理解，要求选择正确的选项。 A 选项正确：利率期货是标准化的合约，期限覆盖了一年中的任何一天，所以可以在任何 一天选择平仓。 B 选项错误：远期利率协议只能在短期内实现利率的锁定功能，它并不支持对冲长期借款 利率的波动风险。 C 选项错误：就算利率期权放弃行权，还是需要利率期权的持有人承担期权费这个支出。 D 选项错误：双领期权是买一个利率期权(比如 cap) 的同时，卖一个反向利率期权(比如 floor),不是同时买cap 和 floor,交易方向不对。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 2. Considering future values on the D3 million payment date,and comparing the lead payment with the forward exchange contract(FEC),which of the following statements is true? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.The FEC costs $46,392 more than the lead payment B.The FEC costs $28,608 more than the lead payment C.The lead payment costs $46,392 more than the FEC D.The lead payment costs $28,608 more than the FEC 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对比使用外汇远期合约和现在提前付款这两个选项之间的差异。 如果选择外汇远期合约FEC, 3 million Dinar的外币应付款对应的本币数量=3m/1.94= $1,546,392。 如果现在提前付款，由于题目条件说目前企业手边没有钱，只能借钱按照现在的即期汇率 2.00 D/$完成支付。那么提前付款对于公司对应的本币花费就是这笔3 million Dinar的外币 应付款对应的本币数量=3m/2=$1,500,000 为期六个月的借款本息和=$1,500,000×(1+ 10%×6/12)=$1,575,000>$1,546,392 两种方案相差$1,575,000- $1,546,392=$28,608,也就是说借钱提前完成支付这个方案会被 FEC 多花费$28,608,所以选择D。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk -Identify the main types of foreign currency derivatives used to hedge foreign currency risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 3. If Wren Co takes out the relevant FRA and borrows at a base rate of 10.5%per year,in three months'ti me,what is the company's net cost of borrowing? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 3 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.$20,000 B.$25,000 C.$24,500 D.$27,500 答案：B.
explanation_zh: 题目考查的是如何使用远期利率协议FRA 对冲借款利率风险。 由于这笔借款是三个月后开始，为期六个月，所以选择的远期利率协议是3v9 FRA at 10.0 -8.0,这两个rate中比较高的10%是远期利率协议约定的借款利率。 而三个月后的实际借款利率是10.5%,也就意味着公司在实际市场需要按照10.5%的年化 利率完成借款。所以相应的借款利息是Interest paid on loan =500,000×10.5%×6/12= $26,250。 由于10.5%的借款利率高于远期利率协议约定的10%的借款利率，所以 Wren 公司会从 FRA 提供方银行那里收到10.5%与10%之间的利息补偿Payment from bank=500,000× (10.5%-10%)×6/12=$1,250。 所以对于Wren 公司来说，这笔三个月后，为期六个月的借款的借款净成本就是=$26,250- $1,250=$25,000,所以答案选择B。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 4. Which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.If the exchange rate is 2.00 dinars per dollar,a relative increase in dollar interest rates will cause the dollar to appreciate against the dinar B.The international Fisher effect states that the expected change in the spot rate is equal to the expected difference in inflation rates C.Forward exchange rates reflect interest rate parity D.Purchasing power parity relates exchange rates and long-term interest rates 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是与汇率变动有关的相关理论，选择说法正确的选项。 A选项错误：根据利率平价理论，名义利率越高的货币，远期汇率相较于即期汇率会贬值， 而预期理论的结论是远期汇率是对未来即期汇率无偏差的预测，所以名义利率越高的货币 未来贬值的幅度越大。因此美元利率的相对上涨会让美元在未来贬值，而不是升值。 B选项错误：国际费雪效应反映的是两国货币名义利率之间的差异体现在两国货币通货膨 胀率之间的差异上，并不是反映未来即期汇率之间的变化。 C 选项正确：按照利率平价定律，远期汇率的变化反映了两国名义利率之间的差异。 D 选项错误：购买力平价定律的结论是未来即期汇率的变化反映了两国货币通货膨胀率之 间的差异，并不是反映长期利率之间的差异，长期利率之间的差异是和利率平价定律有关。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations- Describe the causes of exchange rate fluctuations 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 5. In relation to foreign currency risk,which of the following statements is/are correct? (1)Economic risk is exchange rate risk that can be avoided by operating in domestic markets only (2)Exchange rate risk arises because of changes in exchange rates that have not been anticipated 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 5 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.1 only B.2 only C.Both 1 and 2 D.Neither 1 nor 2 答案：B
explanation_zh: 本题考查的是对于汇率变动带来的风险理解。 陈述1:错误。经济风险是汇率的长期变动导致的整个国家在国际贸易中的竞争力受到影 响的一种风险。这种风险是无法通过单纯只在本国经营改善的。因为就算不直接参与海外 贸易，外币的贬值也会让海外供应商的产品相较于本国商品更具价格优势。 陈述2:正确。汇率波动风险是由无法预测的汇率的变化而带来的。 知识点标签： Risk Management-The nature and types of risk and approaches to risk management- Describe and discuss different types of foreign currency risk 难易程度：低 2023 MJ Q1 Graffham Co 本题核心知识点： Equity finance Right issue Islamic finance This scenario relates to six requirements. Graffham Co's directors are planning to invest in a new project,which requires $18.9m of new finance to be raised.Graffham Co's directors have used a mix of debt and equity finance to finance recent investments,but have become concerned about the level of Graffham Co's gearing compared with the industry average.Therefore,they have decided not to use debt finance to fund the new project. Graffham Co's finance director has proposed a 2 for 5 rights issue to existing shareholders at a 25%discount to the current share price of $8.40.The nominal value of the ordinary shares is $2.00 per share.However,Graffham Co's chairman has received objections from some small shareholders(shareholders owning less than 5%of issued share capital each)on the grounds that they do not have sufficient cash available to pay for the new shares. Graffham Co's large shareholders(shareholders owning more than 10%of issued share capital each and 50%in total of issued share capital)will be happy to subscribe for a rights issue. However,they want the new project to earn at least the same operating profit margin in %terms as Graffham Co's current business does. Operating profit margin is measured as(Profit before interest and tax/Revenue)×100%). DUCFinancial statement information prior to raising new finance: DUC S'000 Revenue 45,200 Profit before interest and tax 9,500 0 D EN E Ordinary shares 15,000 Retained earnings 27,875 Non-current liabilities:8%loan notes 25,000 Total equity and liabilities 67,875 Corporation tax is payable at a rate of 16%per year.The nominal value of Graffham Co's loan notes is $100 per loan note and the market value is $110 per loan note.Graffham Co's price- earnings ratio can be assumed to be unchanged by undertaking the project. The current industry average gearing figure at market values,measured as(Non-current liabilities/(Non-current liabilities +Equity)×100%)is 25%. The new project is expected to earn $20m revenue each year and have an operating profit margin of 18%.If the project is successful,there are expected to be opportunities to invest in further projects,offering higher operating profit margins. (a)(i)Calculate the theoretical ex rights price per share.(2 marks) (ii)Calculate the current earnings per share before investment in the project.(2 marks) (iii)Calculate the revised earnings per share and the share price after investment in the project,assuming the rights issue is successful.(3 marks) (iv)Calculate the current gearing and the revised gearing after investment in the project, using market values and assuming the rights issue is successful.(2 marks) (v)Discuss the views of the directors,and both the small and large shareholders,in relation to the new project and its financing.(5 marks) One of Graffham Co's non-executive directors has suggested using Islamic finance,either a mudaraba contract or a musharaka contract,as an alternative to the rights issue. (b)Discuss the use of a mudaraba or musharaka contract as possible alternative sources of finance for the project.(6 marks) (20 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： Graffham Co (a)(i) Rights issue price=$8·40x(1-0·25)=$6·30 TERP($per share)=((5×$8·40)+(2x$6·30)/(5+2)=$7·80 (ii) Profit before interest and tax Finance costs(interest)($25m x8%) Profit before tax Taxation at 16% Profit after tax $000 (92,,500000) 7,500 (1.200) 6,300 Number of shares=$15m/$2=7·5 million Earnings per share =$6·3m/7·5 million =$0·84 (ii) Profit on new project=$20mx18%=$3·6m 32,,100000)11,100 (1,776)9,324$000 32,,100000) 11,100 (1,776) 9,324 Revised profit before interest and tax($9·5m+$3·6m) Finance costs(interest)($25mx8%) Revised profit before tax Taxation at 16% Profit after tax Number of shares issued=7·5 millionx2/5=3 million Revised number of shares =7·5 million +3million=10·5 million Revised earnings per share =$9·324m/10·5 million =$0·888 Price-earnings ratio before rightsissue=$8·40/$0·84=10 Revised share price =$0·888×10=$8·88 million x$8·40))=30·4%millionx$8·88))=22·8%(iv) Gearing before rights issue=($25mx1 ·10)/(($25mx1 ·10)+(7·5 million x$8·40))=30·4% millionx$8·88))=22·8% Gearing after rights issue=($25mx1 ·10)/(($25mx1 ·10)+(10·5 (v)Directors The curent level of gearing exceeds the average industry gearing,which does concern the directors.However,the rights issue's impact would be to take gearing below the industry average.The new gearing would give the directors some scope to obtain loan finance if they invest in future projects Small shareholders Small shareholders do not have to subscribe to the rights issue,they could always sell their rights.This would give them cash if they currently have a cash shortage.Selling their rights would lower their %shareholdings in Graffham Co.However,as their percentage holdings are already small,it would be unlikely to make any difference to the influence they have.They would benefit from a capital gain of $i1 ·08 per share($8·88-$7·80). Large shareholders The current operating profit margin((9,500/45,200)×100%)is 21%,which means the new project would not meet the large shareholders'criterion.However,the new project would earn profits and result in a capital gain,assuming the price-earnings ratio stayed the same.The project should result in a positive long-term increase in shareholder wealth,assuming it has a positive net present value.It should also act as a gateway to investing in further projects with higher profit margins in future. (b)Mudaraba A mudaraba contract is a profit-sharing arrangement for a venture between an investor and Graffham Co.The investor would be the sole provider of the capital.Management of the venture would be the sole responsibility of Graffham Co,reflecting Graffham Co's expertise in running profitable ventures.Under the mudaraba contract,profits generated would be shared in a pre-arranged ratio. Only the capital provider would bear any losses,but would only be liable to the extent of capital provided. Musharaka Under a musharaka contract Graffham Co,along with another investor or investors,would contribute capital to a joint venture. Net profits would be divided in pre-aranged ratios.Any losses would be borne by the partners in proportion to their net capital contributions.All parties could be involved in management of the venture,though they might choose not to be. Comments From Graffham Co's viewpoint,a musharaka contract would still mean that Graffham Co would have to contribute some capital, raising the issue of how this contribution would be financed.A mudaraba contract would have the advantages that the capital provider would contribute all the capital and bear all the losses,but would have no role in management. Both contracts should provide stability,as both should represent alonger-term investment and relationship with the other investors based on mutual interest and co-operation. The business operations under both types of contract would have to be run in compliance with Sharia law. Both arrangements would represent an effective provision of equity finance by external providers which would not give the external providers shareholdings in Graffham Co itself. However,the larger shareholders might not welcome the new project if the profit sharing ratio which Graffham Co negotiated, combined with the operating profit margin,did not appear to be adequate for the managerial resources committed.If a musharaka contract is used,the overall profit obtained must be suficient to compensate for the financial resources invested as well. 得分标准： (a)(0) Rightsissue price TERP (i) Finance cost Tax Number of shares EPS (i) Additional proft from new project Revised tax Revised number of shares Revised EPS Revised share price(iv) Current geRevised gaeringaring 高顿教育 Revised share price (v) Directors GOLDEN EDUCATION Small shareholders Large shareholders Other points (b) Description of mudaraba Description of musharaka Discussion of criteria affecting decision ···0 500-55 · · · 0 5 00-55 2 2 2·· 2 2 2 · 。 知识点标签：Equity finance-Right issue,TERP,EPS,Islamic finance,Debt finance-gearing ratio 难易程度：中 解析： (a)(i) 题干求的是配股之后每股的价格，因为当前的价格是每股$8.40,配股的价格是25% 的 discount, 所 以Right issue price等于$8.40x(1-0.25)=$6.30 (ii) 配股是2 for 5,所以每5股旧股可以配得2股新股，配股之后的总股数就是7根据TERP 除权价的计算公式得出TERP=$7.8 (iii) 求的是假设配股成功之后，投资项目对应的EPS 以及股价分别是多少.EPS 等于税后利 润除以总的股数。息税前利润是$9,500.公司的debt 是$25million, 对应8%的利息成本，所 以税前利润是$7,500.减去16%的税款就得出税后利润。 大股东接受配股的条件是配股后的收益符合新项目利润，所以先计算投资新项目的利润是 $20mx 18%=$3.6m.所以需要在原有利润的基础上再加$3.6m 的利润得到$13.1m. 一句这个 新的利润可以计算出Revised PAT是$9.324.2 for 5配股之后配得的股数是3million,所以配 股之后总的股数是$10.5million,在根据配股之前的PE ratio 即可得出修正之后的股价是 $8.88. (iv)求的是配股之前和配股之后的gearing ratio, 总 的Debt 不变，都是$25mx 1,1,但 是 Equity的股数和每股价格发生了变化。 (v) 分析董事长以及大小股东对于配股的态度。 对于董事长而言，当前的杠杆比例高于行业平均水平。配股的方式可以环节这个问题，当 杠杆比例下降之后，董事长就有机会获得新的债权融资。 对于小股东而言，他们没有必要去购买公司的配股，如果他们当前资金短缺，他们可以把 配股的权力卖出去。但是卖掉股票会降低他们在公司的股权比例，所以议价能力会下降。 卖掉能使他们获得$1.08的资本利得。 对于大股东而言，投资新项目无法满足他们的收益预期。但是谁假设PE ratio不变，新的 项目依然可以让大股东获得一定的利润。如果这个项目的净现值大于0,则有利于股东获 得长期的股价和财富的增长。 (b) 讨 论mudaraba or musharaka这两种融资方式。 Murdarada 是由投资者和公司进行合伙，投资者会成为资金的提供者，但是只提供资金， 没有任何的权利去干预日常的经营。公司提供项目的技术和管理经验，负责管理公司以及 项目。如果赚钱了就按照之前签合同的比例来分配，所由的亏损都归属于资金的提供者。 Musharaka 也是一种合伙，是一种股权融资，类似于风投的感觉.合伙人都会出钱也都会出 技术和经验，所有的利润和亏损都是共同承担的。 对于公司而言，如果使用Murdarada, 那么投资者会成为资金的唯一提供者，所以公司不 用出任何资金，只负责管理和运营即可。如果使用Musharaka, 公司依然是需要出一定的 资 金 。 两种融资方式都是比较稳定的，因为都体现了合伙人之间的互惠互利的原则，都是长期稳 定的融资方式。如果公司要使用伊斯兰融资方式必须遵守伊斯兰的相关法律。 站在大股东的视角，他们并不像和外部投资者共享收益，所以如果使用外部的融资方式需 要保证利润达到一定水平才能获得大股东的同意。 2023 MJ Q2 Gini Co 本题核心知识点：Investment appraisal Gini Co This scenario relates to three requirements. Gini Co is a listed company that manufactures innovative products for the telecommunications industry.Gini Co has just developed a new product called the LP500,which is expected to have a project life of four years. Gini Co's management has decided that the sales price for the LP500 will be $90 per unit,as anything higher than this will dramatically reduce the expected annual sales volume which is currently forecast to be 20,000 units per year. The variable cost of the LP500 includes the cost of a bought-in component,the X22.The price of the X22 has been volatile due to supply problems with the manufacturers and consequently,the variable cost per unit is at present uncertain.The management of Gini Co has made the following estimates of the variable cost per unit,along with its associated probability: Variable cost per unit Probability $ 40 50 60 70 % 20 40 20 20 Incremental fixed costs will be $300,000 per year. All of the above figures are expressed in current price terms.Sales price inflation is expected to be 5%per year.Variable cost per unit inflation and fixed cost inflation are both expected to be 3%per year. New plant and equipment costing $1.5m willneed to be purchased at the start of the first year of operation and is expected to have a residual value of $125,000,in nominal terms,at the end of year four.Gini Co pays corporation tax at a rate of 20%and tax is payable at the end of the year following the year to which it relates.The company can claim tax-allowable depreciation at a rate of25%per year on a reducing balance basis with a balancing adjustment in the year of disposal. Additional working capital totalling $100,000 will also be required at the start of the project.Working capital inflation is expected to be 3%per year. Additional working capital totalling $100,000 will also be required at the start of the project. Gini Co's nominal after-tax weighted average cost of capital for projects of this nature is 12%. (a)Calculate the expected net present value of the LP500 project and comment on its financial acceptability. method-Net present value 难易程度：中 解析： 题 目a 问要求计算项目的NPV 并评价其财务可行性。 首先我们需要列出NPV format, 并根据 format 按顺序从上往下进行计算。 首先需要计算nominal term 的 sales 、variable costs 以 及fixed costs(W1)。售价的 current price term 是90,通胀率为5%,用90×(1+5%)*可计算出每年的 nominal selling price, 再乘以销售量即可计算出 sales revenue。 Variable costs题干当中给到了不同概率下的值，我们需要先计算出variable costs的期望值。 Expected variable costs等于金额与概率相乘加总，可得出答案为54,之后按照3%的通胀率 进行计算即可。 Fixed costs 直接用current price term 300k,按照3%的通胀率进行计算。 其次，在计算税费时，因为题干提到是递延一年付税，所以税费和 tax benefit 都需要往后 递延一年。 第三，我们需要计算Tax benefit on TAD(W2),题目要求使用25%的加速折旧法，初始投 入是1500k, 先用每年的期初账面净值乘以25%计算出每年的TAD, 最后一年是倒算，减 去残值后，将所有剩下的折旧在最后一年进行抵扣。接下来用每年的TAD乘以税率20%即 可得出Tax benefit。 第四，我们需要计算增量的营运资本投资 (W3 )。期初需要的营运资本投资额为100k, 之 后按照3%的通胀率增长，我们计算每年增量的营运资本，最后一年进行回收。 计算出净现金流后按照12%的折现率进行折现，计算出PV,PV 加总得到NPV 为 8 0k。 最后进行评价：我们应该接受该项目，因为其NPV 为正数。 (b)(i)Briefly discuss how your decision in part(a)will help Gini Co achieve their primary objective. (2 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： Gini Co is a listed company and willtherefore be a for-profit organization with a primary objective to maximise shareholder wealth.A project's positive NPV represents the amount of total value added to the company by undertaking the project.Given the positive NPV of$80,000 for LP500(subject to the variable cost per unit),accepting the project will add $80,000 to the value of Gini Co and consequently,increase the shareholders'wealth. Note:Full credit given for any negative NPV recommendation to reject due to the reduction in shareholder wealth. 工 工得分标准： 工 工 (b)(i) State objective Impact of NPV 知识点标签：Financial management function-Financial objectives and relationship with corporate strategy-Identify and describe a variety of financial objectives,including: i)shareholder wealth maximization ii)profit maximizationiii)earnings per share growth. 难易程度：高 解 析： 题目要求讨论在a 问中做的决策(即投资该项目)是如何帮助公司实现首要目标的。 Gini公司是上市公司，所以我们可以判断其为营利性质的公司，首要目标应为最大化股东 财富(1分) 在 a 问中我们计算出该项目NPV 是80,000,为正数。所以投资该项目的决策能够提高公司 价值，从而增加股东财富(1分) (ii)Discuss THREE limitations of using probability analysis in deciding whether or not to proceed with the LP500. (6 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： Subjective probabilities Probability estimation ideally requires historic data of the event frequency in order to give any reliability to the figures.Even then,past frequency/probability is not necessarily an indication of the future frequency/probability.There is little detail regarding the source of the probabilities used to determine the expected variable cost and if these are little more than an educated guess,this would undermine the credibility of the expected figure calculated. Variability of the outcome The variability of the outcomes is being ignored in the decision as the EV of the variable costs of $54 per unit gives no indication of the best and worst case figures($40 and $70).Theis is a 40% (20%+20%)probability that the variable cost could actually be more than $54.If that was to happen.The impact on the NPV could be significant-at a variable cost per unit of $60,there would be an increase in total variable cost of $96,000 per year after tax(20,000*$6*0.8).Even without discounting,this would seem o indicate a negative NPV would result. Attitude to risk The previously highlighted problem of outcome variability would also mean that Gini Co's attitude to risk is also being ignored in its decision.If Gini Co has a cautious approach to risk, knowing that there could be a significant chance of negative NPV could result in it rejecting the project.On the other hand,a more adventurous approach to risk could see Gini Co being happier to accept the project,particularly with a 60%chance of variable cost per unit being less the $54 which would then increase the NPV further. Long-run average An expected value is essentially a long-run average over a sufficiently high number of repetitions and consequently may not be a possible outcome.Certainly,for the LP500 project,$54 as a unit variable cost is not one of the possible outcomes.There is no detail given as to whether the price volatility will be a regular/repetitive event or if it is one-off event which once resolved in the next year(say)results in the removal of the volatility for the remaining three years of the project. Note:only three limitations were asked for. 得分标准： (ii) First limitation Second limitation Third limitation 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Adjusting for Apply probability analysis to investment projects analysis in assisting investment decisions. 难易程度： 高 解析： 2 2 2 risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal- and discuss the usefulness of probability ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 题目要求讨论用概率分析来进行项目评估的三个问题。 · 概率主观性过高 进行概率分析时我们需要知道每种结果对应的概率，这主要是通过分析历史数据获得 的。但历史概率和未来概率两者之间并没有绝对的联系，所以会有一定误差。 · 未考虑结果的波动性 我们直接使用变动成本的期望值54,但这并未考虑到最差和最好的结果(70和40) . 根据题目给出的数据，我们可以发现有40%的概率变动成本会超过期望值54。如果变 动成本发生改变，会对NPV 的结果造成巨大的影响，甚至会导致出现负的NPV。 · 忽略了公司对风险的态度 概率分析忽略了公司对风险的态度。如果Gini 对风险比较保守，当知道项目出现负的 NPV 的概率较大时就会拒绝这个项目。而如果Gini 是激进型的，变动成本低于54的 概率有60%,会接受这个项目。 · 期望值是长期平均值 期望值是做无数次项目得到一系列结果后根据概率加权平均计算出的平均值，这个值 可能不会真的发生。也就是说，54的变动成本不是可能出现的结果之一。 上述四点只需描述三点即可。 1.2023 SDQ1 Pulorough Co 本题核心知识点：Investment appraisal (a)Discuss the difference between risk and uncertainty in the context of investment decisions. (3 marks) 题目类型：Wo rd 官方答案： Both risk and uncertainty deal with future situations where there are several possible outcomes arising from a decision to invest. Analysis of risk is possible in situations where probabilities can be assigned to different outcomes and mathematical techniques can be used for analysis.The probability of each outcome is often determined on the basis of past experience,which is the approach Pulorough Co's finance director has taken when calculating the expected values of sales.Risk increases as the variability of returns increases. Analysis of uncertainty applies to situations where it is not possible to assign probabilities to different outcomes.The position may be new or very different to what has happened before, so past experience cannot be used to determine probabilities.Uncertainty increases over time. Because economic conditions may change significantly and uncertainty therefore exists, Pulorough Co's finance director may have taken an incorrect approach when calculating the expected values of sales.Past results may not be relevant as a basis for the probabilities of future sales. 得分标准： Deine risk 1 Define uncertainty 1 Additional points 1 3 知识点标签：DInvestment appraisal-3.Adjusting for risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal-Risk and uncertainty 难易程度：中 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题考查的在投资评估中风险和不确定性的区别，解释的时候注意联系题干背景信息。 风险和不确定性都涉及投资决策可能产生的几种结果的未来情况。 风险评估的条件是事前可以知道所有可能的结果，且可以将概率分配给不同结果。每种结 果的概率通常是根据过去的经验确定的，这是Pulorough 公司的财务总监在计算销售预期 值时采用的方法。随着回报波动性的增加，风险也会增加。 不确定性分析适用于无法为不同结果分配概率的情况。不确定性随着时间的推移而增加。 由于经济状况可能会发生重大变化，因此存在不确定性，Pulorough 公司的财务总监在计算 预期销售额时可能采用了不正确的方法。过去的业绩可能无法作为未来销售概率的基础。 (b)(i)Calculate the nominal net present value of the investment project and comment on its financial acceptability; (5marks) 题目类型：Excel 官方答案： 1 $000 2 $000 3 Likelihood of outcomes Sensitivity analysis does not take into account the probabilities of outcomes occurring. Probability analysis shows how likely it is that outcomes will occur which will change the decision,such as the probability that an investment which is expected to have a positive net present value(NPV)will have a negative one. Decision-making Sensitivity analysis does not provide a simple indication of whether to undertake a project which is not expected to,but could,have a negative NPV.Sensitivity analysis indicates by how much variables willhave to change for a project to have a negative NPV,but that figure does not tell the decision-maker whether the project should go ahead.The decision-maker will need to assess subjectively whether the level of change in a variable needed to change a decision is too small given the level of uncertainty. Probability analysis can be used to calculate the expected NPV of the project,which can However,if the decision-maker is also concerned about the dispersal of results and the likelihood of a negative NPV,probability analysis does not provide a simple decision rule.Simple probability analysis indicates the probability of making a loss,but the decision-maker will have to decide whether the probability is too large for their risk appetite.More sophisticated risk analysis,using standard deviations,can measure volatility of outcomes,but again the decision-maker has to determine what an unacceptable result would be. Number of variables Simple sensitivity analysis involves isolating the impact of each variable on the outcome. Probability analysis,by contrast,can allow for more than one variable changing by combining their probabilities and can also allow for the probabilities of different variables changing being interdependent. 得分标准： Sensitivity analysis Probability analysis Likelihood outcomes Decision making Number of variables Additional points 1 6 知识点标签：DInvestment appraisal-1.Investment appraisal techniques -Net present value 难易程度：中 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 本题考查敏感性分析和可能性分析，要求对比两种分析方法在应对不止一种可能结果时， 如果帮助公司进行投资决策。 这里需要分别解释这两种方法。然后比较两种方法在分析评估风险和不确定性时的差异。 可以从概率、决策支持和变量数量等方面展开讨论。 2.2023 SDQ1 Marble Co 本题核心知识点：Business finance (a)Using market values,calculate the after-tax weighted average cost of capital of Marble Co. (11 marks) 题目类型：Excel 官 方 答 案： Cost of equity Dividend growth rate =(0·84/0·69)^0·25-1)x 100=5·0% Ex dividend share price=11-93-0·84=$11-09 per share Ke=[((0·84x1·05)/11·09)+0·05]x100%=13·0% Cost of preference shares Kp=100x(0·25x1·00)/2·27=11·0% Cost of convertible loan notes After-tax interest payment=6·5x(1-0·26)=$4-81 per loan note Conversion value=11·09x1·065×8=14·84x8=$11873 per loan note The conversion value of $118·73 per loan note is greater than the redemption value of $100·00 per loan note and,as shareholders are assumed to choose the option that maximises their wealth,conversion is expected to occur. Market values $m Ordinary shares 226m x11·09= 2,506·34 Preference shares 20mx2·27= 45·40 Loan notes 94mx 107·11/100= 100·68 2,652·42 WACC calculation WACC=[(2,506·34x13·0)+(45·40x11-0)+(100·68×6·4)]/2,652·42=12·7% 得 分 标 准： Dividend growth calculation Cost of equity Cost of preference shares Convertible value Cost of debt Market value of equity 1 0.5 Market value of preference shares Market value of debt WACC calculation 0.5 0.5 1.5 11 知识点标签：E Business finance-2.Estimating the cost of capital-The calculation\assumptionsladavatanges and disadvantages of DVM model;Cost of preference shares; Cost of convertible debt;Calculation of WACC 难易程度：中 解 析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题考查的是以市场价值为权重，计算企业的加权平均资本成本。 解题思路首先是分析清楚公司的资本有哪几部分构成，分别计算这几个部分的资本成本和 市场价值。 根据Marble 公司资本结构，目前公司的资本由普通股，优先股和可转换债券三部分构成。 · 普通股 对于普通股的资本成本，按照题目条件给出的股息信息，需要按照股息估值模型计算权益 资金成本的价值，计算时是依据四年的股息的平均派发水平预测增长率g、除息价$11.09 和20X8 年的股息$0.84。需要将20X8年还没有派发的股息从含息价$11.93中剔除，才能计 算出除息价。 股票的市场价值，也是用除息价$11.09乘以股票数量计算得出。 ● 优先股 对于优先股，其资本成本直接用优先股股息除以股价$2.27。 优先股的股息等于优先股股利25%乘以优先股的名义价值$1.00。 · 可转换债券 对于可转换债券的资本成本，需要先推导出可转债投资者在持有可转换债券期间可以获得 现金流(需要判断可转债到期那年是转换成股票还是按照约定的名义价值赎回),然后站在 融资方的角度进行评估，计算方法可以用和IRR 的计算方法一致的线性插值法，任取两个 折现率对于上述现金流进行折现推导，或者用excel 的 IRR 公式对于上述现金进行流推导。 需要注意的是year 1-5每年的现金流是interest*(1-Tax rate),即税后化的利息，所以计算出 来直接是可转债税后化的资本成本。 可转债的市场价值，则是用每支名义价值$100的可转换债券按照市场价值$107.11乘以数 量进行推导。 · 加权平均资本成本 各个成分的市场价值和资本成本计算完成后，就以市场价值为权重，乘以各自的资本成本， 计算出企业目前税后的加权平均资本成本。 (b) (4 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： Risk One of the commonly suggested weaknesses of the dividend growth model(DGM)in calculating the cost of equity is that the model does not consider risk,but this is only true in explicit terms.The model considers risk implicitly because the risk faced by a company is reflected in its share price:for example,an increase in risk will lead to a decrease in the share price and hence an increase in the cost of equity calculated by the DGM. In calculating the cost of equity,therefore,a clear advantage of the capital asset pricing model(CAPM)over the DGM is that the CAPM explicitly considers risk,specifically systematic risk since the model assumes that all investors hold diversified portfolios.The CAPM therefore calculates what the cost of equity should be for the systematic risk faced by ordinary shareholders. Dividend growth rate Another important weakness of the DGM is that the dividend growth rate is assumed to be constant,when experience shows that,historically,it changes frequently.In the case of Marble Co,for example,the dividend growth rate in successive years has been 5.8%, 6·8%,2-6%and 5·0%,the arithmetic mean is 5·05%and the geometric mean is 5.·0%.Which historical dividend growth rate best represents the future dividend growth rate? DGM weaknesses Further suggested weaknesses of the DGM are that the model ignores taxation and issue costs,but the model can be modified to consider both factors.Another criticism is that the model implies that a company has no value if it does not pay dividends,but the model can be applied at that future point from which dividends are paid,with the calculated future share price being discounted back to the present day to give a current share price. CAPM weaknesses An important weakness of the CAPM is that it can be difficult to firmly establish values for the model's key variables:the equity risk premium,the risk-free rate of return and the equity beta.The equity risk premium is found from statistical analysis of historical data over long periods of time and different studies can provide different values. Determining the risk-free rate of return is hampered by the fact that a risk-free asset does not exist;a substitute such as the yield on short-dated government debt is used instead.The equity beta is derived from statistical analysis of historic data and therefore cannot be assumed to predict future values with any certainty.While beta values are assumed to be constant,experience shows that they change on a regular basis. In a perfect world with perfect data,both the DGM and the CPM should give the same value for the cost of equity 得分标准： Risk Dividend growth rate DGM discussion CAPM discussion 1 4 知识点标签：E Business finance-2.Estimating the cost of capital-The calculation\ assumptions \adavatanges and disadvantages of DVM model;The calculation \assumptions \ adavatanges and disadvantages of CAPM 难易程度：中 解析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题的要求是讨论CAPM 相较于DGM 模型在计算Ke 时的相对优势。因为是讨论，所以 我们需要针对DGM 和 CAPM 在计算Ke 时的优缺点进行展开。 在计算股权成本时，股息增长模型 (DGM) 的一个常见弱点是该模型没有考虑风险，而资 本资产定价模型 (CAPM) 明确考虑了风险，特别是系统风险，因为该模型假设所有投资 者持有多样化的投资组合。因此，资本资产定价模型计算普通股股东面临的系统性风险的 权益成本。CAPM 的问题是很难确定模型关键变量的值：股票风险溢价、无风险回报率和股 票贝塔系数。 DGM的另一个重要弱点是股息增长率被假设为常数，而经验表明，历史上它经常变化。历 史股息增长率不一定能代表未来的股息增长率。而且 DGM 忽略了税收和发行成本，同时 DGM 也不适用于评估不支付股息的公司的Ke。 在一个拥有完美数据的完美世界中，DGM 和CPM 应该对股权成本给出相同的价值 (c)Explain finance. the connection between the creditor hierarchy and the relative costs of sources of ONLINE DELV (5 marks) 题目类型：Word 官方答案： The creditor hierarchy gives the order of preference for the settlement of financial claims when a company is liquidated.In relation to sources of finance,the higher the position in the creditor hierarchy,the greater the chance of receiving a full settlement of financial liability. At the top of the creditor hierarchy in relation to sources of finance is secured debt, such as loan notes or bank loans with a fixed charge over the non-current assets of the company being liquidated.The providers of this kind of finance face the lowest relative risk of non-settlement of their financial claims and so require the lowest relative return on the finance they have provided.Theoretically,therefore,the before-tax cost of secured debt should be the lowest before-tax cost of capital of a company. Ranking below secured debt in the creditor hierarchy is unsecured debt,such as unsecured loan notes or bank loans which do not have a charge over any non-current assets of the company being liquidated.The providers of this kind of finance face a higher risk of non-settlement of their financial claims than secured debt and so require a higher rate of return on finance provided.Theoretically,therefore,the befern-tax cost of capital of unsecured debt is higher than the before-tax cost of cap可 debt. Ranking below unsecured debt in the creditor hierarchy are preference shares,which commonly pay a fixed percentage of their nominal value as a dividend.The preference dividend must be paid in full before any ordinary dividends are paid and,in liquidation, preference share capital must be repaid before payment is made to ordinary shareholders.Preference shareholders therefore face a higher risk of non-settlement of their financial claims than secured or unsecured debt and the cost of capital of preference shares is therefore theoretically higher than the before-tax cost of debt. At the bottom of the creditor hierarchy,ranking below secured and unsecured debt and preference shares,are ordinary shares.Only when all the other financial claims have been met can any payment be made to ordinary shareholders,who therefore carry the highest relative risk of non-payment.Ordinary shareholders therefore require the highest level of return of any provider of finance to a company and theoretically, therefore,the cost of equity is higher than either the cost of preference shares or the before-tax cost of debt The costs of capital for Marble Co illustrate this hierarchy,as the cost of equity is 13·0%, the cost of preference shares is 11·0%and the before-tax cost of secured debt is 7·8%. 得分标准： Explain hierarchyCost of secured debt Explain hierarchy Cost of secured debt 教育CATIONCost of unsecured debt 教育 CATION Cost of preference shares Cost of equity 知识点标签：E Business finance-3.Sources of finance and their relative costs-Creditor hierarchy;2.Estimating the cost of capital; 难易程度：难 解 析： 以下是对官方答案的思路简化，可供同学参考： 本题的要求是解释资金偿付等级和资金成本之间的关系。 偿付等级制度规定了公司清算时清偿的优先顺序。偿付等级越靠前，获得全额清偿的机会 就越大，这些资金提供方所面临的风险就越低，所以要求的回报也就相应越小。 接下来就按照清偿顺序，分别对抵押担保的债务，无抵押担保的债务，优先股和普通股进 行解析，就这种类型资金的风险、回报以及对于融资方企业来说的资金成本展开说明，最 好能够结合Marble 公司目前的情况进行分析。 Marble 公司的股权成本为13 . 0%,优先股成 本为11.0%,担保债务的税前成本为7.8%,印证了资金偿付等级越靠后，资金成本越高的 这个结论。

stem_zh: 1. The following are extracts from the financial statements ofInci Co: Sm Revenue 2,780 Cost of sales 1,612 Inventory 226 Trade receivables 417 Trade payables 198 10%of Inci Co's sales,by value,are on cash terms. Purchases for the year totalled $1,451m. Assume a 365-day year. Calculate Inci Co's inventory holding period,trade receivables collection period and trade payables payment period (all calculations should be to the nearest day). Inventory holding period(days) Trade receivables collection period(days) Trade payables payment period(days) Days Days 45 50 51 55 57 61 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 4 分值：2 题目类型：匹配题 答 案 ： 51 days (inventory holding period) 61 days(trade receivables collection period) 50 days(trade payables payment period) 解 析 ： 题目考察的是营运资本中存货周转天数、应收账款周转天数和应付账款周转天数的计算。 存货周转天数inventory holding period=365 days× 平均存货持有水平inventory / 存货成本 Cost of sales 应收账款周转天数 trade receivable collection period=365 days× 平均应收账款持有水平 trade receivable/ 赊销收入credit sales 应付账款周转天数 trade payable payment period =365 days× 平均应付账款持有水平 inventory/ 存货成本Cost of sales 由于本题的销售收入中有10%是现金销售，所以剩下的90%都是属于赊销收入 Credit sales=2,780m×90%=2,502m Cost of sales=1,612m Inventory holding period=($226m/$1,612m)×365=51 days Trade receivables collection period=($417m/$2,502m)×365=61 days Trade payables payment period=($198m/$1,451m)×365=50 days 知识点标签：C Working capital management-2.Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash -Inventory turnover ratio,average collection period and average payable period 难易程度：中

2. BeachLitter is a charity that was set up with the objective of cleaning litter from all beaches within the local area. Which TWO of the following performance measures would best fit with effectiveness in a value for money audit? A Average hours worked to clean each beach B Number of beaches awarded the government's clean beach certification CAverage annual expenditure on each successfully cleaned beach D Average hours worked by each volunteer per month EAmount of litter cleared each year measured in tonnes 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选题 答案：Band E 解 析 ： 题目考察的是对于非盈利组织的 value for money 目标中effectiveness 有效性的理解和应用。 有效性衡量一个组织实现其目标的成功程度。 在本题中，BeachLitter 这个非盈利组织的目标是将当地所有海滩上的垃圾清理掉。 A 选项，清理每个海滩的平均工作时长。这个衡量的是economic, 考察的是投入的花费。 B 选项，获得政府清洁海滩风筝标志的海滩数量；这个衡量的是effectiveness, 考察的是这 个组织目标的达成情况。 C 选项，每个清理成功的海滩的平均年化支出；这个衡量的是efficiency, 考察的是投入转 化为产出的情况。 D 选项，每个志愿者每个月的平均工作时长；这个衡量的是economic, 考察的是投入的花 费。 E 选项，每年清理的垃圾量(以吨为单位)。这个衡量的是effectiveness, 也是考察组织目 标的 获得政府清洁海滩风筝标志的海滩数量和每年清理的垃圾量是衡量有效性的正确选项，所以 答案选择B 和 E。 知识点标签：A.Financial management function-4.Financial and other objectives in not-for-profit organisations -Ways of measuring the achievement of objectives 难易程度：中

3. Kaya Co is expecting to borrow $25m in three months'time.The loan will be for a four-month period.Kaya Co is concerned that interest rates could rise over the next three months so it wants to fix the rate of interest now with a forward rate agreement(FRA)and has obtained the following quotes: 3v44.6%-4.9% 3v74.7%-5.0% Assuming the interest rate is 5.3%in three months'time,what will be the financial settlement under the FRA? A.$25,000 B.$33,333 C.$50,000 D.$75,000 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 3 分值：2 题目类型：单项题 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是远期利率协议对冲借款利率的上涨风险。 远期利率协议是OTC 场外交易合约，严格匹配需要对冲的利率风险敞口。所以对于三个月 后开始，为期四个月的这个利率风险敞口，选择第三个月开始，第七个月结束的远期利率协 议，也就是3v7 FRA4.7%-5.0%。 由于对冲的是借款利率，按照对自己不利的选，使用的FRA 利率是5%。由于这个是年化利 率，需要乘以4/12转化成4个月的利率。 而远期利率协议实际需要结算的是与实际汇率之间的差额部分，所以只有0.3%(=5.3%- 5.0%)这部分需要与FRA 的签约行进行结算。 所以最终结算的的金额是0.3%×$25m×4/12=$25,000 知识点标签： G.Risk Management-4.Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-Forward rate agreements 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 4. Shadow Co orders goods from a foreign supplier.A payment of f400,000 is due to the supplier in four months'time.The financial manager is concerned that the cost of the goods may rise in dollar terms and has decided to hedge the foreign currency risk of the payment due. The following information has been provided by the company's bank: Spot rate(fper $) 0.790-0.795 Four month forward rate(£per$) 0.775-0.783 What is the amount payable,in dollars,using a forward market hedge(to the nearest dollar)? $. 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report SectionA Example 4 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：16129 解 析 ： 题目考察的是外汇远期对冲汇率波动风险。 对于四个月后的外币应付款，选择使用OTC 场外交易合约，也就是Four month forward rate。 按照对自己不利的选择，所以选择0.775(£ per $)这个汇率。 这笔英镑应付款，折算的本币应付款的数量是f400,000/0.775=$516,129.0323 答案要求取整，所以答案是16129。 知识点标签：G.Risk Management-3.Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk -Forward exchange contracts 难易程度：低

5. Directive Co finances its working capital with an overdraft at a cost of 7%per year.Its major supplier offers a discount of 0.5%for settlement of invoices after 10 days rather than the usual 30 days. Assume 365 days in a year. Which statement correctly explains what Directive Co should do? A.Pay in 10 days because at 9.1%per year the benefit of the discount exceeds the cost of the overdraft B.Pay in 30 days because at 9.1%per year the discount is more expensive than the overdraft C.Pay in 30 days because at 6.1%per year the benefit of the discount is less than the cost of the overdraft D.Pay in 10 days because at 6.1%per year the discount is cheaper than the overdraft 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report Section A Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是应付账款管理中，对于供应商提供的提前付款折扣，企业是否接受。 选项A 正确，10天内付款，因为提前付款折扣带来的收益9.1%超过透支的成本。这句话 是正确的。判断企业是否接受供应商的提前付款折扣，我们会将营运资本的资金成本，比如 在这道题中就是企业透支需要承担的资金成本7%,与企业收到的供应商提供的提前付款折 扣对应的年化利率进行比较。因为供应商提供的提前付款折扣对于企业来说，就是提起结算 可以优惠的金额，所以是好处，它对应的年化利率相当于收益。如果该收益高于资金成本， 那么选择接受提前付款折扣会比较划算；如果该收益低于资金成本，那么选择放弃供应商提 供的提前付款折扣，晚点付款会更划算。 这道题中，供应商提供的提前付款折扣是0.05%,提前20天付款。那么这20天对应的年化 利率就是0.5%×365/20=9.125%约等于9.1%。由于收益9.1%>7%资金成本，所以接受供 应商提供的提前付款折扣对企业来说更划算。 选项B 错误，30天内付款，因为折扣带来的收益率9.1%比透支利率高。折扣带来的是收 益好处，比投资利率这个成本高，就应该选择接受供应商的提前付款折扣而在10天内付款， 而不是30天付款，所以选项B 错误。 选项C 错误，30天内付款，因为折扣带来的收益率6.1%比透支利率低。折扣带来的收益率 是9.1%,不是6.1%=5%×365/30。我们计算折扣带来的收益率是需要以缩短的天数，也就 是30-10=20为基础进行计算。所以选项C 错误。 选项D 错误，10天内付款，因为折扣带来的收益率6.1%比透支利率低。折扣带来的收益率 不是6. 1%,是9. 1%,所以选项D 错误。 知识点标签： Working capital management -Management of accounts payable and cash-Offering early settlement discounts 难易程度：中 inventories,accounts receivable, ONUNE DELIVERY-PLATINUM

stem_zh: 6. Which TWO of the following hedging techniques can be used by an investor to protect against a fall in interest rates? 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report SectionAExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选题 A.Money market hedge B.Interest rate collar C.Interest rate cap D.Interest rate floor 答案：B and D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对冲利率下跌风险的衍生品。 选项A 错误，货币市场套期保值，用于对冲汇率波动风险，所以错误。 选项B 正确，利率双领期权，是买一个利率期权(比如 cap) 的同时，卖一个反向利率期权 (比如floor), 既可以用于应对利率下跌风险，又同时可以应对利率上涨风险。 选项C 错误，利率cap, 可用于应对利率上涨的风险，不适用于本题要求的场景。 选项D 正确，利率floor, 可用于应对利率下跌风险。 知识点标签：Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-Main types of interest rate derivatives 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 7. Togue Co is investigating how often it should replace its company car fleet.It is considering replacement every two,three,four or five years.Cash flow estimates have been compiled and the following negative NPVs have been obtained,based on Togue Co's cost of capital of 11%: Years to replacement Negative NPV $ 2 149,308 3 209,142 4 254,893 5 310,860 Using the annuity tables provided,if Togue Co adopts the optimal replacement cycle, what willbe the equivalent annual cost (to the nearest dollar)? 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report SectionA Example 3 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：S82,170
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是约当年均成本Equivalent annual cost 的计算，并根据结果判断设备最优 的更换频率。 Equivalent annual costs(EAC)=PV of cost/Annuity factor for the life of project 这道题的PV of cost 就是Negative NPV,Annuity factor for the life of project 也就是设备的预 计使用年限，即Years to replacement。 2 year cycle EAC=149,308/1.713=$87,162 3 year cycle EAC=209,142/2.444=$85,574 4 year cycle EAC=254,893/3.102=$82,170(lowest) 5 year cycle EAC=310,860/3.696=$84,107 四个方案中， EAC 最小的方案，就是最优方案。所以企业每4年更换一次设备，约当年均 成本最低，每年$82,170。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Investment appraisal -Specific investment decisions(Lease or buy,asset replacement,capital rationing)-Evaluate asset replacement decisions using equivalent annual cost and equivalent annual benefit. 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 8. Select the type of financial market appropriate to each of the company's needs. Amby Co needs to convert foreign currency into domestic currency FOREIGN EXCHANGE MARKET EURO CURRENCY MARKET Benji Co needs to issue new ordinary shares PRIMARY CAPITAL MARKET SECONDARY CAPITAL MARKET Carlo Co needs to purchase short-term over-the-counter derivatives PRIMARY MONEY MARKET SECONDARY MONEY MARKET DillCo needs to issue new long-term loan notes CAPITAL MARKET MONEY MARKET 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report Section A Example 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 答案：Foreign exchange market,Primary capital market,Primary money market and Capital market Amby Co needs to convert foreign currency into domestic currency FOREIGN EXCHANGE MARKET EURO CURRENCY MARKET Benji Co needs to issue new ordinary EN shares PRIMARY CAPITAL MARKET SECONDARY CAPITAL MARKET Carlo Co needs to purchase short-term over-the-counter derivatives PRIMARY MONEY MARKET SECONDARY MONEY MARKET Dill Co needs to issue new long-term loan notes CAPITAL MARKET MONEY MARKET
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对金融市场分类的理解和运用。 第一条，Amby 公司需要将外币转换成本币，是在外汇交易市场进行，而不是欧洲货币市场。 欧洲货币市场处理的是短期外币借贷。 第二条，Benji 公司需要发行新股，是在一级资本市场进行，而不是二级资本市场。 一级市场处理的是新发行的金融工具的交易流通，二级市场处理的是现存的，在市场中已经 交易过一轮的金融工具的交易流通。 第 三 条 ，Carlo 公司需要购买短期场外交易衍生品，是在一级货币市场进行，而不是二级货 币市场。原因是场外交易衍生品都是按照客户的个性化需求定制的，是被创造出来新发行的 金融工具，所以在一级市场交易流通。 第四条，Dill 公司需要发生新的长期债务，是在资本市场，而不是货币市场进行。因为资本 市场上交易的都是中长期的金融工具，货币市场上交易的是短期的金融工具。 知识点标签： Financial management environment-The nature and role of financial markets and 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION institutions -Nature and role of money and capital markets 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 9. Abrar Co has 6%convertible loan notes in issue with a floor value of $106.20 per $100 loan note. Each loan note can be converted into 15 ordinary shares at any time or redeemed in five years' time at nominal value. What is the minimum share price at which investors would convert their loan notes (to two decimal places)? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report SectionAExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：$7.08
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是可转债的运作原理，要求计算出可转债投资人选择行使转换权时的最低 股价时多少，答案要求保留两位小数。 可转债的投资人在可转债到期时需要判断是否行使转换权，判断的依据就是看可转债的到期 赎回价值和转换价值哪个更高。 题目条件提供了可转债的保底价值(floor value)$106.20,这个价值就是可转债按照赎回价赎 回这个场景下，可转债投资者在未来可以受到的所有现金流入(包括五年内每年可以收到的 票面利息和第五年的赎回价$100)的现值之和。 所以这个保底价值就是判断是否行使转换权的那个临界值，只要可转债到期那天的转化价值 大于等于保底价值，那么可转债的投资人一定会选择行使转换权。 可转债的转换价值等于可转债到期时的股价与可转换的股数两者相乘，所以用保底价值除以 可转债可转换的股数，就可以得出投资者行使转换权的最低股价=$106.20/15=$7.08 知识点标签：Business valuations-The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Discuss and apply appropriate valuation methods -Convertible debt 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 10. A state funded hospital has the objective of providing value for money.It measures the achievement of this objective using the three E's(economy,effectiveness and efficiency). Which of the following performance indicators measures the hospital's economy? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.Number of patients admitted per year B.Total medical staff salary cost C.Cost per successfully treated patient D.Average waiting time for patient admission to hospital 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察衡量非营利组织的3E 的应用，题目要求选择符合 Economic 的选项。 Economic 指的是经济性，在不影响品质的情况下，尽可能降低投入上的花销。 由于这个是一家由国家资助的医院，对于医院来说，投入就是医务人员的劳务报酬。所以选 项 B 反映的是经济型，所以是正确的。 选项A 错误，每年收治的患者人数，这个属于产出。 选项C 错误，每个治疗好的病人身上的花销，这个反映的是效率 Efficiency 这块，它呈现的 是输入转化为输出的效率如何。 选项D 错误，病人入院的平均等待时间，这个时间如果满足特定目标的话，反映的是效果 effectiveness 这块。 知识点标签： Financial management function -Financial and other objectives in not-for-profit organisations -Discuss ways of measuring the achievement of objectives in not-for-profit organisations 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 11. A machine costing $450,000 has a useful life of six years,after which time its estimated present value of resale will be $25,800.The present value of the total running costs over the next six years is $82,280. The company's cost of capital is 10% What is the equivalent annual cost of using the machine if it were bought and replaced every six years in perpetuity(to the nearest dollar)? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report SectionA Example 3 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：S116,299
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是约当年均成本 Equivalent annual cost 的计算。 题目中设备的初始投入成本是$450,000,残值的现值是$25,800,6年内容所有维护成本的现 值是$82,280,所以总的成本花费的现值是=$450,000+$82,280-$25,800=$506,480。 设备的预计可使用年限是6年，按照10%的折现率，取6年的年金系数4.355,所以均摊到每 一年的成本 Equivalent annual cost=$506,480/4.355=$116,299 知 识 点 标 签 ：Investment appraisal -Specific investment decisions(Lease or buy,asset replacement,capital rationing)-Evaluate asset replacement decisions using equivalent annual cost and equivalent annual benefit. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 12. A financial manager believes that if information regarding his organisation is made public,it will not affect the share price as this information is already reflected in the current share price. In terms of capital market efficiency,to which of the following does the financial manager's belief relate? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report SectionAExample 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.Weak form efficiency B.No efficiency C.Strong form efficiency D.Semi-strong form efficiency 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对于有效市场假说的理解。 题目中的财务经理认为如果有关组织的信息一经公开，股价不会受到影响，因为这些信息已 经体现在当前的股价中了。这是强势有效市场的特征，无论信息公开与否(未公开的属于内 幕消息),都会快速公允的体现在股价上。所以答案选择C。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares -Distinguish between and discuss weak form efficiency, semi-strong form efficiency and strong form efficiency 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 13. Tryde Co is a listed company which has 800 million ordinary shares in issue. Yesterday the ordinary share price closed at $6.00.Two days earlier,the board of directors approved the launch of two new innovative products,but this has not been publicly announced. Product A has an NPV of $40m.The decision to launch product A will be announced publicly tomorrow.Product B has an NPV of $160m.The decision to launch product B willbe announced publicly this morning.Assume allother things are equal and that the capital markets believe the projected NPVs.Both products will be financed using internally generated funds. What will the ordinary share price be at the end of today if the capital market is(1) semi-strong form efficient and (2)strong form efficient? 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report SectionA Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 Share price Semi-strong form efficient market Strong form efficient market $6.00 $6.05 $6.20 $6.25 答案：The correct answers are(1)$6.20 and(2)$6.00
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是半强有效市场以及强有效市场对于市场信息的反应以及在半强有效市场 中，市场基于相关信息对股票进行估值，考虑公司过往的业绩和发布的信息。随着今天新闻 的发布，股价将对产品B 的净现值作出反应。增加将为1.6亿美元/8亿股=每股0.20美元， 使股价升至6.20美元。而在强有效市场中，股价反映了已公布的历史信息信息和内幕信息。 6.00美元的股价已经反映了公司的净现值。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares-Distinguish between and discuss weak form efficiency, semi-strong form efficiency and strong form efficiency 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 14. Which of the following statements about an over-the-counter interest rate option are correct? (1)It is an agreement with a financial institution (2)It can be traded (3)An immediate premium is payable (4)It must be exercised 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A 1 and 2 only B1 and 3 C3 and 4 D1,2 and 4 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是期权相关的知识点。场外期权是指与金融机构签订的期权协议(对应描 述1),在购买时就需要支付期权费(对应描述3),现应的场外期权的购买者就获得了一 份权利而非义务，往往是在在实际利率朝着不利于期权购买方的情况下，场外期权的购买者 可以选择行权保护自己的利益，不过行权不是必须的(所以描述4错误)。然而，由于它是 场外交易产品OTC, 是按照客户个性化的需求定制的，所以不能被转手交易(所以描述2 错误)。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk -Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 15. Which FOUR of the following descriptions relate to the main macroeconomic policy objectives? 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report SectionA Example 3 分值：2 题目类型：多选 A Ensuring minimum amounts of price increases B Increasing national income and living standards C Ensuring a balanced ratio of imports to exports D Maintaining interest rates at minimum levels E Balancing government spending with tax receipts F Ensuring a stable and fully employed labor force ONLINE DELIVERY·PLATINUM 答案：A,B,C,F
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是宏观经济政策目标的知识点。A 、B 、C 和 F 都是主要的宏观经济政策 目标。但是，D 选项将利率维持在最低水平是一项货币政策；E 选项目标平衡政府支出是一 项财政政策。这两种都属于经济调控的具体手段，而并非是经济政策的目标。 知识点标签： Financial management environment -The economic environment for business - Identify and explain the main macroeconomic policy targets 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 16. Beaver Co has 100 million equity shares in issue and has just reported a profit,after tax,of $55m. A new issue of 50 million equity shares at an issue price of$1.50 is being considered.All proceeds would be used to redeem a bank loan with an annual cost of 8%. Beaver Co pays corporation tax at a rate of8%. Assume that operating profit(profit before interest and tax)remains constant. If the equity issue goes ahead and the bank loan is redeemed,what willbe the new earnings per share figure? 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report SectionA Example 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$0.399 B $0.367 C$0.598 D $0.388 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是每股收益的计算。 解题思路：EPS 的计算需要分别计算出 revised earning和 revised numbers of shares。 由于新增发的新股偿还掉了bank loan, 所以每年的earning 因为这笔bank loan 的偿付而节 约下来一笔interest(按照 bank loan 8%的利率计提),而这个好处需要记得交税. Revised earning(税后利润)=$55m(现有的)+(50 million*$1.50*8%*(1-20%) (还债带来的利息 变少的好处)=$59.8m Revised EPS=$59.8m/(100 million+50 million)=0.399美元 知 识 点 标 签 ：Financial management function -Financial objectives and relationship with corporate strategy -Identify and describe a variety of financial objectives 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 17. In relation to the return on capital employed (ROCE)investment appraisal method,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A ROCE leads to better investment decisions since it uses accounting profit rather than estimated cash flows B Investment projects with a ROCE greater than the weighted average cost of capital should be accepted C Investment projects with a ROCE less than the current ROCE of an organisation should be rejected D ROCE takes into account all years of operation of an investment project 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察 ROCE 的优缺点，要求选择正确的选项。 选项A 错误。ROCE 是基于会计利润的指标，会计利润容易被管理层操纵，因此不如基于 现金流的项目评估方法，如NPV。 选项B 错误。我们是否接受某个项目取决于该项目的ROCE 是否达到了我们的目标，不是 和 WACC 进行比较。 选项C 错误。我们是否接受某个项目取决于该项目的ROCE 是否达到了我们的目标，而不 是和现有的 ROCE 进行对比。 选项D 正确。ROCE 考虑了整个项目周期，没有考虑整个项目周期的方法是 payback period 回收期法。 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques-Calculate return on capital employed (accounting rate of return)and discuss its usefulness as an investment appraisal method. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 18. A large,listed company is to issue 90-day commercial paper with a nominal value of $10m.Each paper will have a nominal value of$100,000. The annual required rate of return is 4%assuming a 365-day year. What will be the issue price of each paper? 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report SectionAExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$99,023 GOLDEN EDUCATIONB$96,154 GOLDEN EDUCATION C$99,014 D$96,000 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察商业票据的发行价格计算。 ONLINE DELIVERY·PLATINUM 商业票据属于折价发行原价赎回的金融工具，投资者的回报来源于发行价格和票面价值之差 该商业票据的回报率为4%,期限为90天，每张票据的票面价值为100,000. 因此我们可以得到式子：发行价格x(1+0.04×90/365)=100,000 发行价格=$100,000/(1+(0.04x90/365))=$99,023 因此选择A。 知识点标签：Financial management environment -The nature and role of money market-Explain and apply the characteristics and role of the principal money market instruments 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 19. Match the characteristic below with the appropriate working capital strategy. 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report SectionAExample 3 分值：2 题目类型：连线 答案： Conservative investment strategy-Relatively high level of current assets Aggressive investment strategy -Relatively low level of current assets Aggressive financing strategy -Relatively large amounts of short-term finance Conservative financing strategy -Relatively small amounts of short-term finance
explanation_zh: 题目考察营运资本的投融资政策，要求匹配对应的选项。 营运资本投资政策和流动资产的多少有关，拥有较多的流动资产属于保守的营运资本投资政 策，相反拥有较少的流动资产代表着激进的营运资本投资政策。营运资本的融资政策则代表 长期融资和短期融资的比例。如果用了更多的短期融资，更少的长期融资属于激进的营运资 本融资政策，反之属于保守的营运资本融资政策。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Working capital management -Determining working capital needs and funding strategies 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 20. A company has announced that it will pay an annual dividend equal to 55%of earnings.Its earnings per share is $0.80 and it has ten million shares in issue.The return on equity is 20%and the current cum div share price is $4.60. What is the cost of equity? 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 4 分值：2 题目类型：单 选 A19.4% B 20.5% C 28.0% D 22.7% 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察用DVM模型计算股权融资的成本。 题目说到公司会将 earnings 的55%去发放股息，公司今年的EPS 是0.8,因此我们可以计算 出公司今年即将要付的每股股息也就是D0 等于$0.44($0.80x55%)。 可以根据股息支付率55%计算出公司的留存比例为45%(100%-55%),ROE 等 于 2 0 % , 因 此可以计算出股息增长率等于9%(g=br=45%x20%) 带入DVM 模型的公式中， ke=[($0.44x1.09/($4.60-$0.44)+0.09]=20.5%。 其中我们需要额外注意的是PO 应为除权价，而题目中给到的4.6是含权价，需要将股息0.44 减去算出除权价。 知识点标签：Business finance-Estimating the cost of capital-application of the dividend growth model,its assumptions,advantages and disadvantages. 难易程度： 高

stem_zh: 21. 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION The expected future spot rate in one year is 1.4505 euro per$1.The predicted inflation rates for the year ahead are: Eurozone Dollar 2%per year 3.5%per year What is the current spot rate(to four decimal places)? euro per$1 原题来源：2021/MJ Examiner's report SectionA Example 1 分值：2 题目类型： 填空题 答案：1.4718
explanation_zh: 题目考察购买力平价理论，要求根据该理论求出即期汇率。 根据购买力评价理论， ,题目已知S1 为1.4505 euro per$1,且知道 hc 为 2 % , hb 为3 .5%,套入公式可得SO 为1.4718 euro per$1 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management-Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate- fluctuations-purchasing power parity theory 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 22. Which of the following statements relating to money market instruments is/are correct? (1)Discounted instruments do not pay coupon interest (2)Commercial paper is secured on assets of the issuing company 原题来源：2021/MJ Examiner's report SectionA Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A 1 B2 only only C Both 1 and 2 D Neither 1 nor 2 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察货币市场金融工具，询问对于货币市场金融工具，描述正确的内容有什么。 (1)折价售卖的金融工具，投资者的回报是售价和赎回价之间的差额，不是以利息作为回 报形式，因此(1)正确。 (2)商业票据是有发行该票据公司的资产进行抵押的，该描述错误。商业票据是基于信誉 发行的，并不需要资产抵押。 知识点标签： Financial management environment-The nature and role of money market-Explain and apply the characteristics and role of the principal money market instruments-discount instruments 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 23. Two companies,Acacia and Birch,have the following average levels of working capital: Working capital level($m) Acacia Birch Maximum 10 12 Minimum 6 9 Acacia's working capital is financed with $4m of long-term debt and Birch's working capital is financed with $9m of long-term debt. The balance of finance is from short-term sources. Identify,by clicking on the relevant boxes in the table,which type of working capital funding strategy each company is employing. 原题来源：2021/MJ Examiner's report Section A Example 3 分值：2 题目类型：匹配题 Acacia's working capital funding strategy Aggressive Matching Conservative Birch's working capital funding strategy Aggressive Matching Conservative 答案：Aggressive;Matching
