explanation_zh: 题目考察营运资本融资政策类型，要求选择Acacia公司和 Birch 公司分别所采用的营 运资本融资政策。 营运资本融资政策主要看企业的到底使用多少短期融资来支撑企业的波动性流动资产。如果 企业使用的短期融资超过企业的波动性资产，则表示企业用了更多的短期融资，即属于激进 型营运资本融资政策。 针对 Acacia 公司而言，波动性流动资产为10-6=4,总融资为10,题目描述的长期融资为4, 则短期融资为10-4=6,从计算可看出， A 公司短期融资是超过波动性流动资产的，即A 公 司采用的是激进型营运资本融资政策，Aggressive。 针对 Birch 公司而言，波动性流动资产为12-9=3,总融资为12,题目描述的长期融资为9, 则短期融资为12-9=3,从计算可看出，A 公司短期融资是刚好等于波动性流动资产的，即A 公司采用的是适中型营运资本融资政策，即 Matching。 知识点标签： Working capital management-Determining working capital needs and funding strategies-the matching principle-Aggressive,conservative and matching funding policies 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 24. Bilbo Co is an unlisted company with 800,000 issued shares.Seema is one of the founders and owns 20%of the issued shares. Bilbo Co has just paid its annual dividend of $0.30 per share.It is expected that next year's dividend will be $0.32 per share.After that it is expected that dividends will grow indefinitely at 2%per year. Shareholders expect a 12%return from their investment. Using the dividend valuation model,calculate the value of Seema's shareholding. 原题来源：2021/MJ Examiner's report SectionA Example 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A $512,000 B$522,240 C$489,600 D$480,000 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察DVM 模型，要求根据DVM 模型，计算出S 公司所拥有的B 公司的股权的 价值。 根据 DVM 模型，每张股票的市场价值为： Share price =D1/(ke-g)=0.32/(0.12-0.02)=$3. 20 此处需注意，题目给出了两个股价，一个是刚刚支付的$0.3,该股价为D0, 而模型中需要 使用的是D1, 也就是未来要支付的$0.32。 S 公司拥有B 公司20%的股份，转化为股票数量即800,000x20%=160,000 shares 因此S 公司拥有的股票的总价值为：160,000x$3.20=$512,000 知识点标签： Business valuations-Models for the valuation of shares-Dividend valuation model and the dividend growth model. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 25. A company is appraising a three-year project which requires an initial outlay on 1 January 20X4 of $30,000.The project is expected to give the following cash inflows on 31 December of each year: 20X4$10,000 20X5 $20,000 20X6 $25,000 All of the above cash flows are before taking account of specific annual inflation of 5%per year. The real cost of capital is 4%and the nominal cost of capital is 14% Using a nominal approach and the discount tables provided,what is the NPV of the project on 1 January 20X4(to the nearest dollar)? 原题来源：2020/SD Examiner's report Section AExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：$15,701
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是项目评估方法中用净现值NPV 的方法。 计算净现值的方法，是先找到项目每年所产生的现金流，再乘以相应的折现系数，得到每年 现金流的现值。再将算出的每年的现金流的现值全部加总之后，就可以算出最终项目的净现 值。在计算过程中，需要注意的是题目中要求我们用名义方法。因此，现金流是需要用调整 了通货膨胀之后名义上的现金流，对应的，折现率的选择也应该是名义上的折现率。计算方 式如下： Year 1 PV=10,000x1.05x0.877=$9,209 Year 2 PV=20,000x1.052x0.769=$16,957 Year 3 PV=25,000x1.053x0.675=$19,535 NPV=9,209+16,957+19,535-30,000=$15,701 因此选择B。 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Investment appraisal techniques -Calculate net present value and discuss its usefulness as an investment appraisal method. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 26. Which of the following is/are true? (1)A conservative working capital investment policy implies a higher proportion of permanent current assets to fluctuating current assets (2)Long-term finance is generally cheaper than short-term finance 原题来源：2020/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.1 only is correct B.2 only is correct C.1 and 2 are correct D.1 and 2 are incorrect 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对营运资本融资政策和投资政策的理解。 (1)保守的营运资本投资政策意味着企业对营运资本投入的量相对会比较多。投资政策与 永久性资产和流动性资产的占比没有关系。所以描述是错误的。 (2)长期融资并不比短期融资便宜。因为长期融资，自己的借出方资金被占用的时间比较 长，所承担的风险也会比较高，所以会要求的更高的投资回报率。因此对于借入资金方的企 业来说，借入长期资金会比短期资金要贵一些。所以描述是错误的。因此选择D。 知识点标签： Working capital management -The nature,elements and importance of working capital -Describe the nature of working capital and identify its elements. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 27. Simon Co is planning a l for 4 rights issue.The value of rights has been calculated as $0.40 per existing share.Simon Co's market price is currently $7.00 per share. What is the theoretical ex rights price(TERP)per share and the rights issue price per share?$price per share5.005.406.206.607.007.408.60高顿教育GOLDEN EDUCATIONTERP Rights issue price price per share? $price per share 5.00 5.40 6.20 6.60 7.00 7.40 8.60 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION TERP Rights issue price 原题来源：2020/SD Examiner's report SectionA Example 3 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：TERP$6.60 Rights issue price $5.00
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对供股发行的理解。。 理论上的除权价 TERP 的计算是用发行了股前的市场价格，减去每认购一股供股获得的权利 的价值。TERP=$7.00-$0.40=$6.60。 发行价格Rights issue price 可以从 TERP 中减去认购之后获得的权利的价值 value of rights 来计算。权利的价值value of rights可以通过每认购一股供股获得的权利的价值，乘以每拥 有4股原始股的数量，才能够认购一股供股。计算如下 value of rights=4x$0.40=$1.60 所以供股的发行价格为$6.60-$1.60=$5.00 知识点标签： Business finance -Sources of,and raising,business finance-Identify and discuss methods of raising equity finance,including:rights issue 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 28. Which TWO of the following statements concerning the interest rate risk management method of smoothing are true? 原题来源：2020/SD Examiner's report Section A Example 4 分值：2 题目类型：多选题 A The debt portfolio will consist of a mixture of fixed and floating rate debt B Interest payments will still increase if the interest rate rises C Investments with a fixed cash flow will be financed with fixed rate debt D Full benefit will be obtained from a fall in interest rates E The net effect will be an interest payment which is fixed overall 答案：Aand B
explanation_zh: 题目考查的是对利率风险管理方法的理解。选出下面哪一个是关于平滑这种风险管理 方式正确的描述。平滑，是通过平衡持有固定利率和浮动利率债务的占比去规避利率的风险。 这将内部的风险管理方式，在一定程度上可以减少利率变化所产生的影响，但不能完全消除 风险，所以当利率上升后，付款利息仍然是会有所增加得。因此A 和 B 的描述是正确的。 C 投资固定资产，相应融资方式的选择用的是固定的融资方式，遵循的是匹配原则，而不是 平滑原则。D 没有办法获得全部的利润，因为有一部分债务是固定利率的债务。当利率下跌， 固定利率的债务是会随着利率的下跌而下降，因此，没有办法获得全部的利润。E 净效应将 是总体固定的利息支付，与平滑无关。因此选择A 和B。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk -Discuss and apply traditional and basic methods of interest rate risk management 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 29. A company that has a $14m loan,with a variable rate of interest,has acquired a forward rate agreement(FRA)with a financial institution that offered a 4-11,2.85%-2.35%spread. What would be the amount received from the financial institution,under the terms of the FRA,if the actual rate of interest was 3.75%(to the nearest dollar) 原题来源：2020/07 Examiner's report Section AExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：$73,500
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是利率风险的抵御手段，远期合约。 在本题目中，FRA 覆盖的期限为7个月，并以2.85%的年利率固定借款。实际利率为3.75%。 因此，可以以这些条件代入计算：amount received from the financial institution=$14m x(3.75% -2.85%)x 7/12=$73,500 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk -Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度： 低

stem_zh: 30. Small and medium sized entities(SMEs)often face a funding gap problem. Indicate,whether the following statements about SMEs are TRUE or FALSE,by selecting the correct answer next to the relevant statement. SMEs will often experience a funding gap,due to them being seen as a higher risk investment than a larger company TRUE FALSE Founding shareholders of an SME will often have to sacrifice limited liability in order to obtain bank finance TRUE FALSE A lack of suitable,sufficient,non-current assets increases the funding gap problem for an SME TRUE FALSE 原题来源：2020/07 Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：TRUE,TRUE and TRUE
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是中小型企业融资问题的相关知识点。 由于中小企业成立时间短，所以缺乏交易历史信息，可以用于提供担保的优质资产较为有限， 所以中小企业往往被定义为高风险投资对象，存在较高的经营失败还不上钱的风险。而中小 企业发展时是需要大量资金的，它可以筹集到的资金和它发展需要用的资金规模之间的距离 就被称为funding gap。因此综上可知 statement 1是正确的。 中小企业的股东往往需要牺牲有限责任的优势，来获取银行贷款，在中小企业的风险较高的 情况下，银行的确会对其做出无限承担债务的要求， statement 2正确。 缺乏合适的担保资产通常会使获得银行融资变得困难，除非创始人为债务提供个人担保。。 因为创始人现在将对债务承担个人责任。 Statement 3 正确。 知识点标签： Business finance-Finance for small and medium sized entities (SMEs)-Describe the nature of the financing problem for smallbusinesses in terms of the funding gap,the maturity gap and inadequate security 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 31. The inventory ordering policy of ZAR Co is to order 100,000 units when the inventory level falls to 20,000 units.The cost of placing and processing an order is $200,while the cost of holding inventory is $0.50 per unit per year.Orders are received one week after being placed with the supplier.The production requirement for the next year (50 weeks)is 600,000 units. What is the cost of ZAR Co's inventory ordering policy? 原题来源：2020/03Examiner's report SectionA Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：$30200
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是存货成本的计算。 解题思路：存货成本包括订货成本ordering cost 和持有成本 holding cost。其中订货成本与订 货次数有关，而持有成本和平均存货持有量有关。这道题需要考虑存货交付期lead time不 为零的情况下，这个期间的存货消耗。 订购成本=$200x(600,000/100,000)=$1,200 per year 等待期间的每周消耗量=600,000/50=12,000 units 缓冲库存=20,000-12,000=8,000 units 平均存货持有量=8,000+(100,000/2)=58,000 units 持有成本=58,000x$0-50=$29,000 per year 总成本=订购成本+持有成本=$1,200+$29,000=$30,200 per year 知识点标签： Working capital management -Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash -Discuss,apply and evaluate the use of relevant techniques in managing inventory,including the Economic Order Quantity model and Just-in-Time techniques. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 32. Which TWO of the following derivative instruments are characterised by a standard contract size? 原题来源：2020/03 Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选题 A Forward contract B Forward rate agreement C Futures contract D Swap E Over-the-counter option F Exchange tradable option 答案：C&F
explanation_zh: 题目考察的抵御风险的工具的基本特征。 交易所可交易期权和期货合约是标准化合约。其他衍生工具都可以根据客户的具体要求进行 定制化处理。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk-Compare and evaluate traditional methods of foreign currency risk management. 难易程度：低 GOLDEN EDUCATION ONLINE DELIVERY·PLATINUM

stem_zh: 33. For the coming year,a company has budgeted sales of$2m per month,80%of which will be on credit.It expects its accounts receivable payment period to be three months. Forecast average inventory and average accounts payable for the coming year are $10m and $4m respectively. What is the company's working capital requirement for the coming year(to one decimal place)? 原题来源：2019/12 Examiner's report SectionAExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：$10.8m
explanation_zh: 题目考察的营运资本需求金额的计算。 使用应收账天数的计算公式进倒算出： 应收账款=($2mx 12x80%x3/12)=$4.8m 营运资本的需求=$4.8m+$10m-$4m=$10.8m. 知识点标签： Working capital management -Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash-Explain and apply relevant accounting ratios. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 34. The efficient markets hypothesis refers to the way in which the prices of traded financial securities reflect relevant information. Which TWO of the following are true for a weak-form efficient market? 原题来源：2019/12 Examiner's report SectionAExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选题 A Share prices fully and fairly represent past information B Share prices fully and fairly represent private information C Share prices appear to follow a'random walk' D The market does not provide enough information to make good buying and selling decisions 答案：A&C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的市场有效性假说的相关知识点。 选项A 是正确的，弱有效市场中，所有的历史信息都充分公允的体现在股价上。 选项B 是不正确的，股价只有在强有效市场中，才会充分公允地体现内部消息； 选项C 是正确的，有效市场中，股价遵循随机游走的规则变化，不论市场的有效性程度是 弱还是强。 选项D 是不正确的，弱有效市场并非完全不能反映任何信息，它至少能够反应过去的信息， 以此提供给投资者作为投资决策。 知 识 点 标 签 ： Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares-Distinguish between and discuss weak form efficiency, semi-strong form efficiency and strong form efficiency 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 35. The following information is available for a listed company: Dividend recently paid $0.1 per share Dividend cover 4 times Price earning ratio 5 times Estimated future growth in dividends 8% Using the dividend growth model,what is the cost of equity for this company(to one decimal place)? 原题来源：2019/09 Examiner's report Section A Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：13.4%
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是在 DVM 模型下，股权成本的计算。这道题目中需要通过各种ratio 进 行转换，得出所需的条件。 其中Dividend cover=Earnings/Dividend,Price earning ratio=Price /Earnings. PO=Dividend×dividend cover×price earnings ratio=$0.10×4×5=$2.00 ke=((D0×(1+g))/PO)+g=(0.1×1.08)/2)+0.08=13.4%. 知识点标签： Business valuations -Estimating the cost of capital-Estimate the cost of equity 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 36. Which of the following is a description of gap exposure? 原题来源：2019/09 Examiner's report SectionAExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A The difference between short-term and long-term interest rates B The difference between the amounts of interest-sensitive assets and liabilities C The difference between spot interest rates and futures interest rates D The difference between fixed and floating interest rates 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察的敞口风险的定义。这道题目考核的是基本定义，考生需要掌握。 敞口风险Gap exposure 反映的是到期时间相同的计息资产和计息负债在金额上不相等导致 出现会受到利率波动影响的净资产或净负债。 知识点标签： Risk Management -The nature and types of risk and approaches to risk management -Describe and discuss different types of interest rate risk 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 37. A listed company is to enter into a sale and repurchase agreement on the money market. The company has agreed to sell $10m of treasury bills for $9.6m and will buy them back in 50 days'time for $9.65m. Assume a 365-day year. What is the implicit annual interest rate in this transaction(to the nearest 0.01%)? 原题来源：2019/06 Examiner's report Section AExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空 答案：3.8%
explanation_zh: 题目考察回购协议的内涵年化利率计算。 回购协议的回报来源于国债回购价和售价之间的差。 根据题意，该国债的售价为9.6m, 回购价为9.65m, 因此回报=$9.65m-$9.6m=$0.05m 换算成回报率即利率=$0.05m/$9.6m=0.52% 。此利率为50天的利率，年化后的利率=0.52% ×365/50=3.80%. 知识点标签：Financial management environment -The nature and role of money market-Explain and apply the characteristics and role of the principal money market instruments 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 38. GOLDEN EDUCATION Increasing which TWO of the following would be associated with the financial objective of shareholder wealth maximisation? 原题来源：2019/06 Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选 A Share price B Dividend payment C Reported profit D Earnings per share E Weighted average cost of capital 答案：AB
explanation_zh: 题目考察最大化股东财富这一首要目标，要求选择与该目标相一致的两个选项。 股东的回报有两种，一种是股息的收入，另一种是股票价格上涨带来的资本利得。因此增加 选项A 股价和选项B 股息能够最直接的最大化股东财富。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Financial management function-.Financial objectives and relationship with corporate strategy -Identify and describe a variety of financial objectives,including:i) shareholder wealth maximization 难易程度：中 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION

stem_zh: 39. A project has average estimated cash flows of $3,000 per year with an initial investment of$9,000. Depreciation is straight-line with no residual value and the project has a five-year life span.The company has a target return on capital employed (ROCE)of 15%and a target payback period of 2.5 years.ROCE is based on initial investment. Under which investment appraisal method(s),using the company's targets,will the project be accepted? (1)ROCE (2)Payback basis 原题来源：2019/03 Examiner's report Section A Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A1 B2 only only C Both 1 and 2 D Neither 1 nor 2 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察ROCE 和payback period 这两者项目评估方法的计算和应用。 对于ROCE 和 payback period 来说，是否接受这个项目的decision rule都是看这个项目能不 能符合公司既定的target。已知公司的target return on capital employed(ROCE) 是 1 5 % ,target payback period 是2.5年。下一步我们需要计算出该项目的ROCE 和 payback period。 由 于ROCE 是根据利润计算，而题目给出的是现金流，因此要将现金流转换为利润，转换 方法为：每年的现金流-每年的折旧。具体计算如下： 每年的折旧=$9,000/5 years=$1,800 每年的利润=$3,000-$1,800=$1,200 ROCE= 利润/初始投入t=$1,200/$9,000=13.33%, 低于目标的ROCE, 因此应该拒绝该项 目 。 项目的投资回收期=$9,000/$3,000=3 years,长于目标2.5年，因此应该拒绝该项目。 所以无论是用ROCE 还是用payback period 都应该拒绝该项目，选择D。 知识点标签：Investment appraisal -Investment appraisal techniques -Calculate payback period and discuss its usefulness as an investment appraisal method/Calculate return on capital employed (accounting rate of return)and discuss its usefulness as an investment appraisal method. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 40. Which TWO of the following are correct descriptions of net working capital? 原题来源：2019/03 Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选 A Current assets-current liabilities B Inventory days+accounts receivable days-accounts payable days C Current assets/current liabilities D The long term capital invested in net current assets 答案：AD
explanation_zh: 题目考察净营运资本的定义和计算，要求选择净营运资本正确的两个描述。 净营运资本=流动资产-流动负债，因此选项A 正确。 而从融资的角度来看净营运资本是由长期融资支撑的那一部分流动资产，因此选项D 正确。 选项B 算的是现金运营周期，不是净营运资本，错误。 选项C 算的是流动比率，不是净营运资本，错误。 知识点标签： Working capital management-The nature,elements and importance of working capital -Describe the nature of working capital and identify its elements. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 41. Black Co has in issue 5%irredeemable loan notes,nominal value of $100 per loan note,on which interest is shortly to be paid.Black Co has a before-tax cost of debt of 10%and corporation tax is 30%. What is the current market value of one loan note? 原题来源：2018/12 Examiner's report SectionAExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$55 GOLDEN EDUCATIONB $50 GOLDEN EDUCATION C$76 D $40 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察永续债券的估值。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 根据题意该永续债利率为5%,对应的kd 为10%,因此我们可以算出该债券的价值=($100 x 5%)/10%=$50 其中一笔利息马上就要支付了，所以可以知道该债券现在的市场价格应为含权价(除权价+ 利息),而我们根据公式计算出来的$50是除权价，因此还要加上$5的利息，得出含权价为 $55,选择A。 知识点标签：Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Discuss and apply appropriate valuation methods i)irredeemable debt 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 42. ARP is a charity providing transport for people visiting hospitals. Which of the following performance measures would BEST fit with efficiency in a value for money review? 原题来源：2018/12 Examiner's report SectionAExample 2 题目类型：单选 A Percentage of members who re-use the service B Cost per journey to hospital CA comparison of actual operating expenses against the budget D Number of communities served 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察衡量非营利组织的3E 的应用，题目要求选择符合efficiency 的选项。 Efficiency 指的是效率，代表投入产出比，所以正确选项应同时考虑投入和产出。 选项A 错误，回头客的比例只衡量了产出，而不涉及投入。 选项B 正确，去医院的旅程次数是产出，而成本是投入，两者都考虑了，符合efficiency 的 定义。 选项C 错误，只考虑了投入。 选项D 错误，只考虑了产出。 知识点标签： Financial management function -Financial and other objectives in not-for-profit organisations -Discuss ways of measuring the achievement of objectives in not-for-profit organisations 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 43. A company has calculated the NPV of a new project as follows: Present Values $'000 Sales revenue 4,000 Variable costs (2,000) Fixed costs (500) Taxation at 20% (300) Initial outlay (1,000) NPV 200 What is the sensitivity of the project decision to a change in sales volume(to the nearest 0.1%)? 原题来源：2018/09 Examiner's report SectionAExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空 答案：12.5%
explanation_zh: 题目考察敏感性分析的计算，要求计算销售量的敏感性。 敏感性=该项目的NPV/该变量相关的PV 。和销售量相关的PV 是contribution, 因为本题有 考虑税的影响，因此应该计算出税后的 PV of contribution。 税后的PV of Contribution=(4,000-2,000)x(1-0.2)=1,600 敏感性=200/1,600x100=12.5%。 知识点标签：Investment appraisal -Adjusting for risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal- Apply sensitivity analysis to investment projects and discuss the usefulness of sensitivity analysis in assisting investment decisions. 难易程度：中 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION

stem_zh: 44. Which TWO of the following would be evidence of strong form market efficiency? 原题来源：2018/09 Examiner's report SectionAExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选 A The lack of regulation on use of private information (insider dealing) B Inability to consistently outperform the market and make abnormal gains C Immediate share price reaction to company announcements to the market D Regulation to ensure quick and timely public announcement of information 答案：AB
explanation_zh: 题目考察市场有效性的特征，要求选择和强式有效市场相符的两个选项。 选项A 正确。强式有效市场中，所有的信息包括内部信息都已经反映在了股价上，这时候 就算利用内部信息进行内幕交易也无法获得超额收益。因此没有人会愿意进行内幕交易，也 就是不需要对其进行监管。 选项B 正确。强式有效市场中，所有的信息包括内部信息都已经反映在了股价上，无论我 们分析哪一种信息都无法获得超额收益，只能靠运气。 选项C 错误。信息还没宣布前，作为内部信息，就已经反映在了股价上。所以信息是否公 布对于股价没有影响。 选项D 错误。没有公布的内部信息也已经反映在了股价上，所以信息是否公布对于股价没 有影响，也就不需要对其加以监管。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations-Efficient Market Hypothesis (EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares -Distinguish between and discuss weak form efficiency, semi-strong form efficiency and strong form efficiency 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 45. A company that has a $10m loan with a variable rate of interest,has acquired a forward rate agreement(FRA)with a financial institution that offered a 3-6,3.2%-2.7%spread. What would be the payment made to the financial institution under the terms of the FRA if the actual rate of interest was 3%(to the nearest dollar)? 原题来源：2018/06 Examiner's report Section AExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：$5,000
explanation_zh: 题目考察远期利率合约的计算。要求计算，如果实际利率为3%,那使用该利率远期 合约，待到合约到期，企业需要支付多少资金给到金融机构(银行)。 根据题意，,题目给出的是3.2%-2.7%,但是企业为借款方，承担较高的利率，因此选择3.2%, 即远期利率合约将利率利率规定在3.2%。因此按照远期合约，企业需要承担的利息为：$10m x 3.2%x3/12=$80,000 但是按照实际利率，企业承担的利息实际为：$10m x 3%x3/12=$75,000 企业需履行远期合约的规定，共支付$80,000,目前已经支付$75,000,差额需要补给银行， 因此需要补给金融机构的金额为：$80,000-$75,000=$5,000 知识点标签：Risk Management-Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-forward rate agreements 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 46. Which TWO of the following statements about overcapitalisation and overtrading are correct? 原题来源：2018/06 Examiner's report SectionA Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选题 A Overtrading often arises from a rapid increase in sales revenue B Overcapitalisation results in a relatively low current ratio COvertrading may result in a relatively high accounts payable turnover period D Overcapitalisation is the result of too much short-term capital 答案：AC
explanation_zh: 题目考察对于过度资本化和过度贸易化的理解，要求选择对于过度资本化和过度贸易 化描述正确的选项。 A 和 C 选项是针对过度贸易化正确的描述。 B 选项，针对过度资本化，由于企业投入过多的流动资产，因此流动比率应该上升，而不是 下降，所以该选项错误。 D 选项，使用过多的短期资本是过度贸易化的特征，而非过度资本化，因此该选项错误。 知识点标签： Working capital management-The nature,elements and importance of working capital-Identify the objectives of working capital management in terms of liquidity and profitability,and discuss the conflict between them. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 47. Leah Co is an all equity financed company which wishes to appraise a project in a new area of activity.Its existing equity beta is 1.2.The industry average equity beta for the new business area is 2.0,with an average debt/debt+equity ratio of 25%.The risk-free rate of return is 5%and the market risk premium is 4%. Ignoring tax and using the capital asset pricing model,calculate a suitable risk-adjusted cost of equity for the new project. 原题来源：2018/03Examiner's report Section AExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：11%
explanation_zh: 题目考察对于特定投资项目的WACC 计算，要求根据 CAPM 模型，计算新项目的资 本成本(忽略税费)。 下杠杆求新行业的商业风险： 该公司在新行业新领域投资新项目，面临新的商业风险，因此需要计算出新的beta asset, 反映新的商业风险。具体计算的方式为：βa=2x(75/100)=1.5, 此处给出了本公司的 equity beta1.2 和新行业的equity beta 2, 因为计算的是新行业的商业风险，所以应该选取新行业的 equity beta。 上杠杆反映新项目财务风险和商业风险的equity beta: 由于该公司所有的资金都来源于权益融资，因此该公司没有财务风险，所以上一步骤求出的 asset beta1.5 即为新项目的equity beta1.5。 最后通过CAPM 模型计算该公司的ke: ke=5+1.5x4=8.96%=11%. 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business finance-Sources of finance and their relative costs-the application of the CAPM in calculating a project-specific discount rate 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 48. Alpha Co and Beta Co are two companies in different industries who are both evaluating the acquisition of the same target company called Gamma Co.Gamma Co is in the same industry as Alpha Co.Alpha Co has valued Gamma Co at $100m but Beta Co has only valued Gamma Co at $90m. Which of following statements would explain why Alpha Co's value of Gamma Co is higher? 原题来源：2018/03 Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A Alpha Co has used more prudent growth estimates B Beta Co could achieve more synergy C Beta Co is a better negotiator than Alpha Co D Gamma Co is a direct competitor of Alpha Co 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察影响公司估值的因素，题目描述，A 公司在收购G 公司时，对于G 公司的 估值为$100m, 而 B 公司同样作为收购方，对于G 公司的估值仅为$90m, 题目要求找出能 够解释为什么A 公司对于 G 的估值更高。 A 选项描述 A 公司使用了更加保守的增长估计，估计更加保守，那计算出的估值也应该更 加小，而不是更加大，因此错误。 B 选项，如果B 公司能够实现更多的协同作用，那对于G 公司的估值应该更高，而不是更 低。 C 选项描述B 公司的谈判能力相对于A 公司更好，谈判能力只能决定最后的成交价值，并 不能决定对于G 公司内在价值的估值。 D 选 项 ，A 公司和G 公式属于同一行业，由此可判断出两者属于直接竞争关系，那如若A 公司收购G 公司，会产生更大的协同效应，因此D 选项正确，也因此B 选项错误。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations-Nature and purpose of the valuation of business and financial assets-Identify and discuss reasons for valuing businesses and financial assets 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 49. Shyma Co is a company that manufactures ships and has an equity beta of 1.6 and a debt:equity ratio of 1:3.It is considering a new project to manufacture farm vehicles. Trant Co is a manufacturer of farm vehicles and has an asset beta of 1.1 and a debt.equity ratio of 2:3. The risk free rate of return is 5%,the market risk premium is 3%and the corporation tax rate is 40%. Using CAPM,what would be the suitable cost of equity for Shyma to use in its appraisal of the farm machinery project (to one decimal place)? 原题来源：2017/12 Examiner's report SectionAExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：9.0%
explanation_zh: 题目考察对于特定投资项目的 WACC 计算。题目要求根据CAPM 模型，计算投资新 项目的Ke, 题目要求保留一位小数。 下杠杆：求出新项目所面临的商业风险，asset beta。题目中已经直接给出新领域公司的asset beta 为1.1,即直接使用即可，不需要下杠杆的计算。 上杠杆：求出同时反映新项目财务风险和商业风险的equity beta。此处使用的债务权益比例 应为本公司自己的，所以是debt:equity ratio of 1:3, 且题目给出税率为40%,在债务部分需 要考虑税率。根据公式：Equity beta=1.1x(3+1(1-0.4))/3=1.32。 根据 CAPM 模 型 ，ke=5+1.32x3=8.96%=9.0% 知识点标签： Business finance-Sources of finance and their relative costs-the application of the CAPM in calculating a project-specific discount rate 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 50. Act Co wishes to hedge interest rate movements on a borrowing it intends to make three months from now for a further period of six months. Which TWO of the following will best help Act Co hedge its interest rate risk? 原题来源：2017/12 Examiner's report SectionAExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：多选题 A Enter into a 3v6 forward rate agreement B Enter into a 3v9 forward rate agreement C Sell interest rate futures expiring in three months'time D Buy interest rate futures expiring in three months'time 答案：BC
explanation_zh: 题目考察规避利率风险的方法，要求选择适合Act 公司规避利率风险的两种方法。 该借款从3个月之后开始， 一直持续6个月，因此可以采用的远期合约为：3v9 forward rate agreement(FRA) 。FRA 前的两个数字分别代表开始借款和结束借款的月份，3v9FRA 表 示该借款应从3个月后开始，9个月后结束。所以选择B。 因为利率期货价格=100-利率。所以利率与利率期货价格两者反向变动。利率上涨，利率期 货价格下跌。由于企业是借钱，担心利率上涨，所以是担心利率期货价格下降，因此看跌利 率期货，采用卖出期货的方式，规避利率风险C 选项正确。 知识点标签：Risk Management-Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 51. Geeh Co paid an interim dividend of $0.06 per ordinary share on 31 October 20X6 and declared a final dividend of $0.08 on 31 December 20X6.The ordinary shares in Geeh Co are trading at a cum-div price of$1.83. What is the dividend yield(to one decimal place of a percentage point)? 原题来源：2017/09 Examiner's report SectionAExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：8.0
explanation_zh: 题目考察比率的计算，要求计算dividend yield。 Dividend yield=dividend from the last 12 months/the current ex-div share price. Dividend for the year=$0.08+0.06=$0.14. 由于题目明确描述，$0.08的股息目前是处于宣布但是尚未发放的状态，因此该股息目前包 含在股价中，公式中用来计算的股价必须是扣除过股息的股价，因此 Ex-div share price= $1.83-0.08=$1.75 因此dividend yield=0.14/1.75=8% 注意：题目要求我们填写的并不是8%,而是百分比中的数字，且该数字需要保留1位小数， 因此正确答案为8.0。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Financial management function-Stakeholders and impact on corporate objectives-Ratio analysis 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 52. What role would the money market have in a letter of credit arrangement? 原题来源：2017/9 Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A Initial arrangement of the letter of credit B Acceptance of the letter of credit C Issuing of a banker's acceptance D Discounting the banker's acceptance 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察对于货币市场及货币市场上金融工具的理解，要求选择货币市场在信用证安 排中将发挥什么作用。信用证由买方银行签发给卖方银行，卖方可以持有信用证到期后向银 行拿钱，或者在货币市场上将其提前以折扣价出售提前获得资金。 A 是不正确的，因为该步骤将由购买公司的银行完成。 B 是不正确的，因为该步骤将由销售公司的银行完成。 C 是不正确的，因为该步骤是另一个角色，将由购买来完成公司的银行。 D 是正确的，因为如果需要提前现金收据，银行家的承兑汇票将在货币市场上以折扣价出售。 此处体现出了货币市场在信用证整个过程中的作用。 知识点标签： Financial management environment-The nature and role of money market-Explain and apply the characteristics and role of the principal money market instruments 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 53. Black Co has in issue 5%irredeemable loan notes,nominal value of $100 per loan note,on which interest is shortly to be paid.Black Co has a before-tax cost of debt of 10%and corporation tax is 30%. What is the current market value of one loan note? 原题来源：2017/June Examiner's report Section A Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 GOLDEN EDUCATIONA.$55 B.$55 C.$76 D.$40 GOLDEN EDUCATION ONLINE DELIVERY·PLATINUM 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对不可赎回债券市场价值计算。根据题目给出的信息可知票面利息率为 5%不可赎回债券每年支付的利息为$100×5%=$5 annually, 通过公式可以算出，Ex interest market value=$5/10%=$50 由于当前的利息是将要支付但并没有支付，所以，题目中让我们求的当前的市场价值，应该 是含权价。因此，用之前求出来的除权价再加上即将要支付的利息$5,得到，当前的含权价 为$50+$5=$55。因此选择A。 知识点标签： Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets -T Discuss and apply appropriate valuation methods 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 54. Which of the following statements relating to money markets is/are true? (1)Lending is for periods of greater than one year (2)Lending is securitised (3)Borrowers are mainly small companies 原题来源：2017/June Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A. 1 and 2 B.2 and 3 C.1 and 3 D.2only 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对货币市场特征的理解和运用。选出下面关于现货市场的描述中，哪些 是正确的。 (1) 货币市场中，金融工具的到期时间都是小于一年的。选项是错误的。 (2) 货币市场中的借款都是伴随着抵押物的。选项是正确的。 (3) 在货币市场中进行借贷的公司通常都是风险承受能力比较高，信用比较好的大公司， 而不是小公司。选项是错误的。因此选择D。 知识点标签： Financial management environment -The nature and role of money market - 难易程度：中Describe the role of the money markets 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 55. A company's typical inventory holding period at any time is as follows: Days Raw materials 15 Work in progress 35 Finished goods 40 Annual cost of goods sold as per the financial statements is $100m of which the raw material purchases account for 50%of the total. The company has implemented plans to reduce the level of inventory held,the effects of which are expected to be as follows: (1)Raw material holding time to be reduced by 5 days (2)Production time to be reduced by 4 days (3)Finished goods holding time to be reduced by 5 days. Assuming a 365-day year,what will be the reduction in inventory held? 原题来源：2017/March Examiner's report Section A Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.$2.603m B.$3.836m C.$3836m D.$3.151m 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考查的是对存货周转率的理解和运用和计算。由于题目中需要我们求的是计划变 更后存货减少的量。因此我们需要用计划变化前与变化后对周转率的影响去求出两者之间的 差额，得出的量就是计划变更之后存货减少的量。先用公式，分别算出政策变化之后对存货 3个组成部分的影响：Raw material effect using raw material purchases=(100m x 50%)x(5/365) =$684,932 。Work in progresseffect using cost of goods sold=100mx(4/365)=$1,095,890 Finished goods effect using cost of goods sold=100mx(5/365)=$1,369,863 Reduction in inventory=$684,932+$1,095,890+$1,369,863=$3,150,685 or $3.151m 因此选择D。 知识点标签： Working capital management-Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash -Explain the cash operating cycle and the role of accounts payable and accounts receivable. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 56. Handria is a county that has the peso for is currency and Wengry is a county that has the dollar($) for is currency.The current spot exchange rate is 1.5134 pesos=$1. Using interest-rate differentials,the one-year forward exchange rate is 1.5346 pesos=$1. The currency market between the peso and the dollar is assumed perfect and the International Fisher Effect holds. Which of the following statements is true? 原题来源：2017/March Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.Wengry has a higher forecast rate of inflation than Handria B.Handria has a higher nominal rate of interest than Wengry C.Handria has a higher nominal rate of interest than We D.The forecast future spot rate of exchange will differ from the forward exchange rate 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是用四恒等式去进行外汇风险管理的应用。 A 选项：对比两个国家之间通货膨胀的高低，需要基于购买力平价理论，而题目中只给出了 利率平价理论的信息，因此这里无法进行比较。选项不正确 B 选项：根据题目中，所给出的利率平价理论，由于远期汇率水平高于即期汇率水平可以推 出Peso(Handria) 的 Nominal interest rate 高于 Dollar(Wengry) 的 Nominal interest rate。选 项正确。 C 选项：根据国际费雪效应公式，任何国家的实际利率都是均衡的一样的。 D 选项：根据市场预期理论，未来现货市场上的价格就等于在今天这个时间点所预测的未来 的期货的价格。选项不正确。 因此选择B。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations -Describe the causes of exchange rate fluctuations -four-way equivalence 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 57. Swap Co is due to receive goods costing $2,500.The terms of trade state that payment must be received within three months.However,a discount of 1·5%will be given for payment within one month. Which of the following is the annual percentage cost of ignoring the discount and paying in three months? 原题来源：2016/December Examiner's report Section A Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.6·23% B.9·34% C.6·14% D.9·49% 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是企业关于是否要给出提前付款折扣的相关计算。 如果企业接受了早付款折扣，那么就必须在1个月之内支付给供应商$2,500*(1-1.5%)= $2,462 ·50的款项。另一个选择是，不接受早付款折扣，需要在3个月内支付给供应商$2,500。 也就是说可以多占用供应商2个月的资金，承担的占有资金的费用为$2,500-$2,462 · 50= $37 · 50,把资金费用百分比话可以得到占有供应商2个月的资金所承担的利息成本为The two-month rate of interest is therefore 37·50/2,462·5x100=1·5228%。年化后得到，有效年利 率成本为The annual equivalent rate(AER)=(1+0·015228)^6-1=0·0949or 9·49% 因此选择D。 知识点标签： Working capital management -Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash -Discuss,apply and evaluate the use of relevant techniques in 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION managing accounts payable 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 58. Which of the following statements about interest rate risk hedging is correct? 原题来源：2016/ September Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.An interest rate floor can be used to hedge an expected increase in interest rates B.The cost of an interest rate floor is higher than the cost of an interest rate collar C.The premium on an interest rate option is payable when it is exercised D.The standardised nature of interest rate futures means that over-and under-hedging can be avoided 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察的应用是对利率风险进行规避的理解以及应用。 A 选项：利率期货的下限是用来规避利率下降所带来的风险，而不是上升。选项不正确 B 选项：单独购买一个利率期货的下限是需要支付一笔昂贵的期权费用，而购买双领期权是 买入一个期权的同时卖出一个期权，因此期权的费用会比单独购买一个利率期货的下限要低。 选项正确。 C 选项：利率期权的期权费是在买入那一天就支付，而不是等到行权日才进行支付。选项不 正确。 D 选项：标准化的期货合约每一手合约都是有固定的合约规模的，因此是无法避免不完美对 冲的。选项不正确。 因此选择B。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk -Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 59. Drumlin Co has $5m of $0·50 nominal value ordinary shares in issue.It recently announced a 1 for 4 rights issue at $6 per share.Its share price on the announcement of the rights issue was $8 per share. What is the theoretical value of a right per existing share? 原题来源：2016/September Examiner's report Section A Example 1 题目类型：单选 A.$1·60 B.$0·40 C.$0·50 D.$1·50 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是企业发行了供股之后理论上除权价的计算。 可以直接带入公式先求出理论上的除权价TERP 。TERP=(4*8+1*6)/(4+1)=$7.6 。 在用发 行时的含权价减去理论上的除权价得到 value of a right 权力的价值。Value of a right=7.6-6 =$1.6。由于企业是拥有4股原始股才有权利认购一股供股，所以每一只原始股的权利的价 格应还是 Value of a right per existing share=1.6/4=$0.4。 因此选择B。 知识点标签： Business finance -Sources of,and raising,business finance -Identify and discuss methods of raising equity finance,including-rights issue 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 60. In relation to an irredeemable security paying a fixed rate of interest,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2016/ September Examiner's report Section A Example 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.As risk rises,the market value of the security will fall to ensure that investors receive an increased yield. B.As risk rises,the market value of the security will fall to ensure that investors receive a reduced yield. C.As risk rises,the market value of the security will rise to ensure that investors receive an increased yield. D.As risk rises,the market value of the security will rise to ensure that investors receive a reduced yield. 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的应用是对不可赎回债权公式的理解以及应用。 从不可赎回债券的公式可以分析出，不可赎回债券的市场价值是用利息除以投资者所要求的 回报率。当风险上升的时候，投资者所要求的回报率会随之上升，由于利息是固定支付保持 不变，债券的市场价值会下降，为了满足投资者上升的投资回报率的要求。 因此选择A。 知识点标签：Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Discuss and apply appropriate valuation methods 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 61. A company has calculated the NPV of a new project as follows: Sales revenue Variable costs Fixed costs Corporation tax at 20% Initial outlay NPV Present value ($000) 4,000 (2,000) (500) (300) (1,000) 200 What is the sensitivity of the project decision to a change in sales volume? 原题来源：2016/06 Examiner's report Section AExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.12·5% B.6·3% C.10·0% D.5·0% 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察了销量的敏感性程度的计算。对于变量的敏感性程度分析，我们的计算公式 是：Sensitivity of the variable=NPV/PV of variable (after tax)。而和销量这个变量有关的是 Contribution=Sales revenue-Variable costs,不管是Sales revenue 还是 Variable costs 都会随 着销量的变化而变化，所以Sensitivity of sales volume=Sensitivity of contribution=NPV/PV of contribution after tax=100×200,000/((4,000,000-2,000,000)×0.8)=12.5%, 所以A 选项 是正确的。 B 选项Sensitivity=100×200,000/(4,000,000x0.8)=6.3% 是错误的，因为只考虑了销售收入， 没有考虑变动成本也会受到销量变动的影响。 C 选项Sensitivity =100×200,000/2,000,000=10.0%是错误的，因为没有将PV of contribution 税后化处理。 D 选项Sensitivity=100×200,000/4,000,000=5.0% 是错误的，因为只考虑了销售收入，同时 没有将分母部分税后化处理。 知识点标签： Investment appraisal-Adjusting for risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal- Apply sensitivity analysis to investment projects and discuss the usefulness of sensitivity analysis in assisting investment decisions. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 62. Which of the following statements concerning the causes of interest rate fluctuations is correct? 原题来源：2016/06 Examiner's report Section AExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.Liquidity preference theory suggests that investors want more compensation for short-term lending than for long-term lending B.According to expectations theory,the shape of the yield curve gives information on how inflation rates are expected to influence interest rates in the future C.An inverted yield curve can arise if government policy is to keep short-term interest rates high in order to bring down inflation D.Market segmentation theory suggests long-term interest rates depend on how easily investors can switch between market segments of different maturity 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察了分析收益率曲线不同形态的相关学术理论。 A 选项是关于流动性偏好理论，流动性偏好理论解释了为何收益率曲线是向上弯折的一条曲 线。原因是偏好短期投资的投资者在市场上占大多数，所以收益率曲线的形状会和偏好短期 投资的投资者的收益率曲线一致。而偏好短期投资的投资者如果需要进行长期投资是需要额 外的收益补偿的，所以投资的收益会随着投资期限的增长而变大。所以A 选项是错误的， 因为流动性偏好理论不是说投资者对于短期投资的收益要求比长期投资更高。 B 选项是关于预期理论，预期理论认为收益率曲线的形状和根据人们对于未来利率变化的期 望有关。如果人们预期未来利率上涨，那么收益率曲线会向上弯折，投资的收益会随着投资 期限的增长而变大。如果人们预期未来利率下跌，那么收益率曲线会向下弯折，投资的收益 会随着投资期限的增长而变小。所以B 选项是错误的，因为收利率曲线的形状没有解释通 胀率对于利率的影响。 C 选项是说反向收益率曲线会在政府为了降低通胀而提高短期利率时出现。因为政府通过提 升短期收益率，可以抑制消费，从而实现降低过热经济，降低通胀。所以C 选项是正确的。 D 选项是说市场分割理论认为长期利率取决于投资者能否在不同到期时间的市场中自由转 换。这个说法是错误的，市场分割理论的观点是不同到期时间的有价证券的收益率应该是由 该有价证券交易流通的市场的供需独立决定的，和是否可以在不同的市场上自由转换没有关 系，所以 D 选项是错误的。 所以C 选项是正确的。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations -Describe the causes of interest rate fluctuations. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 63. Cant Co has a cost of equity of 10%and has forecast its future dividends as follows: Current year: No dividend Year 1: Year 2: Year 3: No dividend $0·25 per share $0·50 per share and increasing by 3%per year in subsequent years What is the current share price of Cant Co using the dividend valuation model? 原题来源：2016/03Examiner's report SectionA Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.$7·35 B.$5·57 C.$6·11 D.$6·28 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察了股息估值模型的运用。 股票现在当下的价值等于股东因为持有这支股票在未来可以收到的所有现金流入的现值之 和。所以现在每支股票的价值等于year 1开始的未来所有股息按照股东要求的回报率10% 折现的现值之和。 方法一： 我们可将股息分为两笔， 一笔是从第三年开始按照3%的增长率永续增长的股息， 一笔是第 二年的0.25,第二年0.25的股息的现值就等于0.25×0.826=$0.2065。 另外一笔永续增长的股息我们可以用 DVM 模型计算，可以将year 3的0.5的股息视作为永 续增长的第一年，也就是DVM 模型中的 D1 。The dividends paid in year 3 and subsequently= (0.826×0.5)/(0.1-0.03)=0.826×7.1429=5.90。所以 Share price P0=(0·826×0·5)/(0·1- 0·03)+(0·25×0·826)=5.90+0.2065=$6·11 per share 方法二： 可以将year 4视作为永续增长的第一年，所以单独考虑第二年0.25的股息的现值0.25×0.826 =$0.2065和第三年0.5的股息的现值0.5×0.751=$0.3755,以及 The dividends paid in year 4 and subsequently=(0.751×0.5×1.03)(0.1-0.03)=0.751×7.357=$5.5251。所以Share price PO=0.25×0.82+0.5×0.751+(0.751×0.5×1.03)/(0.1-0.03)=0.2065+0.3755+5.5251= $6·11 per share 所以答案选择 C。 A 选项 Share price=0·5/(0·1-0·03)+(0·25×0·826)=$7.35 per share 是错误的，因为没有 对从将从第3年开始永续增长的现金流的现值从year 2 折算到真正的year 0。 B 选 项Share price =(0.751×0·5)/(0·1-0·03)+(0·25×0·826)=$5.57 per share 是错误的， 因为对从第3年开始永续增长的现金流折现时折现率选用错误，按照永续增长折现求和公式， 所有现金流被折算到永续增长开始的前一年，也就是year 2, 所以应该乘以year 2的折现率， 而不是year 3的 。 D 选 项Share price=(0·826×0·5×1.03)/(0·1-0·03)+(0·25×0·826)=$6·11 per share是错误 的，因为永续增长折现求和公式的分子是第一年的现金流，而目前这种计算是将0.5视为永 续增长前一年的数据，和题目条件不符。 知识点标签： Business valuations -Models for the valuation of shares -Discuss and apply cash flow-based valuation models-dividend valuation model and the dividend growth model. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 64. Which of the following derivative instruments are characterised by a standard contract size? (1)Futures contract (2)Exchange-traded option (3)Forward rate agreement (4)Swap 原题来源：2016/03 Examiner's report Section AExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.1 and 2 B.2 and 3 C.3 and 4 D.1 and 4 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目要求选择标准化合约的金融衍生工具。 (1) 是期货合约，它的特点是交易所内交易的标准化的合约。 (2) 是交易所内交易的期权合约，它的特点也是标准化的合约。 (3) 是远期利率协议，它是场外交易产品，可以按照客户个性化的需求定制。 (4) 是掉期协议，同样也是场外交易产品，可以按照客户个性化的需求定制。 这题要求选择是标准化合约的金融衍生工具，应该是选择(1)和(2),所以只有A 选项 是正确的，其他选项都是错误的。 知识点标签：Risk Management-Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk-Identify the main types of foreign currency derivatives used to hedge foreign currency risk and explain how they are used in hedging;Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk -Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 65. Leah Co is an all-equity financed company which wishes to appraise a project in a new area of business.Its existing equity beta is 1.2.The average equity beta for the new business area is 2.0, with an average debt/debt plus equity ratio of 25%.The risk-free rate of return is 5%and the market risk premium is 4%. Ignoring taxation and using the capital asset pricing model,what is the risk-adjusted cost of equity for the new project? 原题来源：2015/12 Examiner's report Section A Example 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.8.6% B.9.8% C.11.0% D.13.0% 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察了CAPM 的运用。 Lean 公司是没有举债，所有资金来源都是权益，所以公司面临的总的风险就等于business risk。 在换了新行业后，借助行业平均的资本结构和 βe 推导出反映新行业 business risk 的βa, 直接 带入CAPM 模型中的反映风险大小的β参数中，就可以求出体现公司在新行业经营时会面临 的风险大小的权益资金成本 (risk-adjusted cost of equity)。 根据题目条件说新行业平均的杠杆水平是 D/(D+E)=25%, 所以E/(E+D)=75% 带入简化版的asset beta formula, 去杠杆去除financial risk,得到反映新行业 business risk 的 βa=2×0.75=1.5 由于Lean 公司没有债务不需要重新上杠杆，所以直接带入CAPM。 The project-specific cost of equity is therefore Ke=5+(1.5×4)=11% 所以答案选择C。 A 选项βa=1.2×0.75=0 9,Ke=5+(0.9×4)=8.6% 是错误的，因为是直接对Lean 公司的 βe按照行业平均的资本结构去杠杆。 B 选项Ke=5+(1.2×4)=9.8% 是错误的，因为没有考虑新项目面临的新的business risk, 直 接用原来的βe 反映新项目面临的风险。 D 选项Ke=5+(2×4)=13.0% 是错误的，因为直接使用反映新行业 business risk 和financial risk 的βe 带入CAPM, 没有考虑Lean 公司没有financial risk 的实际情况。 知识点标签： Business finance -Sources of finance and their relative costs -Impact of cost of capital on investments including -the application of the CAPM in calculating a project-specific discount rate. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 66. Which of the following statements is true? 原题来源：2015/12 Examiner's report SectionAExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.The sensitivity of NPV to a change in sales volume can be calculated as NPV divided by the present value of future sales income B.The certainty equivalent approach converts risky cash flows into riskless equivalent amounts which are discounted by a CAPM-derived project-specific cost of capital C.Using random numbers to generate possible values of project variables,a simulation model can generate a standard deviation of expected project outcomes D.The problem with risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal is that neither can be quantified or Measured 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察了如何评估中项目投资中面临的风险和不确定性。 A 选项是说销量的敏感性程度是用NPV 除以销售收入的现值。这句话是错误的。因为销量 的变动不仅会影响销售收入，还会影响变动成本，所以A 选项是错误的。销量的敏感性程 度应该用NPV 除以销售收入的现值减去变动成本的现值，即contribution 的值。 B 选项是说确定性等值法是按照无风险利率对于无风险等额现金流量进行折现，而按照 CAPM 计算的特定项目资本成本反映的是项目所面临的系统性风险，而不能代表无风险利率， 所以B 选项是错误的。(特别说明：该方法并非 FM 主要学习的方法，有基础的了解即可。) C 选项是说使用随机数生成项目变量的可能值，随机模拟可以生成预期项目结果的标准差。 这个是随机模拟模型的作用，所以C 选项是正确的。 D 选项是说项目中的风险和不确定性存在的问题是都无法被量化衡量，这个说法不正确，因 为项目的风险是可以量化衡量的，所以D 选项是错误的。 所以C 选项是正确的。 知识点标签：Investment appraisal-Adjusting for risk and uncertainty in investment appraisal. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 67. Ling Co has annual credit sales of $4,500,000 and on average customers take 60 days to pay, assuming a 360-day year.As a result,Ling Co has a trade receivables balance of $750,000.Ling Co relies on an overdraft to finance this at an annual interest rate of 8%. Ling Co is considering offering an early settlement discount to its customers of 0·5%for payment in 30 days.It expects that 25%of its customers (representing 35%of the annual credit sales figure) willpay on 30 days in order to obtain the discount. If Ling Co introduces the proposed discount,what will be the NET saving? 原题来源：2015/09 Examiner's report Section AExample 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.$2,625 B.$1,875 C.$7,500 D.$10,500 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察了营运资本管理中应收账款管理手段中的提前付款折扣的运用。 由于题目条件说25%of its customers (representing 35%of the annual credit sales figure),所以： Reduction in receivables=$4.5m×35%×30/360 =$131,250 考虑到 Ling 公司 relies on an overdraft to finance at an annual interest rate of 8%, 所 以trade receivables balance 下降带来的资金成本的降低，这是企业提供提前付款折扣获得的好处： Interest saved=$131,250×8%=$10,500 而企业需要因此支付的代价就是这个折扣本身的成本： Cost of discount=$4.5m×0.35×0.005=$7,875 所以提供这个折扣带来的净收益： Net benefit=Benefit-Cost=$10,500-$7,875=$2,625 所以答案选择 A。 B 选项是错误的，因为在计算过程中将25%的这个比重错误的理解成了提供提前付款折扣导 致年赊销总额的币种。 Reduction in receivables=$4.5m×30/360×0.25 =$93,750 Interest saved=$93,750×8%=$7,500 Cost of discount=$4·5m×0·25×0·005=$5,625 Net saving=$7,500-$5,625=$1,875 C 选项是错误的，因为错误认为提供提前付款折扣后应收账款天数直接就降低到了30天。 Reduction in receivables=$4·5m×30/360=$375,000 Interest saved=$375,000×8%=$30,000 Cost of discount=$4·5m×0·005=$22,500 Net saving=$30,000-$22,500=$7,500 D 选项是错误的，因为只考虑了提前付款折扣带来的好处，没有考虑付出的代价。 Reduction in receivables=$4·5m×30/360×0-35=$131,250 Interest saved=$131,250×8%=$10,500 知识点标签： Working capital management-Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash -Discuss,apply and evaluate the use of relevant techniques in managing accounts receivable,including:-offering early settlement discounts. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 68. Which of the following statements describes the main objective of financial management? 原题来源：2015/09 Examiner's report Section AExample 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A.Efficient acquisition and deployment of financial resources to ensure achievement of objectives B.Providing information to management for day-to-day functions of control and decision-making C.Providing information to external users about the historical results of the organisation D.Maximisation of shareholder wealth 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察了财务管理的主要目标。 A 选项是正确的。通过有效地收购和处置财务资源实现目标是财务管理的主要职责。 B 选项是错误的。提供企业日常运营的相关信息供管理层进行控制和决策是管理会计的主要 职责，不是财务管理人员的工作范畴。 C 选项是错误的。向外部的使用者提供组织过去交易的相关记录是财务会计的相关职责，不 是财务管理人员的工作范畴。 D 选项是错误的。股东权益最大化是盈利性组织财务管理的主要目标，但不是非盈利性组织 财务管理的主要目标，片面了，所以D 选项是错误的。 所以A 选项是正确的。 知识点标签： Financial management function-The nature and purpose of financial management; Financial objectives and relationship with corporate strategy;Financial and other objectives in not-for-profit organisations. 难易程度：低 ON ON Section B The following scenario relates to the five questions(1-5)below Fuchsia Co Fuchsia Co is a listed company with a cost of equity of 10%,which plans to achieve dividend growth of 5%per year for the foreseeable future.Fuchsia Co operates in an industry with an average price/earnings ratio of 11 times.The ordinary shares ofthe company have a nominal value of $0.50 per share.Extracts from the financial statements of the company are as follows: Sm Profit before interest and tax 278 Finance costs (14) Profit before tax 264 Corporate tax at 25% (66) Profit for the year 198 Ordinary dividends (110) Retained profit 88 Sm Equity and liability Share capital 90 Reserves 726 Total equity 816 Non-current liabilities Long-term borrowings 300 Current liabilities 364 Total liabilities 664 Total equity and liabilities 1,480 ONLINE DELIVERY PLATINUM The long-term borrowings consist of loan notes paying interest of 8%per year,which are redeemable in five years'time at a 4%premium to their nominal value of $100 per loan note.The before-tax cost of debt of Fuchsia Co is 7%per year.

stem_zh: 1. What is the value of Fuchsia Co using the price/earnings ratio method? A.$968m B.$3,058m D.$2,265m 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是市盈率法估值，计算公式是Value of equity=P/E ratio×Earnings。 题目提供了行业平均的市盈率P/E ratio水平11,结合公司的profit for the year也就是Earnings $198m 可以计算得出 value =11×$198m=$2,178m 所以答案选择C。 知识点标签： E.Business valuations-2.Models for the valuation of shares -Price/earnings ratio method 难易程度： 低

stem_zh: 2. What is the value of Fuchsia Co using the dividend valuation model? A.$2,310m B.$2,200m C.$1,925m D.$1,100m 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是股息估值模型，假设股息是按照恒定不变的增长率g=5% 保持增长直到永远， 所以计算公式是Value of equity=D1/(Ke-g)=D0×(1+g)/(Ke-g)。 根据 Extracts from the financial statements, 公司的Ordinary dividends 是$110m, 属 于D0。 Ke 根据题目条件是10%。 所 以Value=D0×(1+g)/(Ke-g)=$110m×(1+5%)/(10%-5%)=$2,310m 所以答案选择A。 知识点标签： Business valuations-2.Models for the valuation of shares-Dividend valuation model and the dividend growth model 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 3. 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION What is the market value of the loan notes of Fuchsia Co? A.$308.3m B.$312.3m C.$320.9m D.$296.3m 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 3 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是债券估值。 债券的价值等于债权人在持有债券的未来可以收到的所有现金流入按照债权人要求的回报 率折现的现值之和，计算公式是Value of loan note=PV of future receipts。 对于可赎回债券，债权人在持有债券的未来可以收到的所有现金流入包括每一年的利息和最 后一年的赎回价。这题每张可赎回债券是溢价4%赎回，所以每张债券赎回价是$104。 其中债券的利息等于债券的票面利率乘以债券的面值。这题票面利率是8%,债券面值$100, 所以每张债券每年的利息是$8。五年期的可赎回债券意味着有5年每年$8的利息。 债权人要求的回报率在金额土等于公司的税前债务资本成本 Kd。这题Kd=7% 所以 Value per loan note:(8x4.100)+(104x0.713)=106.95 其中4.100是7%5年的年金系数，0.713是7%5年的现值系数。 由于选项需要计算的是所有可赎回债券的价值，所以用总的债券数量乘以每份可赎回债券的 价值。Total value of loan notes=106.95×300m/100=$320.9m。 所以答案选择C。 知识点标签： Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Redeemable debt 难易程度：中 4 . Which of the following statements relating to capital market efficiency is/are correct? (1)Share prices take several days to respond to new information if a capital market is weak form efficient (2)In a weak form capital market,technical analysis cannot produce abnormal gains A.1 only B.2 only C.Both 1 and 2 D.Neither 1 nor 2 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 答案：B 解 析 ： 题目考察的是市场有效性相关的内容。 陈述一：如果资本市场是弱势有效，新消息会在几天后反映在股价上。 陈述一是错误的，在弱势有效市场上，新消息一经公布，会快速体现在股价上，几天后，这 个太慢了，不符合弱势有效市场信息处理的有效性程度。 陈述二：在弱势有效市场，技术分析无法创造超额收益。 陈述二是正确的，因为技术分析分析的是历史信息，而在弱势有效市场上，所有的历史信息 全部都快速公允体现在股价上，所以投资者无法借助这种分析过去信息的技术分析手段获取 超额收益。 所以答案选择 B。 知 识 点 标 签 ：E.Business valuations -4.Efficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares-Efficient market hypothesis难易程度：低 considerations in the valuation of shares-Efficient market hypothesis

stem_zh: 5. Which of the following statements about noise traders is/are correct? (1)They generally overreact to good news and bad news (2)They make rational decisions based on fundamental data A.1 only B.2 only C.Both 1 and 2 D.Neither 1 nor 2 原题来源：2023/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 5 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 答案：A 解 析 ： 本题考查关于噪音交易者的概念理解。 陈述一：他们通常会对好消息或者坏消息反应过度。 陈述一是正确的，噪音交易者的行为是通常是非理性的，所以会过度反应。 陈述二：他们基于基本面分析进行理性的投资决策。 陈述二是错误的，噪音交易者通常进行的是非理性的投资决策，比如不进行基本面分析。 所以答案选择A。 知识点标签： Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Redeemable debt 难易程度： 低 The following scenario relates to the five questions(6-10)below Light Co has the following capital structure: Sm Equity and reserves Ordinary shares 55 9%preference shares 10 Reserves 433 498 Long-term liabilities 6%loan notes 22 8%loan notes 35 57 Current liabilities 92 Total equity and liabilities 647 The ordinary shares of Light Co have a nominal value of $0.25 per share and a current ex dividend market price of $6.75 per share.Ordinary share prices are expected to grow by 5%,per year,for the foreseeable future. The 9%preference shares of Light Co are irredeemable and have a nominal value of $100 per share.The cost of capital of the preference shares is 9.5% The 6%loan notes are irredeemable and have a nominal value of $100 per loan note.The before-tax cost of debt of these loan notes is 7%. The 8%loan notes are convertible,after seven years,into 15 ordinary shares of Light Co per$100 loan note.If not converted,the loan notes will be redeemed at nominal value after eight years.The before-tax cost of debt of these loan notes is 9%. Light Co pays corporation tax of25%.
6. What is the total market value of the 6%loan notes (to one decimal place)? $. m 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：18.9
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是不可赎回债券的估值。 每张不可赎回债券的价值等于债券持有人在未来可以获得的所有不可赎回债券的利息，按照 债权人要求的回报率折现的现值之和。债权人要求的回报率在金额上等于债务的税前资金成 本。 本题不可赎回债券的利息是6%的票面利率乘以面值$100,等于$6。每张不可赎回债券持有 人在未来可以获得每年$6的利息收入，直到永远。所以按照永续年金的折现求和方式，每 张不可赎回债券的价值等于$85.71=$6/7%。 Light 公司6%的不可赎回债券账面价值是$22m, 所以不可赎回债券总的市值等于不可赎回 债券的数量0.22m=$22m/$100, 乘以每张债券的价值$85.71,等于$18.86m。 注意题目要求结果保留一位小数，所以答案是18.9。 知识点标签：Business valuations-The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Irredeemable debt 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 7. What is the market value of each 8%loan note? 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A$94.48 B$118.20 C$131.87 D$119.38 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是可转债的估值。 可转债的票面利率是8%,可以选择在7年后转换成15支普通股，或者在8年后按照面值 赎回。可转债的税前资本成本是9%。 判断可转债的持有人是否行使转换权，需要将可转债行使转换后的价值，与不行使转换权的 可转债的价值，进行比较，选择高的。 如果可转债主行使转换权，7年后15支股票的总价值是$6.75×(1+5%)^7×15=$142.47。 对比8年后按照面值$100赎回，行使转换权获得的价值更高，所以选择转换。 这张可转债的价值等于8%×$100×5.033+$142.47×0.547=$118.20 所以答案选择B 知识点标签： Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Redeemable debt 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 8. In relation to valuing preference shares,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 3 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.The market value,of an irredeemable preference share,is calculated by multiplying the dividend by one,minus the tax rate and then dividing by the cost of the preference shares B.Preference shares are a tax-efficient way of raising finance C.Preference shares can be difficult to value when they pay a variable rate of dividend D.Redeemable preference shares are classed as equity in the statement of financial position 答案： C
explanation_zh: 题目考查的是优先股的估值和融资，要求选择说法正确的选项。 选项A 错误，不可赎回的优先股，由于优先股股息不能抵税，所以计算其市场价值时，不 应该乘以1-Tax rate。 选项B 错误，由于优先股股息不能抵税，所以优先股不是一种节税的融资方式。 选项C 正确，如果优先股是按照变动股息支付，我们就无法确定未来需要支付的股息金额 数量，也相应的无法估算优先股的价值(未来所有优先股股息的现值之和)。 选项D 错误，可赎回的优先股的实质是债，而不是股。 知识点标签： Business finance-Sources of,and raising,business finance -Range of long-term finance;Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets-Preference shares 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 9. In relation to practical considerations in valuing shares and businesses,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A The share price of a company can rises even when it has cut its dividend B The marketability of ordinary shares can be improved with a share buyback scheme C Investors will always act rationally in response to good news from a company D Random walk theory suggests that share price movements can be forecast in a weak form efficient market 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是实际股票估值中的问题，要求选择说法正确的选项。 选 项A 正确：公司的股价有可能在公司削减股息的情况下依然上涨，比如目前市场行情很 好，大部分公司都随行就市股价上行，而公司降息的负面影响对于股价上涨的影响有限。 选 项B 错误：股票回购计划对于普通股的流通性没有改善作用，股票回购会让市面上流通 的股票数量减少，进一步降低股票的流通性。 选 项C 错误：投资者对于公司好的消息的反应不一定都是理性的，有可能会过度反应。 选 项D 错误：随机漫步理论是说股价无法进行预测。 知识点标签： Business valuations-Efficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares -Efficient market hypothesis;Marketability and liquidity of shares;Business finance -Sources of,and raising,business finance -Practical influences on dividend decision 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 10. Considering behavioural finance,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2023/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 5 分值：2 题目类型： 单选题 A Behavioural finance supports the view that stock market bubbles result from rational investment decisions B Noise traders make investment decisions by using software to analyse real-time share price data C Share price anomalies do not undermine the perfect capital market theory D The momentum effect suggests that investors can buy shares in the belief that a recent rise in share prices will continue 答案：D
explanation_zh: 本题考查的是对于行为金融学的理解。 选 项A 错误：行为金融学的支持者认为股市泡沫是理性投资的结果，这句话是不对的，股 市泡沫是非理性投资的结果。 选 项B 错误：噪音交易者进行投资决策时会利用软件分析事实股价数据，这不对，噪音交 易者投资时不会进行理性地数据分析。 选 项C 错误：股价异常不会破坏完美的资本市场理论，这句话不对，股价异常会破坏完美 资本市场理论。 选项D 正确：动量效应表明，投资者购买股票是因为他们相信最近的股价上涨将会持续。 知识点标签：Business valuations-Eficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares-Behavioural finance 难易程度：低 The following scenario relates to the five questions(11-15)below The home currency of Wren Co is the dollar($)and the company has a supplier in a foreign country whose currency is the dinar (D).In six months'time,Wren Co must make a payment to the supplier,of D3 million,and the company is concerned about exchange rate risk. Exchange rates: Spot exchange rate:2.00 dinars per dollar Six-month forward exchange rate:1.94 dinars per dollar Six-month interest rate Borrowing Deposit Dinars 4%per year 2%per year Dollars 10%per year 8%per year Wren Co wants to compare making a lead payment of D3 million now,with taking out a forward exchange contract for D3 million,that can be exercised in six months'time.As the company is short of cash,it would need to borrow money for any exchange rate risk hedging. Wren Co s considering raising $500,000 in three months'time in order to ease its cash flow problems.The company would borrow the money for a period of six months and it would hedge interest rate risk by using a forward rate agreement (FRA).Wren Co has been offered two different FRAs by its bank:a 3v9 FRA at 10.0-8.0 and a 3v6 FRA at 9.8-7.8,but the company is also considering interest rate derivative hedging.

stem_zh: 11. In relation to interest rate derivatives,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.Interest rate futures hedges can be closed out any time B.Forward rate agreements fix the interest rate on future long-term borrowing C.If interest rate options are allowed to lapse,there is no overall cost to the holder D.Buying both an interest rate cap and an interest rate floor is an example ofan interest rate collar 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是利率风险对冲中使用的金融衍生品的理解，要求选择正确的选项。 A 选项正确：利率期货是标准化的合约，期限覆盖了一年中的任何一天，所以可以在任何一 天选择平仓。 B 选项错误：远期利率协议只能在短期内实现利率的锁定功能，它并不支持对冲长期借款利 率的波动风险。 C 选项错误：就算利率期权放弃行权，还是需要利率期权的持有人承担期权费这个支出。 D 选项错误：双领期权是买一个利率期权(比如 cap) 的同时，卖一个反向利率期权(比如 floor), 不是同时买cap 和 floor, 交易方向不对。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 12. Considering future values on the D3 million payment date,and comparing the lead payment with the forward exchange contract(FEC),which of the following statements is true? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.The FEC costs $46,392 more than the lead payment B.The FEC costs $28,608 more than the lead payment C.The lead payment costs $46,392 more than the FEC D.The lead payment costs $28,608 more than the FEC 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对比使用外汇远期合约和现在提前付款这两个选项之间的差异。 如果选择外汇远期合约FEC,3million Dinar 的外币应付款对应的本币数量=3m/1.94= $1,546,392。 如果现在提前付款，由于题目条件说目前企业手边没有钱，只能借钱按照现在的即期汇率 2.00 D/$完成支付。那么提前付款对于公司对应的本币花费就是这笔3million Dinar的外币 应付款对应的本币数量=3m/2=$1,500,000 为期六个月的借款本息和=$1,500,000×(1+ 10%×6/12)=$1,575,000>$1,546,392 两种方案相差$1,575,000-$1,546,392=$28,608,也就是说借钱提前完成支付这个方案会被 FEC 多花费$28,608,所以选择D。 知识点标签： Risk Management-Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk-Identify the main types of foreign currency derivatives used to hedge foreign currency risk and explain how they are used in hedging 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 13. If Wren Co takes out the relevant FRA and borrows at a base rate of 10.5%per year,in three months'time,what is the company's net cost of borrowing? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 3 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.$20,000 B.$25,000 C.$24,500 D.$27,500 答案： B.
explanation_zh: 题目考查的是如何使用远期利率协议FRA 对冲借款利率风险。 由于这笔借款是三个月后开始，为期六个月，所以选择的远期利率协议是3v9 FRA at 10.0- 8.0,这两个rate 中比较高的10%是远期利率协议约定的借款利率。 而三个月后的实际借款利率是10.5%,也就意味着公司在实际市场需要按照10.5%的年化利 率完成借款。所以相应的借款利息是Interest paid on loan=500,000×10.5%×6/12=$26,250。 由于10.5%的借款利率高于远期利率协议约定的10%的借款利率，所以Wren 公司会从FRA 提供方银行那里收到10.5%与10%之间的利息补偿Payment from bank=500,000×(10.5%- 10%)×6/12=$1,250。 所以对于Wren 公司来说，这笔三个月后，为期六个月的借款的借款净成本就是=$26,250- $1,250=$25,000,所以答案选择B。 知识点标签： Risk Management -Hedging techniques for interest rate risk-Identify the main types of interest rate derivatives used to hedge interest rate risk and explain how they are used in hedging 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 14. Which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 A.If the exchange rate is 2.00 dinars per dollar,a relative increase in dollar interest rates will cause the dollar to appreciate against the dinar B.The international Fisher effect states that the expected change in the spot rate is equal to the expected difference in inflation rates C.Forward exchange rates reflect interest rate parity D.Purchasing power parity relates exchange rates and long-term interest rates 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是与汇率变动有关的相关理论，选择说法正确的选项。 A 选项错误：根据利率平价理论，名义利率越高的货币，远期汇率相较于即期汇率会贬值， 而预期理论的结论是远期汇率是对未来即期汇率无偏差的预测，所以名义利率越高的货币未 来贬值的幅度越大。因此美元利率的相对上涨会让美元在未来贬值，而不是升值。 B 选项错误：国际费雪效应反映的是两国货币名义利率之间的差异体现在两国货币通货膨胀 率之间的差异上，并不是反映未来即期汇率之间的变化。 C 选项正确：按照利率平价定律，远期汇率的变化反映了两国名义利率之间的差异。 D 选项错误：购买力平价定律的结论是未来即期汇率的变化反映了两国货币通货膨胀率之间 的差异，并不是反映长期利率之间的差异，长期利率之间的差异是和利率平价定律有关。 知识点标签： Risk Management-Causes of exchange rate differences and interest rate fluctuations - Describe the causes of exchange rate fluctuations 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 15. In relation to foreign currency risk,which of the following statements is/are correct? (1)Economic risk is exchange rate risk that can be (2)Exchange rate risk arises because of changes in 原题来源：2022/SD Examiner's report Section 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 avoided by operating in domestic markets only exchange rates that have not been anticipated BQuestion 5 ONLINE DELIVERY PLATINUM A.1 only B.2 only C.Both 1 and 2 D.Neither 1 nor 2 答案：B
explanation_zh: 本题考查的是对于汇率变动带来的风险理解。 陈述1:错误。经济风险是汇率的长期变动导致的整个国家在国际贸易中的竞争力受到影响 的一种风险。这种风险是无法通过单纯只在本国经营改善的。因为就算不直接参与海外贸易， 外币的贬值也会让海外供应商的产品相较于本国商品更具价格优势。 陈述2:正确。汇率波动风险是由无法预测的汇率的变化而带来的。 知识点标签： Risk Management-The nature and types of risk and approaches to risk management - Describe and discuss different types of foreign currency risk 难易程度：低 The following scenario relates to the five questions(16-20)below Amax Co is a multinational company which has been reviewing its working capital management. Inventory Unit price Component X $25 Trade payable $'000 Bard Co 1,000 Colix Co 3,200 Amax Co has received an offer of a discount for bulk purchase from Bard Co,one of its major suppliers.Bard Co has offered a 0.5%discount on orders of 60,000 units or more of Component X. Amax Co currently consumes 240,000 units of Component X each year and places orders of 20,000 units at the end of each month.Holding cost for Component X is $1 per unit per year and ordering costs are $250 per order.Amax Co does not maintain any buffer inventory of Component X. Colix Co,a major supplier of Component M to Amax Co,has offered a 1%early settlement discount for payment within 30 days.Amax Co currently takes 72 days to settle outstanding invoices with Colix Co.Amax Co has a cost of short-term finance of 6%through an overdraft and no surplus cash. Assume that there are 360 days in each year. Amax Co currently has decentralised treasury operations,but is considering implementing a centralised treasury department.

stem_zh: 16. Using months as a basis,what is the financial consequence of accepting the bulk purchase discount? 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A Benefit of$8,000 per year B Benefit of$12,000 per year C Cost of$13,000 per year D Cost of$8,000 per year 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是库存成本的计算。 存货也就是我们说的库存，其成本由三部分构成，包括订货成本、持有成本和采购成本。 对于订货成本，由于Amax Co 现在一年消耗240,000 units of Component X, 每个订单订购 20,000 units,所以一年订货12次。如果我们接受供应商的批量订货折扣， 一次订货60,000 units, 那么我们一年订货次数就是4次。所以节省订购成本=$250*(12-4)=$2000。 不过由于订购量的上涨，存货持有水平会相应上涨，带来存货持有成本的增加。 持有成本增加=$1*((60000/2)-(20000/2))=$20000 如果接受供应商提供的提前付款折扣每年在采购成本上可以少付240000*$25*0.5%=$30000 所以将好处和对应的成本合并后=$2000-$20000+$30000=$12000>0,有净收益产生。 知识点标签： Working capital management -Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash -Discuss,apply and evaluate the use of relevant techniques in managing inventory,including the Economic Order Quantity model and Just-in-Time techniques. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 17. Using days as a basis,what is the financial consequence of accepting the early settlement discount? 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A Benefit of $48,000 per year B Cost of $32,000 per year C Cost of $80,000 per year D Benefit of$80,000 per year 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察的提前付款折扣的计算。 ION ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM M 零件的年度采购=3.2mx(360/72)=$16,000,000 per year 修订后的应付款=16m x 30/360=$1,333,333 融资成本增加=0.06x(3,200,000-1,333,333)=$112,000 per year 折扣节省=16m x0.01=$160,000 per year 节约=160,000-112,000=$48,000 per year 知识点标签： Working capital management -Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash -Discuss,apply and evaluate the use of relevant techniques in managing accounts receivable. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 18. 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION In relation to managing foreign accounts receivable,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 3 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A Companies expecting to receive foreign currency from foreign accounts receivable will be concerned about the risk of the foreign currency appreciating against the domestic currency B The safest way to conduct business with foreign accounts receivable is by making a sale where goods are shipped and delivered before payment is due(open account) C Thereis no need to assess the creditworthiness of foreign customers if a company has export credit insurance for foreign accounts receivable D Discounting bills of exchange can reduce foreign accounts receivable default risk 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察的抵御风险的基本工具。 贴现汇票可以尽早兑现应收账款，因此可以减少国外应收账款违约的风险，故D 正确。 选项A 不正确，因为预期收到外汇的公司将担心的是贬值的风险，而不是升值。 选项B 不正确，因为海外销售的合同中关于装运以及发货的条款是双方协议设立，而并不 跟随付款条款变动。如果肆意调整，会产生违约或其他队后续合作的负面影响。 选项C 不正确，信用评估一般是信用政策(credit policy)的第一步，并不能省略。 知识点标签： Risk Management-Hedging techniques for foreign currency risk -Compare and evaluate traditional methods of foreign currency risk management. 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 19. In relation to Amax Co's proposed change to treasury management operations,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion4 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A Local management willbe incentivised to maximise profitability B Amax Co will be more responsive to localised needs for currency hedging C Amax Co will suffer a loss of autonomy at a local level D The change should increase the cost of hedging foreign currency risk for Amax Co 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是集权分权财务管理相关知识点。 中央集权的财政管理不会对地方部门产生激励作用，选项A 错误； 中央财政集权管理并不能有效地对当地业务部门的要求作出响应，选项B 错误； 中央集权的财政管理会削弱地方部门或分支机构的自主管理权，选项C 正确； 中央集权的财政管理会将公司的外汇风险进行统筹管理，从而节约成本，选项D 错误。 知识点标签： Working capital management-Management of inventories,accounts receivable, accounts payable and cash -Explain the various reasons for holding cash,and discuss and apply the use of relevant techniques in managing cash,including -assessing the benefits of centralised treasury management and cash control 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 20. In relation to working capital funding strategy,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2022/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 5 分值：2 题目类型：单选 ATION ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM A An aggressive strategy seeks to maximise liquidity at the expense of profitability B Short-term finance has a higher cost than long-term finance C Fluctuating current assets should be financed from a short-term source DA moderate or matching strategy finances current assets from a short-term source 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察的营运资本的募集策略。 激进的营运资本筹资策略往往会为了实现利润最大化而放弃流动性，选项A 错误； 由于借款期间越长，风险与不确定性都会增加，长期融资渠道的成本往往高于短期，选项B 错 误 ； 根据匹配原则，浮动的流动资往往来自短期融资渠道，选项C 正确； 根据匹配原则，流动资产中没有能够进一步区分浮动或永久性的流动资产，故而不能直接将 流动资产的融资渠道划分为短期融资渠道，选项D 错误。 知识点标签： Working capital management -Determining working capital needs and funding strategies-Evaluate and discuss the key factors in determining working capital funding strategies 难易程度：低 The following scenario relates to the five questions (21-25)below The following financial information related to Dazvin Co,a company that is listed on a large stock market. $m Revenue 35.5 Cost of sales (20.0) Other expenses (8.4) Finance costs (1.4) Profit before taxation 5.7 Corporation tax(30%) (1.7) Profit for the year 4.0 Equity and liabilities $m Ordinary share capital 26.0 Preference share capital 10.0 Retained earnings 21.5 Total equity 57.5 Non-current liabilities Long-term borrowings 18.0 Current liabilities Trade payables 11.1 Total liabilities 29.1 Total equity and liabilities 86.8 The preference share capital consists of irredeemable 6%preference shares with a nominal value of $0.5 per share.The cost of capital of the preference shares is 8%. The ordinary shares have a nominal value of$1.00 per share.Dazvin Co has a price/earnings ratio of 12 times.Future share price growth on the stock market is expected to be 6%per year. The long-term borrowings consist of 7.5%convertible loan notes with a nominal value of $100 per loan note.These loan notes can be converted at the end of six years into 40 ordinary shares of Dazvin Co,or redeemed on the same date at their nominal value of $100 per loan note.Dazvin Co has a before-tax cost of debt of 6%.

stem_zh: 21. What is the market value of the preference shares of Dazvin Co? 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$7.50m B$5.25m C$3.75m D$10.71m 答案：A
explanation_zh: 题目考察优先股的市场价值计算。 根据题目的信息，已知优先股的股息率为6%每年，票面价值为0.5元每股，对应的资本成 本为8%。 优先股每股股息=0.50×0.06=$0.03 优先股每股市场价格P0=0.03/0.08=$0.375 优先股股数=10/0.5=20m 总市场价值=20m×0.375=$7.50m 知识点标签： Business valuations-The valuation of debt and other financial assets 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 22. Using the price/earnings ratio method,what is the value of Dazvin Co? 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 2 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A$48.0m B $68.4m C$43.2m D$40.8m 答案：D
explanation_zh: 题目考察运用PE ratio method计算公司的价值。 根据题目已知 PE ratio=12, 我们需要计算出分配给普通股股东的净收益从而算出公司的价 值 。 优先股股息=10.0m×0.06=$0.6m 扣除优先股股息后的净收益=4.0m-0.6m=$3.4m 公司价值=3 .4m×12=$40.8m 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Models for the valuation of shares -Discuss and apply income-based valuation models -price/earnings ratio method 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 23. Based on a current ordinary share price of $2.00 per share,what is the market value of the convertible debt of Dazvin Co? 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 3 分值：2 题目类型：单选 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION A$19.0m B$19.3m C$21.0m D$20.1m 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察运用可转债市场价格的计算。 在计算可转债的市场价格前，我们需要判断投资者未来会选择换股或赎回，应该选择 redemption value 和 conversion value 中更高的那一个。 Conversion value =2.00×1.066×40=$113.48/loan note 而 redemption value 为票面价值100,因此投资者会选择换股。该可转债未来的现金流为六 年的利息和最后一年的conversion value。 每张可转债的市场价值=(利息×6年6%的年金系数)+(113.48×第6年6%的折现系数) =(7.5×4.917)+(113.48×0.705)=$116.88 可转债的总市场价值=18m/100×116.88=$21.0m 这里要注意债券的市场价值计算是站在投资者的角度上，利息不可抵税，因此折现率用的是 税前的kd 6%。 知识点标签： Business valuations -The valuation of debt and other financial assets -Discuss and apply appropriate valuation methods-convertible debt 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 24. In relation to information requirements for valuing shares,which of the following statements is correct? 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 4 分值：2 题目类型：单 选 A Only information on the market values of tangible assets should be used in valuing shares B Shares are likely to be mispriced where managers and investors have different levels of information (information asymmetry) C Details of key personnel are not relevant to the market capitalisation of a listed company D Since companies do not release information that undermines their competitive advantage,most of the published information about a company is not relevant to placing a value on its shares 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察股票估值使用的信息，要求选择正确的选项。 选 项 A 错 误 。 只 有asset-based valuation method 符合这 一 描述，但对equity 估值还有 income-based 和 cash flow based 两种方法。 选 项B 正确。由于信息不对称性的存在，股票会出现错误的定价，即常说的股价高估或者 低估。 选 项C 错误。对上市公司的股价进行估值时，我们需要考虑一些关键人员，比如重要的高 管，其会影响到公司股票的价值。 选 项D 错误。公司高管确实会隐瞒一些信息来保护公司的股价，但除此之外也有很多其他 的公开信息例如公司的年报会对股票估值产生很重大影响。 知识点标签：Business valuations -Nature and purpose of the valuation of business and financial assets -Identify information requirements for valuation and discuss the limitations of different types of information 难易程度：高

stem_zh: 25. In relation to behavioural finance,which of the following statements is/are correct? 原题来源：2021/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 5 分值：2 题目类型：单选 (1)When investors believe that recent share price increases will continue,this can lead to irrational investment decisions by uninformed investors (2)Informed investors can contribute to speculative stock market bubbles A1 B2 only only C Both 1 and 2 D Neither 1 nor 2 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察行为金融学，要求选择正确的选项。 陈述1正确。当现有投资者坚信目前的股价会上涨，这可能导致一些不知情或者不了解股市 的投资者盲目相信现有的投资者，从而做出非理性的投资决定，而这些做出非理性决定的投 资者又被称之为噪音交易者。这是行为金融学的一种现象。 陈述2正确。这些噪音交易者会导致大家一蜂窝的去购买某种股票，导致股票价格虚高，出 现泡沫。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business valuations -Efficient Market Hypothesis(EMH)and practical considerations in the valuation of shares -Describe the significance of investor speculation and the explanations of investor decisions offered by behavioural finance 难易程度：中 The following scenario relates to the five questions(26-30)below Nolciln Co needs to raise more capital and wants to identify the most appropriate capital structure to maximise its shareholders*wealth.The company has approached you for advice on aspects of its financial and operational gearing. The following has been extracted from Nolciln Co's 20X9 financial statements: $'000 Revenue 9,540 Profit before interest and tax(PBIT) 1,590 Profit after tax 1,072 Dividends paid 500 Ordinary shares(nominal value $1) 7,800 8%loan notes 3,125 Detailed analysis has shown that variable costs are equal to 60%of Nolciln Co's revenue.You have been informed that it i company policy to calculate operational gearing as: Operational gearing=Contribution/PBIT The directors of Nolciln Co are also seeking advice on the optimal capital structure.They are aware of the Modigliani and Miller models but seek further information,in particular in respect of what is meant by market imperfections.

stem_zh: 26. What was Nolciln Co's operational gearing in 20X9(to one decimal place)? times 原题来源：2021/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 1 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：2.4
explanation_zh: 题目考察比率的计算，要求计算经营杠杆， Operational gearing=Contribution/PBIT 根据题目信息，变动成本是收入的60%,因此可以推倒出contribution=40%revenue, 即 Contribution=0.40x$9,540,000=$3,816,000. PBIT=$1,590,000 因此，经营杠杆为：$3,816,000/$1,590,000=2.4 times 知 识 点 标 签 ：Business finance-Capital structure theories and traditional view of capital structure and its assumptions. 难易程度：低 practical considerations-Describe the

stem_zh: 27. What was Nolciln Co's interest cover in 20X9(to one decimal place)? times 原题来源：2021/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 2 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：6.4
explanation_zh: 题目考察比率的计算，要求求出利息保障倍数， Interest cover=PBIT/interest. Interest=0.08x3,125,000=$250,000 因此利息保障为数为$1,590,000/$250,000=6.4 times. 知 识 点 标 签 ： Financial management function-Stakeholders and impact on corporate objectives-Ratio analysis 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 28. Which TWO of the following are consistent with traditional capital structure theory? A There is no optimal capital structure B The value of the company remains unchanged with increased gearing C The cost of equity is higher when there is a high proportion of debt capital D There is a point at which the weighted average cost of capital is minimised 原题来源：2021/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 3 分值：2 题目类型： 多选题 答案：CD
explanation_zh: 题目考察对于资本结构理论的理解，要求选择和传统资本结构理论相符的选项。 A 选项，没有最优资本结构。错误，传统资本结构理论中有描述企业存在最优资本结构。 B 选项，随着财务杠杆增加，企业的价值保持不变。错误，在传统资本结构利率中，企业的 加权平均资本成本随着杠杆的增加而变化，因此企业的价值也随着企业的财务杠杆增加而变 化 。 C 选项，高债务时，企业的权益资本成本也更高。符合传统资本结构理论，因为在债务越高， 企业股东面临的财务风险更高，股东要求更高的回报来弥补自己面临的更高风险，所以Ke 更高。 D 选 项 ，WACC 存在最小的点，符合传统资本结构理论，该点即为A 选项描述的最优资本 结构点。 知识点标签：Business finance-Capital structure theories and practical considerations-Describe the traditional view of capital structure and its assumptions. 难易程度： 中

stem_zh: 29. Responding to the directors'request for advice,which of the following is consistent with Modigliani and Miller's with-tax model? A The value of Nolciln Co decreases with increased gearing B The weighted average cost of capital remains constant with increased gearing C The optimal capital structure is made up almost entirely of debt D The cost of equity remains constant with increased gearing 原题来源：2021/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion4 分值：2 题目类型：单选题 答案：C
explanation_zh: 题目考察对于资本结构理论的理解，要求选择和 MM 有税理论相符的选项。 MM 有税理论认为债券所带来的利息有抵税作用。 一方面权益资本的增加会使WACC增加， 但另一方面由于引入成本更低的债，并且债务的利息还有抵税效果，所以WACC会下降的更 厉害。所以借越多的债，公司的融资成本WACC 就越低。 A 选项，在MM有税理论下，企业的价值随着债务的升高也升高，而不是降低，因此错误。 B选项，在MM有税理论下，随着债务身高，企业的节税作用越强，因此企业的WACC也 降低，而不是保持不变，因此错误。 C 选项，描述正确。 D 选项，在 MM 有税理论下，权益资本成本也是有一定的上升的，而不是保持不变。 知识点标签： Business finance-Capital structure theories and practical considerations-Identify a range of capital market imperfections and describe their impact on the views of Miller and Modigliani on capital structure. 难易程度：中

stem_zh: 30. In relation to capital structure,which TWO of the following are valid statements about market imperfections? A Tax exhaustion occurs when there is a very high proportion of equity capital B Debt-holders may impose restrictive covenants in loan agreements C Agency costs,tax exhaustion and bankruptcy risk encourage very high gearing levels D When a company's gearing creates a high risk of bankruptcy the weighted average cost of capital will be higher 原题来源：22021/MJ Examiner's report Section BQuestion 5 分值：2 题目类型：多选题 答案：BD
explanation_zh: 题目考察对于市场缺陷的理解，要求选择关于市场缺陷，描述正确的选项。 A 选项，税收是发生在债务更多的情况下，而不是权益，因此错误。 B 选项，债权人出于自保的目的，往往会在贷款协议后附上限制性条款，所以正确。 C 选项，代理成本，税收枯竭和破产风险鼓企业拥有高杠杆水平，此选项错误。因为如果企 业的代理成本较高，破产风险较高等，此时企业面临的财务风险非常高，因此会选择采用非 债务的融资方式，所以不是鼓励企业进行债务融资，拥有高杠杆，而是抑制企业进行债务融 资，降低杠杆。 D 选项，公司的杠杆过高时，企业面临的破产风险相应的就会比较大，所以相应的债务资金 成本和权益资金成本都会比较高，所以加权平均资本成本就会相应更高，所以正确。 知识点标签： Business finance-Capital structure theories and practical considerations-Identify a range of capital market imperfections and describe their impact on the views of Miller and Modigliani on capital structure. 难易程度：中 The following scenario relates to the five questions(31-35)below Marigold Co is based in a country which uses the dollar($)as its home currency.Marigold Co has a wholly.owned subsidiary based in a country which uses the M shilling(MS)as its currency.The subsidiary's financial statements are prepared in MS. Due to economic uncertainty in both countries,an exchange loss of$100,000 is expected to occur after consolidating the results of the subsidiary into Marigold Co's group accounts. Marigold Co is expecting a receipt of MS300,000 from the subsidiary in three months which it wishes to protect against exchange rate movement The following information is available: Exchange rates MS per$1 Spot rate 1.0950-1.1250 Three-month forward rate 1.0850-1.1125 Money Market Rates Annual Deposit Annual Borrow % % MS 3.6 4.0 $ 6.0 7.0

stem_zh: 31. What type of exchange rate risk would Marigold Co experience with the S100,000 loss in its consolidated financial statements? 原题来源：2020/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 1 分值：2 题目类型：单选 A Economic B Translation C Transaction D Political ONLINE DELIVERY 答案：B
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是对外汇风险类型的理解。题目中所描述的$100,000损失是由母子公司报 表合并过程中产生的。由于两个国家之间货币的不同，子公司的报表在合并到母公司的报表 的过程中，由于汇率的变动，会产生账面上的损失，这部分风险属于转换风险。因此选择B。 知 识 点 标 签 ：Risk Management -The nature and types of risk and approaches to risk management-Describe and discuss different types of foreign currency risk 难易程度：低

stem_zh: 32. If Marigold Co uses the forward market to hedge the MS receipt,what amount will be received(to the nearest $)? 原题来源：2020/SD Examiner's report Section BQuestion 2 分值：2 题目类型：填空题 答案：$269,663
explanation_zh: 题目考察的是如何用远期利率去规避外汇应收账款的风险。三个月的远期利率为 1.0850-1.1125,由于这里企业是将要收到一笔外币MS300,000, 并想要将收到的外币转 换成本币$。所以行为是卖出将要收到的MS, 买入美元。因此，汇率选择的应该是美元 的买入价格。由于跟银行打交道，吃亏的一定是我们自己。因此在买入的过程中，应该 选择较高的价格1.1125作为买入价。 The appropriate forward rate is 1.1125 MS per $1.
